restrictions.original: Two random slots in your formation are cursed The curses change slots every 15 seconds Heroes in cursed slots are stunned and cannot attack.

restrictions.original:
In addition to the core 12 Champions, you may only use Ranger, Druid, and/or Barbarian Champions.
Friendly animals take up slots in your formation. You start out with one slot taken up by a friendly animal, then every 50 areas a new animal joins your team, until there are 6 animals.
restrictions.display:
除了核心 12 勇士，你只能使用巡林客、德鲁伊和/或野蛮人勇士。
友好动物会占据你阵型中的格子。一开始一个格子会被一只友好动物占据，然后每过 50 个区域，一只新的动物会加入你的队伍，直到你的队伍中有 6 只动物。

restrictions.original: Monsters spawn continuously (timer between spawns reduced to 1 second), but drop a quarter of the gold they normally do
restrictions.display: 怪物会持续刷新（刷新间隔减少至 1 秒），但只掉落常规金币量的 1/4

restrictions.display: 暗影怪物会随机向你的阵型发动攻击。暗影是隐形的且不会受到伤害，只有在碰到你之后才会显形并可被攻击。暗影怪物移动迅速且不会阻碍其他怪物刷新。

All monsters emanate waves of shadowy evil upon spawning and every 5 seconds after that. Each wave deals 10% max health damage against a random Champion.

所有怪物在刷新和之后的每 5 秒会释放出邪恶的暗影波。每个暗影波对一名随机勇士造成最大生命值 10% 的伤害。

The sailor boss spawns in every area after 10 enemies with one of four special abilities. If Briv is in your formation, Champions' normal attack cooldowns are decreased by .5 seconds.
restrictions.display: 肉桂加入阵型。一位喝醉的水手确信肉桂是她船上最理想的宠物，她必须拥有它！在每个区域中，每当出现 10 个拥有四种特殊能力之一的敌人后，水手长会刷新。如果布里夫在你的阵型中，则所有勇士的普通攻击冷却时间减少 0.5 秒。

restrictions.original:
- Bruenor and Wulfgar have set off alone on an adventure to catch up after some lost time. 
- Wulfgar & Bruenor are the only Champions allowed; they start in your formation
- Their damage is increased by 40% per area, stacking multiplicatively
- They both attack three times as fast as normal and their Ultimate cooldown is reduced to 30 seconds if it isn't already below that
restrictions.display:
- 布鲁诺和沃夫加结伴踏上冒险之旅，弥补失去的时光。
- 仅可使用沃夫加和布鲁诺；他们在初始时位于你的阵型中
- 这两位勇士在每个区域的伤害都会提高 40%，以乘算方式堆叠
- 他们的攻击速度加快三倍，杀招的冷却时间会缩短至 30 秒（若冷却时间本身长于 30 秒）

restrictions.original: Must have completed "Brightly into Darkness (Wulfgar)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“光明踏入黑暗（沃夫加）”

restrictions.display: 必须已完成“传说的墓穴（弗拉希娜）”。

restrictions.original: Additional boss monsters appear in each boss area, including some legendary bosses from your past, present, and/or future. Features unique dialogue.
restrictions.display: 每个首领区域会出现额外的首领怪物，包括来自你的过去、现在和/或未来的一些传奇首领。会出现独特对话。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Crypt of Legends (Vlahnya)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“传说的墓穴（弗拉希娜）”。

restrictions.original: No restrictions
restrictions.display: 无限制

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Simril Spoilsport (Warden)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“观星节扫兴者（守望者）”

restrictions.original: Beasts deal 3x damage and have 2 additional armored hit points that must be dealt with before they can be killed. You start with your first two champions unlocked.
restrictions.display: 兽类敌人造成 3 倍伤害且拥有 2 点额外重甲生命值，必须先破坏护甲才能将其击杀。任务开始时解锁你的前两位初始勇士。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Simril Spoilsport (Warden)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“观星节扫兴者（守望者）”

restrictions.original: Champions on the outside of the formation deal less damage due to the cold weather. The effect increases in higher areas.
restrictions.display: 由于天气太过寒冷，阵型外围的勇士造成的伤害减少。推进的区域越远，此效果就越明显。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Simril Spoilsport (Warden)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“观星节扫兴者（守望者）”

restrictions.original:
Warden starts in the formation. He can't be moved or removed. 
Every 50 areas a creeping Eldritch Horror takes over a slot in the formation. Slots stop getting filled after area 300. 
For every 50 areas completed, Warden's damage is increased by 20000%.
restrictions.display:
守望者初始位于阵型中。他无法被移动或移除。
每经过 50 个区域，一个诡异的奥法恐怖会占据阵型中的一格。完成 300 个区域之后，阵型中的格子不再会被占据。
每完成 50 个区域，守望者的伤害增加 20000%。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Simril Spoilsport (Warden)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“观星节扫兴者（守望者）”

restrictions.original: No restrictions
restrictions.display: 无限制

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Merry Map Misadventure (Nerys)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“快乐地图灾祸（妮莉丝）”

restrictions.original: Illusionary Dragons spawn in each area. These extra enemies drop no gold. They don't do any damage, either. They're just illusions, after all.
restrictions.display: 每个区域会刷新幻象巨龙。这些额外的敌人不会掉落金币。它们也不会造成伤害。毕竟它们只是幻象。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Merry Map Misadventure (Nerys)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“快乐地图灾祸（妮莉丝）”

restrictions.original: Two drunk Waterdhavians join your formation to see what all the fuss is about. Every 25 areas they switch positions to try to get a better view.
restrictions.display: 两个深水城醉汉加入你的阵型来看热闹。每经过 25 个区域他们会切换位置，寻找更好的观赏角度。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Merry Map Misadventure (Nerys)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“快乐地图灾祸（妮莉丝）”

restrictions.original: Relentless Undead monsters spawn and attack the formation. When killed, these monsters don't disappear. Instead, after 3 seconds, they get back up and attack once more. If they are killed by Nerys' Spiritual Weapon, they're killed for good.
restrictions.display: 无情的亡灵怪物会刷新并攻击阵型。被击杀后，这些怪物不会消失。3 秒后它们会重新站起来继续发动攻击。只有被妮莉丝的灵能武器击杀，它们才会真正死去。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Merry Map Misadventure (Nerys)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“快乐地图灾祸（妮莉丝）”

restrictions.original: No restrictions
restrictions.display: 无限制

restrictions.original: Must have completed "Deadwinter Day (K'thriss)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“仲冬节（克里斯）”

restrictions.original:
K'thriss starts in the formation. He can't be moved or removed.
K'thriss's unseen servant Velvet joins the formation.
Only Champions not next to K'thriss can deal damage.
Getting to Know K'thriss: K'thriss increases the damage of Champions not next to him. Place your damage dealers to best take advantage of this!
restrictions.display:
克里斯初始位于阵型中。他无法被移动或移除。
克里斯的隐形仆从“丝绒”加入阵型。
只有不与克里斯相邻的勇士可以造成伤害。
了解克里斯：克里斯会使不与他相邻的勇士伤害提高。合理放置你的伤害输出勇士来最大程度利用这一点！

restrictions.original: Must have completed "Deadwinter Day (K'thriss)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“仲冬节（克里斯）”

restrictions.original: A drow cultist empowered by the sign of Ur appears in every area. When killed, the cultist drops a Tetrathanotic Glyph, which increases the damage of Champions with an INT score of 13+ by 5%. Those not intelligent enough to understand the book lose 5% of their damage. These buffs stack and remain in effect until the adventure is completed.
restrictions.display: 一个获得了乌尔神迹力量的卓尔精灵邪教分子会出现在每个区域。被击杀后，邪教分子会掉落特塔拉塔诺迪克刻文，使智力大于等于 13 的勇士提高 5% 伤害。智力过低以至于无法理解这本书的人，伤害会降低 5%。此效果可堆叠并将持续至冒险完成。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "Deadwinter Day (K'thriss)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“仲冬节（克里斯）”

restrictions.original: The Devourer now appears as an additional area 25 boss, in addition to its normal role as the area 50 boss. As if that wasn't scary enough, the Devourer now only takes 8 seconds to devour a Champion, down from 10. The dialog on this adventure is slightly tweaked.
restrictions.display: 吞噬者现在会作为区域 25 的额外首领出现，且区域 50 也会额外出现一个。吞噬者的恐怖程度增加，从原来的每 10 秒改为每 8 秒吞噬一名勇士。此冒险的对话有轻微改动。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "Deadwinter Day (K'thriss)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“仲冬节（克里斯）”

restrictions.original: No restrictions
restrictions.display: 无限制

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Missing Merchants (Paultin)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“失踪的商人（保尔丁）”

restrictions.original: Four slots in the formation are taken up by a magical shipment of flowers.
restrictions.display: 阵型中的 4 格被魔法花朵占据。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Missing Merchants (Paultin)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“失踪的商人（保尔丁）”

restrictions.original: Only Bards or Champions with a CHA score of 15 or higher can be used. Paultin starts the adventure unlocked and in the formation.
restrictions.display: 只能使用吟游诗人和魅力大于等于 15 的勇士。保尔丁在冒险中直接解锁且位于阵型中。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Missing Merchants (Paultin)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“失踪的商人（保尔丁）”

restrictions.original: Hordes of adoring fans attack the formation, each with a unique and annoying ability.
restrictions.display: 大批疯狂的粉丝会袭击阵型，他们各自拥有一个独特而讨厌的技能。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Missing Merchants (Paultin)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“失踪的商人（保尔丁）”

restrictions.original: No restrictions
restrictions.display: 无限制

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Unfair Sea (Black Viper)" Costs 250 Fresh Fishes to start
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“不公平的海（漆黑毒蛇）” 花费 250 条鲜鱼开启

restrictions.original: Sea Spawn appear with each wave of enemies. These additional monsters do not drop gold or count towards quests. More and more Sea Spawn appear as you get further into the adventure.
restrictions.display: 每波敌人中会刷新海恶灵。这些额外的敌人不会掉落金币，也不会计入任务进度。随着冒险的深入，海恶灵的数量会越来越多。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Unfair Sea (Black Viper)" Costs 625 Fresh Fishes to start
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“不公平的海（漆黑毒蛇）” 花费 625 条鲜鱼开启

restrictions.original: Black Viper starts in the formation. Only enemies killed by Black Viper drop gold.
restrictions.display: 漆黑毒蛇初始位于阵型中。只有被漆黑毒蛇击杀的敌人会掉落金币。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Unfair Sea (Black Viper)" Costs 1250 Fresh Fishes to start
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“不公平的海（漆黑毒蛇）” 花费 1250 条鲜鱼开启

restrictions.original: Champions gain buffs or debuffs based on their DEX score. Some low DEX Champions may be detrimental to your progress, while high DEX ones will be extra helpful!
restrictions.display: 勇士会根据他们的敏捷属性获得增益或减益。某些低敏捷勇士可能会妨碍你的进度，而高敏捷勇士则会大有帮助！

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Unfair Sea (Black Viper)" Costs up to 2500 Fresh Fishes to start
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“不公平的海（漆黑毒蛇）” 花费最多 2500 条鲜鱼开启

restrictions.original: No restrictions
restrictions.display: 无限制

restrictions.original: Must have completed "A Fool's Errand (Rosie)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“愚人的差事（罗茜）”

restrictions.original: Only Champions with STR of 14 or lower can be used. Rosie and Champions with INT of 14 or higher deal 400% additional damage.
restrictions.display: 只能使用力量小于等于 14 的勇士。罗茜和智力大于等于 14 的勇士造成 400% 额外伤害。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "A Fool's Errand (Rosie)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“愚人的差事（罗茜）”

restrictions.original: Mind Flayers spawn in boss areas. While the Mind Flayer is alive, all other enemies are immune to damage.
restrictions.display: 首领区域会刷新夺心魔。夺心魔存活时，其他所有敌人免疫伤害。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "A Fool's Errand (Rosie)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“愚人的差事（罗茜）”

restrictions.original:
Rosie starts in your formation. She can be moved, but not removed. You may only use Rosie on this adventure.
A Strix escort starts in your formation. The Strix escort attacks the nearest enemy every 3 seconds with a fireball that deals 10 seconds of BUD damage in a small area.
Rosie's attack speed is increased by 300%, her ultimate attack cooldown is reduced to 45 seconds, and her ultimate root now lasts for 15 seconds.
Rosie deals 45% additional damage, starting in area 2 and increasing by another 45% each area, stacking multiplicatively.
restrictions.display:
罗茜初始位于你的阵型中。她可以被移动，但不能被移除。在本次冒险中只能使用罗茜。
斯崔克丝护卫初始位于你的阵型中。斯崔克丝护卫每 3 秒攻击最近的敌人，发射火球，在小范围内造成持续 10 秒的基础杀招伤害。
罗茜的攻击速度提高 300%，杀招攻击的冷却时间缩短至 45 秒，杀招定身效果现在持续 15 秒。
罗茜从区域 2 开始额外造成 45% 的伤害，并且每进入一个新的区域，伤害再增加 45%，以乘算方式堆叠。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "A Fool's Errand (Rosie)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“愚人的差事（罗茜）”

restrictions.original: No restrictions
restrictions.display: 无限制

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Endless War (Aila)" Costs 250 Bouquets to start
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“无止境的战争（艾拉）” 花费 250 个花束开启

restrictions.original: A Pixie riding an Intellect Devourer appears in every area. A random Champion is stunned as long as the Pixie is alive.
restrictions.display: 一只骑着噬脑怪的皮克精会出现在每个区域。只要皮克精存活，一名随机勇士将被眩晕。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Endless War (Aila)" Costs 625 Bouquets to start
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“无止境的战争（艾拉）” 花费 625 个花束开启

restrictions.original: Only Champions with 12 INT or lower may be used. After area 10, a giant Intellect Devourer appears in every area making all other monsters immune to damage. It has 200 armored hit points. Its health is reduced by 10 points for every point of INT less than 12 that your Champions have.
restrictions.display: 只能使用智力小于等于 12 的勇士。通关区域 10 后，一只巨型噬脑怪会出现在每个区域，使其他所有怪物免疫伤害。它拥有 200 点重甲生命值。你勇士的智力每比 12 低 1 点，它的生命值就减少 10 点。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Endless War (Aila)" Costs 1250 Bouquets to start
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“无止境的战争（艾拉）” 花费 1250 个花束开启

restrictions.original: Aila starts at level 10 at the front of your formation and can not be moved. Aila's Storm Aura hits two enemies with each strike. Only enemies affected by Aila's Primed or Electrified states can be damaged.
restrictions.display: 艾拉的初始等级为 10 级，会占据你阵型的前方，并且无法移动。艾拉的风暴灵光每次攻击会命中两名敌人。只有受艾拉的刺激或带电状态影响的敌人会受到伤害。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Endless War (Aila)" Costs up to 2500 Bouquets to start
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“无止境的战争（艾拉）” 花费最多 2500 个花束开启

restrictions.original: No restrictions
restrictions.display: 无限制

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Grandfather Acorn (Spurt)" Costs 250 Leaves to start
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“祖父橡果（斯普特）” 花费 250 片树叶开启

restrictions.original: Spurt and his Centi-pult start in the formation. The Centi-pult launches centipedes at random enemies. Enemies hit by the Centi-pult have increased damage and speed.
restrictions.display: 斯普特和他的蜈蚣弹弓初始位于阵型中。蜈蚣弹弓会向随机敌人发射蜈蚣。被蜈蚣弹弓击中的敌人会提高伤害和速度。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Grandfather Acorn (Spurt)" Costs 625 Leaves to start
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“祖父橡果（斯普特）” 花费 625 片树叶开启

restrictions.original: All elves and half-elves in your formation have their base attack cooldown reduced by 0.5 seconds. All drow enemies have additional armor-based health Additional Eladrin spawn in each area and are immune to damage until they attack.
restrictions.display: 你阵型中所有精灵和半精灵的基本攻击冷却时间减少 0.5 秒。所有卓尔精灵敌人拥有额外的重甲生命值 每个区域会刷新额外的雅灵，他们在发动攻击前处于免疫伤害状态。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Grandfather Acorn (Spurt)" Costs 1250 Leaves to start
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“祖父橡果（斯普特）” 花费 1250 片树叶开启

restrictions.original: Basic attack cooldowns are increased based on the number of lawful champions in the formation. Damage is decreased based on the number of neutral champions in the formation. Ultimate attack cooldowns are increased based on the number of chaotic champions in the formation.
restrictions.display: 根据阵型中守序勇士的数量增加基本攻击的冷却时间。根据阵型中中立勇士的数量降低伤害。根据阵型中混乱勇士的数量增加杀招攻击的冷却时间。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Grandfather Acorn (Spurt)" Costs up to 2500 Leaves to start
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“祖父橡果（斯普特）” 花费最多 2500 片树叶开启

restrictions.original: No restrictions
restrictions.display: 无限制

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Mechanical Menace (Qillek)" Costs 250 Rusted Gears to start
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“机械威胁（奇列克）” 花费 250 个锈蚀的零件开启

restrictions.original: Every time a modron is killed, it splits into two less powerful modrons
restrictions.display: 每个魔冢被击杀时都会分裂成两个稍微弱小的魔冢

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Mechanical Menace (Qillek)" Costs 625 Rusted Gears to start
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“机械威胁（奇列克）” 花费 625 个锈蚀的零件开启

restrictions.original: All melee modrons now attack random Champions from range with gears When a Champion is hit by four gears, they are stunned for 15 seconds
restrictions.display: 所有近战魔冢现在会远程攻击随机勇士 当勇士被四个齿轮击中时会眩晕 15 秒

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Mechanical Menace (Qillek)" Costs 1250 Rusted Gears to start
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“机械威胁（奇列克）” 花费 1250 个锈蚀的零件开启

restrictions.original: Qillek starts in the formation and cannot be moved or swapped out. Only Champions within 2 slots of Qillek can do damage.
restrictions.display: 奇列克初始位于阵型中且无法移动或交换。只有在奇列克 2 格范围内的勇士能造成伤害。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Mechanical Menace (Qillek)" Costs up to 2500 Rusted Gears to start
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“机械威胁（奇列克）” 花费最多 2500 个锈蚀的零件开启

restrictions.display: 无限制

name.original: It's All Going To Be O. K.
name.display: 一切都会 O. K. 的

restrictions.original: Must have completed "Let Sleeping Dragons Lie (Korth)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“放倒沉睡巨龙（科思）”

restrictions.original: Only Champions with an 'o' or 'k' in their name can be used
restrictions.display: 只能使用英文名字中有“O”或“K”的勇士

name.display: 科思的狗头人清洁小队

restrictions.original: Must have completed "Let Sleeping Dragons Lie (Korth)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“放倒沉睡巨龙（科思）”

restrictions.original: Korth starts out in the formation and can not be moved, removed, or swapped out. Armored Kobolds spawn in each area. They have 5 armored hits, but can not be damaged until Korth marks them.
restrictions.display: 科思初始位于阵型中且无法移动、移除或交换。每个区域会刷新重甲狗头人。他们拥有 5 点重甲生命值，但在被科思标记前不会受到伤害。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "Let Sleeping Dragons Lie (Korth)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“放倒沉睡巨龙（科思）”

restrictions.original: Each time the Dragon boss in area 50 is defeated, she immediately comes back to life with additional max health, additional damage, and additional attack speed (all stacking additively). These effects stack and she resurrects once for each 50 areas completed (once in area 50, twice in area 100, three times in area 150, etc.). After area 500 it's an additional rez per 100 areas. The max health caps at 100 armor-based hits.
restrictions.display: 每次击败区域 50 的巨龙首领时，她都会立即复活，并获得额外的最大生命值、伤害和攻击速度（以加算方式堆叠）。这些效果会叠加，每完成 50 个区域，她就会复活一次（在区域 50 复活第一次，区域 100 第二次，区域 150 第三次，以此类推）。区域 500 之后，每完成 100 个区域就会额外复活一次。最大生命值上限为 100 点附带护甲的生命值。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "Let Sleeping Dragons Lie (Korth)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“放倒沉睡巨龙（科思）”

restrictions.original: No restrictions
restrictions.display: 无限制

restrictions.original: Must have completed "Party Crashers (Walnut)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“不速之客（沃纳特）”

restrictions.original: A rain of fire falls from the sky, dealing damage to a random Champion. The frequency of the fireballs increase as your area gets higher.
restrictions.display: 一场火雨从天而降，对一名随机勇士造成伤害。随着区域的深入，火球的频率也会增加。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "Party Crashers (Walnut)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“不速之客（沃纳特）”

restrictions.original: Only Champions that attack with a melee base attack by default can be used.
restrictions.display: 只能选择默认使用近战基本攻击的勇士。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "Party Crashers (Walnut)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“不速之客（沃纳特）”

restrictions.original: Walnut starts out in the formation and can not be moved, removed, or swapped out. All enemies gain additional health and damage in each area. Demonic squirrel enemies spawn at random. When killed, they drop a Hell-Nut which increases the effect of Documancer by 1%, stacking additively.
restrictions.display: 沃纳特初始位于阵型中且无法移动、移除或交换。每个区域中的所有敌人获得额外生命值和伤害加成。恶魔松鼠敌人随机刷新。被击杀后，它们会掉落地狱松果，使记录员的效果增加 1%（以加算方式叠加）。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "Party Crashers (Walnut)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“不速之客（沃纳特）”

restrictions.original: No restrictions
restrictions.display: 无限制

restrictions.original: Must have completed The Missing Lord (Shandie)
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“失踪的领主（珊蒂）”

restrictions.original: Jenks really wants to meet Vajra Blackstaff. From area 12 onward, he takes up a slot in your formation.
restrictions.display: 詹克斯真的很想见一见跋折罗·黑杖。从区域 12 开始，他会占据你阵型中的一格。

restrictions.original: Must have completed The Missing Lord (Shandie)
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“失踪的领主（珊蒂）”

restrictions.original: Only Champions with ranged or magic base attacks can be used.
restrictions.display: 只能使用拥有远程或魔法基本攻击的勇士。

restrictions.original: Must have completed The Missing Lord (Shandie)
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“失踪的领主（珊蒂）”

restrictions.original: Shandie starts in the formation and can't be moved or swapped out. Only Champions that are Neutral, Evil, or with DEX 15 or higher can be used. Strahd Zombies spawn each wave that are immune except from Shandie.
restrictions.display: 珊蒂初始位于阵型中且无法移动或交换。只能使用中立勇士、邪恶勇士或敏捷大于等于 15 的勇士。每波敌人中会刷新斯特拉德僵尸，只有珊蒂能对它们造成伤害。

restrictions.original: Must have completed The Missing Lord (Shandie)
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“失踪的领主（珊蒂）”

restrictions.original: No restrictions
restrictions.display: 无限制

restrictions.original: Must have completed Reclaiming the Past (Jim)
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“重拾过去（吉姆）”

restrictions.original: The Champions continue to struggle to spell/pronounce "Ahghairon's Day," so spelling "Bees" spawn at random. Whenever a bee is killed, it decreases the damage of whoever killed it by 90% for 20 seconds. The effect stacks multiplicatively and the cooldown resets if they kill another bee before it expires.
restrictions.display: 勇士们还是说不清“阿格哈荣日”，所以只能随便乱说个词了，就用“蜜蜂”代替吧。每当有蜜蜂被击杀，会使击杀者的伤害降低 90%，持续 20 秒。此效果以乘算方式叠加，且如果在效果结束前击杀另一只蜜蜂，则冷却时间会重置。

restrictions.original: Must have completed Reclaiming the Past (Jim)
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“重拾过去（吉姆）”

restrictions.original: Only Champions whose base attacks are magic can be used.
restrictions.display: 只能使用基本攻击为魔法攻击的勇士。

restrictions.original: Must have completed Reclaiming the Past (Jim)
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“重拾过去（吉姆）”

restrictions.original: Jim starts out in the formation and can't be moved. Only formation slots which Jim narrowly considers useful to himself can be used.
restrictions.display: 吉姆初始位于阵型中且无法移动。只能使用在吉姆狭隘的思想中认为对他有用的阵型格子。

restrictions.original: Must have completed Reclaiming the Past (Jim)
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“重拾过去（吉姆）”

restrictions.original: Only Champions with a CON score of 14 or higher can be used.
restrictions.display: 只能使用体质大于等于 14 的勇士。

restrictions.display: 必须已完成“光明踏入黑暗（图里尔）”

restrictions.original: Turiel starts out in slot 1 and can't be moved or replaced. Only Lawful and/or Good Champions can be used.
restrictions.display: 图里尔初始位于 1 号栏位，且无法移动或替换。只能使用守序或善良阵营的勇士。

restrictions.original: Must have completed Brightly into Darkness (Turiel)
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“光明踏入黑暗（图里尔）”

restrictions.original: No Champions with the DPS role can be used.
restrictions.display: 不能使用担任输出角色的勇士。

restrictions.original: Must have completed Brightly into Darkness (Turiel)
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“光明踏入黑暗（图里尔）”

restrictions.display: 无限制

name.original: Think Your Way Out Of It

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Guardian of Orolunga"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“欧罗伦加的守护者”

restrictions.original: Only champions with an INT score of 13 or higher can partake.
restrictions.display: 只有智力大于等于 13 的勇士能参与此冒险。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Guardian of Orolunga" Must have completed 30 Tomb of Annihilation adventures or variants
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“欧罗伦加的守护者” 必须已完成 30 次湮灭之墓冒险或支线任务

restrictions.original: Champions' damage is decreased as they climb higher up the temple, based on their CON score (see debuff icon in-game for more details).
restrictions.display: 随着在神庙中攀爬得越来越高，勇士的伤害会根据他们的体质属性而逐渐减少（具体数值参见游戏中的减益图标）。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Guardian of Orolunga" Must have completed 52 Tomb of Annihilation adventures or variants
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“欧罗伦加的守护者” 必须已完成 52 次湮灭之墓冒险或支线任务

restrictions.original: Bubbles brought us a friend from the future! Wait, is that right? Rath Modar, the infamous Red Wizard, joins the formation to learn of the fall of his Red Wizards in Chult. Don't worry, Bubbles vouched for him. Two additional Red Wizards spawn with each wave. All Red Wizards each have 4 armored HP that must be cleared before they are defeated. Only Champions with INT of 12 or lower can be used.
restrictions.display: 泡泡给我们带来了未来的朋友！等等，是这样吗？臭名昭著的红袍法师瑞斯·莫德加入阵型，来了解他手下的红袍法师们在楚尔特的遭遇。别担心，泡泡为他担保。每波会额外刷新两名红袍法师。所有红袍法师都有 4 点重甲生命值，清空后才能将他们打倒。只能使用智力小于等于 12 的勇士。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Guardian of Orolunga"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“欧罗伦加的守护者”

restrictions.original: No restrictions
restrictions.display: 无限制

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Lost Love"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“失去的爱”

restrictions.original: Dragonbait takes up a slot in the formation and mourns the loss of his friend, Artus. Every 10 areas Dragonbait's scent changes, empowering the enemies or debuffing the champions.
restrictions.display: 龙饵占据阵型中的一格，缅怀他失去的朋友阿图斯。每经过 10 个区域，龙饵的气味会发生改变，强化敌人或减益勇士。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Lost Love" Must have completed 35 Tomb of Annihilation adventures or variants
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“失去的爱” 必须已完成 35 次湮灭之墓冒险或支线任务

restrictions.original: Dragonbait once again accompanies your formation, taking up the front slot. He does not attack, but provides a buff to the party while alive. Valindra Shadowmantle resurrects once per boss fight for every 50 areas into the adventure you are. Each time she resurrects she greatly increases her damage and health. Each time Valindra ressurects, Dragonbait's resolve grows stronger, increasing his health, damage reduction, and the buff he provides.
restrictions.display: 龙饵再次加入你的阵型，占据前方的格子。他不会攻击，但在存活时会为队伍提供增益。你的冒险每经过 50 个区域，瓦琳德拉·暗影斗篷在首领战中就会多复活一次。每次复活，她的伤害和生命值都会大幅提升。瓦琳德拉每复活一次，龙饵的决心会变得更加坚定，提高他的生命值、伤害减免和他所提供的增益效果。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Lost Love" Must have completed 63 Tomb of Annihilation adventures or variants
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“失去的爱” 必须已完成 63 次湮灭之墓冒险或支线任务

restrictions.original: Bubbles joins the formation and brings the spirit of the trickster gods with her! That's good, right?! Various trickster gods affect the formation throughout the adventure, granting a boon or a bane to the formation. The trickster god rotates every 5 areas.
restrictions.display: 泡泡加入阵型，并带来了诡计之神的灵魂！这很棒，不是吗？！在整个冒险过程中，每位诡计之神都会影响阵型，给阵型带来加成或削弱。诡计之神每 5 个区域轮换一次。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Lost Love"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“失去的爱”

restrictions.original: No restrictions
restrictions.display: 无限制

restrictions.display: 必须已完成“墙上的苍蝇”

restrictions.original: All Champions take damage over time based on their CON score while in misty/snowing areas. The higher the CON score, the lower the relative damage.
restrictions.display: 在迷雾或下雪区域中时，所有勇士根据其体质属性受到持续伤害。体质数值越高，受到的伤害越低。

restrictions.display: 必须已完成“墙上的苍蝇”

restrictions.original: There's a conference in Baldur's Gate for certain classes. Bards, Barbarians, Clerics, and Druids can not be used.
restrictions.display: 博德之门有一场专为某些职业举办的聚会。无法使用吟游诗人、野蛮人、牧师和德鲁伊。

restrictions.original: In each boss area Strahd on Horseback appears. You must defeat this additional boss to advance. When defeated, he runs off the screen. Only champions with INT of 13 or higher can be used.
restrictions.display: 骑马的斯特拉德会在每个首领区域出现。你必须击败此额外首领才能继续前进。一旦被击败，他就会逃到屏幕外面去。只能使用智力大于等于 13 的勇士。

restrictions.display: 同一时间内，你的阵型中每个种族的勇士只能存在一名。

restrictions.display: 不可使用 1-4 号位的勇士（从布鲁诺到贾拉索）。只能使用 5 号位或以后（从卡莉欧碧开始）的勇士。

restrictions.original: Each wave spawns 1-3 shadar-kai warriors. They don't drop gold, nor do they count towards quest progress. Each boss area spawns 1 Shadar-Kai Soul Monger, a boss with 20 hits-based HP. When the Soul Monger hits a Champion with a melee attack, that Champion is defeated. You must defeat this additional boss to advance. Fog encroaches in each area.
restrictions.display: 每一波会刷新 1-3 名影灵战士。它们不会掉落金币，也不计入任务进度。每个首领区域刷新 1 个影灵灵魂商贩，这名首领拥有 20 点基于命中次数的生命。当灵魂商贩用近战攻击击中勇士时，该勇士会立即被击败。你必须击败此额外首领才能继续前进。迷雾会侵袭每个区域。

restrictions.original: Champions adjacent to Mirt deal no damage due to his distracting presence. Only good and evil Champions may be used. At the start of each area, an Iron Defender with 10 armored HP appears. Other monsters are invulnerable while the Iron Defender is there.
restrictions.display: 与米尔特相邻的勇士无法造成伤害，因为他的存在会让人分心。只能使用善良与邪恶阵营的勇士。在每个区域开始时，会出现一个拥有 10 点重甲生命值的钢铁守卫。钢铁卫士存活期间，其他怪物处于无敌状态。

restrictions.display: 必须已完成“逃亡者”

restrictions.original: Since you're on the run you must be discreet and attack from the shadows. Only Champions whose base attack is ranged or magic can be used.
restrictions.display: 你必须在奔跑中保持谨慎，只能从暗影中发动攻击。只能使用基本攻击为远程或魔法攻击的勇士。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "Fugitives" Must have completed 11 Dragon Heist adventures or variants
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“逃亡者” 必须已完成 11 次龙金之劫冒险或支线任务

restrictions.original: Super powered Spined Devils appear at random and attack the party These devilish foes come with a variety of annoying abilities
restrictions.display: 超强大的针刺魔会随机出现并攻击队伍 这些恶魔敌人拥有多种讨厌的技能

restrictions.original:

restrictions.display:
必须已完成“逃亡者”
必须已完成 31 次龙金之劫冒险或支线任务

restrictions.original: Two Shadar-Kai warriors join the formation. Champions next to the Shadar-Kai are so filled with existential angst that their base attack cooldown speed is doubled. Orcus has sent his minions to slow you down. 1-3 Relentless Ghouls appear with every wave. When they are killed, Relentless Ghouls don't disappear. Instead, after 5 seconds, they get back up and start attacking again. They do not drop gold, or count towards quest progress.
restrictions.display: 两名影灵战士加入阵型。与影灵战士相邻的勇士极度担忧自己能否幸存，他们的基础攻击冷却时间加倍。奥喀斯派他的爪牙来阻止你。每一波会出现 1-3 只无情的食尸鬼。无情的食尸鬼被击杀时不会消失。5 秒后它们会重新站起来继续发动攻击。它们不会掉落金币，也不计入任务进度。

restrictions.display: 必须已完成“逃亡者”

restrictions.display: 在首领区域中，一个以前的首领会和当前首领一起出现，迫使你对抗自己的恐惧与悔恨。

restrictions.display: 怪物的移动速度加倍。只能使用基本攻击冷却时间小于等于 5 秒的勇士。

restrictions.display: 一只渡鸦加入你的阵型并处于 8 号位。被击倒的勇士在通过新的首领区域之前无法恢复。

restrictions.display: 城堡中满是巴洛维亚的婚礼“宾客”，他们正在为斯特拉德的婚礼做准备。其中两人会占据阵型中的格子，导致所有勇士的每次攻击造成 0.1% 到 199.9% 的实际伤害。

restrictions.original:
A random Tanking Champion is immediately unlocked, added to the formation, can't be removed, and can't be moved.
Other Champions with the Tanking role cannot be used. 
Enemies move 300% faster, have 300% more health, and deal 300% more damage.
restrictions.display:
立即解锁一名随机的坦克型勇士并添加到阵型中，无法将其移除或移动。
无法使用其他坦克型勇士。
敌人的移动速度增加 300%，拥有 300% 额外生命值，并造成 300% 额外伤害。

restrictions.display: 在非首领关卡中，每波将额外随机刷新 1-3 个亡灵。它们不会掉落金币，也不计入任务进度。在首领关卡中，必须将一名额外的随机首领一并击败才能继续前进。只能使用智力大于等于 14 的勇士。

restrictions.display: 必须已完成“进入萨伽斯”

restrictions.original: Each time you encounter the portal in area 25 (and repeats of area 25 in 75, 125, 175, etc.) you are affected by a different elder rune, debuffing the party in some way for the next 50 areas. See the buffs area in the top-right corner of the game for further details on each debuff.
restrictions.display: 每次你在区域 25（以及后续的 75、125、175等）遭遇传送门时，将受到一个古代符文的影响，在接下来的 50 个区域中对队伍造成各种不同的减益效果。请参见游戏右上角的减益区域，进一步了解每个减益的详细效果。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "Enter the Sargauth"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“进入萨伽斯”

restrictions.original: All Champions in the even seats have disappeared. They probably abandoned you. Or maybe they are the sounds you hear from the shadows?
restrictions.display: 偶数栏位的所有勇士都消失了。他们大概是抛弃你了。也许你听到的那些暗影中的声音来自于他们？

Must have completed 40 Dragon Heist adventures or variants
restrictions.display:

必须已完成 40 次龙金之劫冒险或支线任务

restrictions.original:
All champions in the odd seats have disappeared. They're all out to get you.
Each wave spawns a Hallucination with 5 armored hits. They drop no gold, nor do they count towards quest progress.
restrictions.display:
奇数栏位的所有勇士都消失了。他们倾巢而出来对付你。
每一波会刷新一个带 5 点重甲生命值的幻象。它们不会掉落金币，也不计入任务进度。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "Enter the Sargauth"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“进入萨伽斯”

restrictions.original: A Monodrone and a Duodrone take up slots in the formation. They're interesting, but they don't do much else. Only Champions with CHA of 14 or lower can be used.
restrictions.display: 一个单元冢和一个二元冢会占据阵型中的格子。他们很有意思，但没什么别的意思。只能使用魅力小于等于 14 的勇士。

A Pixie in a Pear Treant joins the formation. They're so big they take up three spots in your formation, but don't do much else.
Only Champions with a CON of 12 or lower can be used.
restrictions.display:
梨树精里的皮克精将加入阵型。它太大了，占据了你阵型中的三个栏位，但除此之外就没什么作用了。
只能使用体质小于等于 12 的勇士。

restrictions.original: Armored abyssal chickens spawn in each area These chickens drop no gold and do not count towards quest progress Every 10 areas the number of abyssal chickens that spawn in each area increases by 1
restrictions.display: 每个区域会刷新重甲深渊鸡 这些鸡不会掉落金币也不计入任务进度 每经过 10 个区域，区域中刷新的深渊鸡数量增加 1

campaign.original: A Grand Tour of the Sword Coast

restrictions.original: Must have completed "Orcs Are Wild"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“狂野的兽人”

restrictions.original: Illusory dinosaurs spawn in each area. They drop no gold nor do they count towards quest progress. Champion's base attack cooldown is increased by 100%. Asharra, Azaka, Birdsong, and Jamilah each deal 400% more damage and are not affected by the base attack cooldown change.
restrictions.display: 每个区域会刷新幻象恐龙。它们不会掉落金币也不计入任务进度。勇士的基本攻击冷却时间增加 100%。艾萨拉、阿扎卡、鸟歌和嘉米拉造成 400% 额外伤害，且其基本攻击冷却时间不受影响。

campaign.original: A Grand Tour of the Sword Coast

restrictions.original:
Must have completed "Orcs Are Wild"
Must have completed 78 Grand Tour adventures or variants
restrictions.display:
必须已完成“狂野的兽人”
必须已完成 78 次剑湾之旅冒险或支线任务

restrictions.original: Moogin the Swarm of Quippers joins the formation. Only Champions next to Moogin can deal damage with normal attacks. This does not affect Ultimate attacks. Enemies have +4000% health, but take an additional 10% damage each time they take damage, applied multiplicably, up to a max of 40 stacks.
restrictions.display: 奇伯怪鱼群“木金”将加入阵型。只有与木金相邻的勇士可以通过普通攻击造成伤害。这不会影响杀招攻击。敌人的生命值 +4000%，但每次受到伤害时都会额外受到 10% 的伤害，以加算方式堆叠，最多可堆叠 40 层。

campaign.original: A Grand Tour of the Sword Coast

restrictions.original: Must have completed "Orcs Are Wild"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“狂野的兽人”

restrictions.original: No restrictions
restrictions.display: 无限制

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Bandit's Harvest (Pwent)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“强盗的收割（普旺特）”

restrictions.original: Extra strong Drow Cultists spawn in each area. The additional Drow cannot be damaged until they have been bled by Pwent. Pwent starts in the formation but can be moved or swapped out normally if you wish.
restrictions.display: 每个区域会刷新极其强大的卓尔精灵信徒。在由普旺特造成流血效果前，这些额外刷新的卓尔精灵不会受到伤害。普旺特初始位于阵型中，但可以将其移动或与其他勇士交换。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Bandit's Harvest (Pwent)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“强盗的收割（普旺特）”

restrictions.original: Cursed cows spawn in each area. If they hit a Champion, the Champion contracts a Curse. Cursed Champions deal no damage and have their max health reduced by 50%. Every 5 seconds the Curse spreads to adjacent Champions. It is only removed by changing areas.
restrictions.display: 每个区域会刷新被诅咒的奶牛。如果他们攻击了一名勇士，该勇士会被种下诅咒。被诅咒的勇士无法造成伤害，且最大生命值减少 50%。每隔 5 秒，诅咒会传染给相邻的勇士。只能通过改变区域来消除诅咒。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Bandit's Harvest (Pwent)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“强盗的收割（普旺特）”

restrictions.original: Pwent starts out in the formation and can not be moved, removed, or swapped out. Champions take damage equal to 20% of their maximum health every time they attack due to the poison. Pwent is immune to this poison.
restrictions.display: 普旺特初始位于阵型中且无法移动、移除或交换。勇士每次攻击时，将因为中毒而受到最大生命值 20% 的伤害。普旺特对此毒药免疫。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Bandit's Harvest (Pwent)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“强盗的收割（普旺特）”

restrictions.original: No restrictions
restrictions.display: 无限制

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Trickster's Delight (Avren)"
restrictions.display: 必须先完成“骗子的欢欣（阿夫伦）”

restrictions.original: Two costumed fans join the formation, ready to be Champions! Unfortunately they're not Champions, so they just take up space.
restrictions.display: 两个奇装异服的粉丝加入阵型，他们梦想成为勇士！不幸的是他们并非勇士，所以只是占用你的格子而已。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Trickster's Delight (Avren)"
restrictions.display: 必须先完成“骗子的欢欣（阿夫伦）”

restrictions.original: Each time you face the Masked Man, he has another trick up his sleeve. His attacks and strategy changes each time you engage him in combat.
restrictions.display: 你每次追上面具男时，他都能使出一种新招数。每次在战斗中遭遇他，他的攻击方式和策略都会变化。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Trickster's Delight (Avren)"
restrictions.display: 必须先完成“骗子的欢欣（阿夫伦）”

restrictions.original: One of Avren's cloning vats was stolen and corrupted. Avren starts in the formation and can not be moved or swapped. Every area a Zombie Avren appears. Its attacks increase the attack cooldown of Champions it hits. Zombie Avren can not be stopped. He ressurects after a brief period of time.
restrictions.display: 阿夫伦的其中一个克隆人被偷走并腐化了。阿夫伦初始位于阵型中且无法移动或交换。每个区域都会出现一个僵尸阿夫伦。它的攻击会增加被攻击者的攻击冷却时间。僵尸阿夫伦无法被彻底打倒。他会在短时间后复活。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Trickster's Delight (Avren)"
restrictions.display: 必须先完成“骗子的欢欣（阿夫伦）”

restrictions.original: No restrictions
restrictions.display: 无限制

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Crypt of Legends (Sentry)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“传说的墓穴（哨兵）”

restrictions.original: Enemies take less damage the longer they're alive This does not apply to hits-based or armor-based enemies
restrictions.display: 敌人存活的时间越长，受到的伤害越少 此效果对拥有基于命中次数或护甲次数生命值的敌人无效

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Crypt of Legends (Sentry)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“传说的墓穴（哨兵）”

restrictions.original: Sentry starts out in the formation and can not be moved or swapped out Two frightened villagers take up additional slots in the formation; they thought it would be exciting to do a patrol with the Champions... they thought wrong
restrictions.display: 哨兵初始位于阵型中且无法移动、移除或交换 两位受惊的村民会占据阵型中的额外格子；他们以为和勇士一起参加巡逻是件值得兴奋的事......但他们错了

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Crypt of Legends (Sentry)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“传说的墓穴（哨兵）”

restrictions.original: Enemies that are damaged but not killed have their speed and damage increased and heal a portion of their missing health
restrictions.display: 受到伤害但未被击杀的敌人将提升速度和伤害，且会回复部分失去的生命值

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Crypt of Legends (Sentry)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“传说的墓穴（哨兵）”

restrictions.original: No restrictions
restrictions.display: 无限制

restrictions.display: 必须已完成“观星节扫兴者（克鲁尔）”

restrictions.original: Two barrel wagons take up slots in your formation
restrictions.display: 两台载货的马车会占据你阵型中的格子

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Simril Spoilsport (Krull)" Costs 625 Candles to start
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“观星节扫兴者（克鲁尔）” 花费 625 根蜡烛开启

restrictions.original: Krull starts in your formation and can not be removed Non-Plagued enemies deal 100% more damage (additive) and move 10% faster (additive) for each enemy on the screen that doesn't have a Plague on them (including themselves)
restrictions.display: 克鲁尔初始在你的阵型中且无法移动 屏幕上每有一个未感染瘟疫的敌人，所有未感染瘟疫的敌人即增加 100% 伤害（以加算方式叠加）且移动速度增加 10%（以加算方式叠加）

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Simril Spoilsport (Krull)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“观星节扫兴者（克鲁尔）”

restrictions.original: Every 5 areas, the temperature drops by 5 degrees. For each change in temperature, the enemies get stronger, increasing their health and damage by 100%.
restrictions.display: 每经过 5 个区域，温度下降 5 度。每次发生温度变化，敌人都会变得更加强壮，其生命值和伤害提高 100%。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Simril Spoilsport (Krull)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“观星节扫兴者（克鲁尔）”

restrictions.original: No restrictions
restrictions.display: 无限制

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Merry Map Misadventure (Artemis)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“快乐地图灾祸（阿尔忒弥斯）”

restrictions.original:
Artemis begins in the formation and cannot be removed.
Champions (with the exception of Artemis) deal no damage, however Artemis's attack cooldown will complete when any DPS Champion attempts to attack.
Clicking does not deal damage during this adventure.
restrictions.display:
阿尔忒弥斯初始位于阵型中且无法被移除。
除阿尔忒弥斯外的勇士无法造成伤害，但如果任意伤害输出勇士试图发动攻击，阿尔忒弥斯的攻击冷却将完成。
在此冒险中，点击无法造成伤害。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Merry Map Misadventure (Artemis)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“快乐地图灾祸（阿尔忒弥斯）”

restrictions.original:
Only Champions with Strength of 12 or higher can be used.
Armored Mechanical Guards spawn in each area and attempt to wrestle away the map. Each Mechanical Guard immediately picks a random champion and stuns them until the Mechanical Guard is killed.
restrictions.display:
只能使用力量大于等于 12 的勇士。
重甲机械守卫会在每个区域刷新并尝试抢走地图。每个机械守卫会立即选择一名随机勇士并将其眩晕，直到该守卫被击杀。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Merry Map Misadventure (Artemis)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“快乐地图灾祸（阿尔忒弥斯）”

restrictions.original:
A really excited costumed fan joins the formation.
Every 50 areas, another huge fan takes up another slot in the formation.
restrictions.display:
一个奇装异服的粉丝非常兴奋地加入了阵型。
每经过 50 个区域，另一个超级粉丝会占据阵型中的另外一格。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Merry Map Misadventure (Artemis)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“快乐地图灾祸（阿尔忒弥斯）”

restrictions.original: No restrictions
restrictions.display: 无限制

restrictions.original: Champions devoured by the Devourer are devoured forever and can not be used again until you reset.
restrictions.display: 被吞噬者所吞噬的勇士将永远无法使用，直到你重置冒险。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "Deadwinter Day (Môrgæn)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“仲冬节（莫尔甘）”

restrictions.original: Only Champions in the first bench seat are initially available. Every 10 areas another bench seat unlocks.
restrictions.display: 初始只能使用第一个出战栏位的勇士。每经过 10 个区域，会解锁另一个出战栏位。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "Deadwinter Day (Môrgæn)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“仲冬节（莫尔甘）”

restrictions.original: Môrgæn starts in the formation and can not be removed or swapped out. Only Môrgæn and Champions buffed by Paid Up-Front can deal damage.
restrictions.display: 莫尔甘初始位于阵型中且无法移除或交换。只有莫尔甘和受到提前支付技能增益的勇士能造成伤害。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "Deadwinter Day (Môrgæn)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“仲冬节（莫尔甘）”

restrictions.original: No restrictions
restrictions.display: 无限制

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Missing Merchants (Havilar)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“失踪的商人（哈维拉）”

restrictions.original:
Havilar starts in the formation. She can be moved, but not removed.
Only every second bench slot can be used.
Farideh and Mehen can be used despite this restriction. They're odd, for sure, but they're family.
restrictions.display:
哈维拉初始位于阵型中。她可以被移动，但不能被移除。
只能使用偶数出战栏位的勇士。
法莉德和梅亨可无视此限制如常使用。他们确实很古怪，但他们是一家人。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Missing Merchants (Havilar)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“失踪的商人（哈维拉）”

restrictions.original: Diamond Golems attack the formation at random. They can not be damaged and must be tanked until the area is beaten.
restrictions.display: 钻石魔像会随机攻击阵型。它们不会受到伤害，在通关区域前必须一直由坦克勇士承担其伤害。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Missing Merchants (Havilar)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“失踪的商人（哈维拉）”

restrictions.original: Havilar starts in the formation and can not be swapped, moved, or removed from the formation. Half of the enemies that spawn in non-boss areas are replaced with random demons that have more health and move more quickly than normal monsters.
restrictions.display: 哈维拉初始位于阵型中且无法交换、移动或移除。首领区域中刷新的一半敌人被替换为随机恶魔。相较于普通怪物，它们拥有更多生命值且移动速度更快。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Missing Merchants (Havilar)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“失踪的商人（哈维拉）”

restrictions.original: No restrictions
restrictions.display: 无限制

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Unfair Sea (Sisaspia)" Costs 250 Fresh Fishes to start
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“不公平的海（西萨庇亚）” 花费 250 条鲜鱼开启

restrictions.original: Umberlee's curse has broken all shields and heavy armor, rendering tanking Champions useless! The shattered remnants have been stolen by some fiendish creatures and co-opted for their own nefarious use. Champions with the tanking role can not be used. Random enemies spawn with 5 armored hit points.
restrictions.display: 安博里的诅咒破除了所有护盾和重甲，使坦克型勇士变得毫无作用！破碎的护甲被一些炼狱生物偷走了，经过改良后供他们自己使用。不能使用具有坦克角色的勇士。会随机刷新拥有 5 点重甲生命值的敌人。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Unfair Sea (Sisaspia)" Costs 625 Fresh Fishes to start
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“不公平的海（西萨庇亚）” 花费 625 条鲜鱼开启

restrictions.original: A strange shipment takes up a slot in the formation. It's so distracting that Champions adjacent to the shipment deal no damage.
restrictions.display: 一车奇怪的货物会占据阵型中的一格。与它相邻的勇士需要分心看护这些货物，所以将无法造成伤害。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Unfair Sea (Sisaspia)" Costs 1250 Fresh Fishes to start
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“不公平的海（西萨庇亚）” 花费 1250 条鲜鱼开启

restrictions.original: Sisaspia starts out in the formation and can not be moved, removed, or swapped. Enemies move faster and deal more damage unless they are affected by Sisaspia's spores.
restrictions.display: 西萨庇亚初始位于阵型中且无法移动、移除或交换。在敌人受西萨庇亚的孢子影响前，他们的移动速度更快且造成更高伤害。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Unfair Sea (Sisaspia)" Costs up to 2500 Fresh Fishes to start
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“不公平的海（西萨庇亚）” 花费最多 2500 条鲜鱼开启

restrictions.original: No restrictions
restrictions.display: 无限制

restrictions.original: Must have completed "A Fool's Errand (Briv)" Costs 250 Pennants to start
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“愚人的差事（布里夫）” 花费 250 面锦旗开启

restrictions.original: Pixies spawn at random in all non-boss areas. When a Pixie spawns, it shrinks a random Champion by 33%, decreasing their damage done by 99%. This effect persists until the Pixie causing it is killed. This effect can stack if multiple Pixies target the same Champion.
restrictions.display: 皮克精会在所有非首领区域随机刷新。每当有皮克精刷新，它会将一名随机勇士的体型缩小 33%，使其造成的伤害降低 99%。造成该效果的皮克精被击杀前，此效果会持续存在。如果多个皮克精选中同一勇士为目标，此效果可以叠加。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "A Fool's Errand (Briv)" Costs 625 Pennants to start
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“愚人的差事（布里夫）” 花费 625 面锦旗开启

restrictions.original: Briv starts in the formation and can not be moved, removed, or swapped out. Normal enemies move 10x faster and attack 3x faster; bosses are unaffected.
restrictions.display: 布里夫初始位于阵型中且无法移动、移除或交换。普通敌人的移动速度加快 10 倍，攻击速度加快 3 倍；首领不受影响。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "A Fool's Errand (Briv)" Costs 1250 Pennants to start
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“愚人的差事（布里夫）” 花费 1250 面锦旗开启

restrictions.original: A cart of tasty pies, baguettes, and other baked snacks takes up slots in the formation; the cart has 100 hit points. Ravenous Crows and Famished Rats spawn randomly in each area. These additional creatures have 4 points of armored health. If, for whatever reason, the cart is smashed, you immediately lose the area and go back to the previous area.
restrictions.display: 一车美味的馅饼、法棍和其他烘焙零食占据了阵型中的格子；推车拥有 100 点生命值。每个区域会随机刷新饥饿的奶牛和挨饿的老鼠。这些额外的生物拥有 4 点重甲生命值。如果由于任意原因导致推车被摧毁，你在该区域将立即团灭并返回前一个区域。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "A Fool's Errand (Briv)" Costs up to 2500 Pennants to start
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“愚人的差事（布里夫）” 花费最多 2500 面锦旗开启

restrictions.original: No restrictions
restrictions.display: 无限制

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Endless War (Melf)" Costs 250 Bouquets to start
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“无止境的战争（马友夫）” 花费 250 个花束开启

restrictions.original: Each Champion can only be used to beat 50 unique areas A Champion counts as being "used" in an area if they're in the formation at any time during the attempt that beats an area for the first time After a Champion has been used while beating 50 unique areas, they can not be used in the formation anymore
restrictions.display: 每位勇士只能用于通关 50 个不重复的区域。只要在首次通关该区域的任意时间内存在于阵型中，该勇士就会被视为“已使用”。在使用该勇士通关 50 个不重复的区域后，将无法继续在阵型中使用这名勇士

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Endless War (Melf)" Costs 625 Bouquets to start
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“无止境的战争（马友夫）” 花费 625 个花束开启

restrictions.original: Only Champions with Intelligence of 13 or higher can be used
restrictions.display: 只能使用智力大于等于 13 的勇士。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Endless War (Melf)" Costs 1250 Bouquets to start
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“无止境的战争（马友夫）” 花费 1250 个花束开启

restrictions.original: Melf starts out in the formation with Melf's Righteous Determination unlocked. Melf can not be removed from the formation or swapped out. Only enemies Melf deems to be Evil can be damaged.
restrictions.display: 马友夫初始位于阵型中，且马友夫的正义决心已解锁。马友夫无法从阵型中移除或交换。只有被马友夫认定为邪恶的敌人会受到伤害。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Endless War (Melf)" Costs up to 2500 Bouquets to start
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“无止境的战争（马友夫）” 花费最多 2500 个花束开启

restrictions.original: No restrictions
restrictions.display: 无限制

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Grandfather Acorn (Krydle)" Costs 250 Leaves to start
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“祖父橡果（克莱达）” 花费 250 片树叶开启

restrictions.original: A Champion can not be placed adjacent to any other Champion
restrictions.display: 任何勇士都无法放置在与其他勇士相邻的位置上

name.original: The Early Bird Gets The Acorn

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Grandfather Acorn (Krydle)" Costs 625 Leaves to start
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“祖父橡果（克莱达）” 花费 625 片树叶开启

restrictions.original: Only Champions in seats 1-7 can be used
restrictions.display: 只能使用出战栏位 1-7 的勇士

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Grandfather Acorn (Krydle)" Costs 1250 Leaves to start
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“祖父橡果（克莱达）” 花费 1250 片树叶开启

restrictions.original: Krydle starts out in the formation and can not be moved, removed, or swapped out Only Champions with a CHA score of 15+ can be used
restrictions.display: 克莱达初始位于阵型中且无法移动、移除或交换。只能使用魅力值为 15+ 的勇士

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Grandfather Acorn (Krydle)" Costs up to 2500 Leaves to start
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“祖父橡果（克莱达）” 花费最多 2500 片树叶开启

restrictions.original: No restrictions
restrictions.display: 无限制

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Mechanical Menace (Jaheira)" Costs 250 Rusted Gears to start
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“机械威胁（贾希拉）” 花费 250 个锈蚀的零件开启

restrictions.original: Jaheira starts in your formation in slot 3. She can't be moved. Ravens appear in each area. Whenever any raven dies, 1-2 more spawn. Ravens do not drop gold, nor do they count towards quest progress.
restrictions.display: 贾希拉初始位于你阵型中的第 3 栏。她无法被移动。渡鸦会在每个区域中出现。每当有渡鸦死亡，会额外刷新 1-2 只。渡鸦不会掉落金币，也不计入任务进度。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Mechanical Menace (Jaheira)" Costs 625 Rusted Gears to start
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“机械威胁（贾希拉）” 花费 625 个锈蚀的零件开启

restrictions.original: Nordom joins the cause! He takes up slot 5 in your formation and is intent on helping Waterdeep with his lightning crossbow bolts. Instead of stunning the constructs, Nordom's lightning bolt accidentally empowers them! He attacks every 4 seconds and targets the furthest enemy. Any construct that is hit by Nordom's bolt increases its speed by 4x and increases its attack damage by 400% until it is destroyed.
restrictions.display: 诺顿将加入战斗！他会占据阵型中的第 5 栏，且愿意用他的闪电十字弩来帮助深水城。诺顿的闪电束不会眩晕构装生物，而是意外地会强化敌人！他每 4 秒发动攻击，只会选择距离最远的敌人。构装生物被诺顿的弩箭射中后，移动速度会提高 4 倍，攻击伤害提高 400%，直至被消灭为止。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Mechanical Menace (Jaheira)" Costs 1250 Rusted Gears to start
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“机械威胁（贾希拉）” 花费 1250 个锈蚀的零件开启

restrictions.original: In each area, a 3 armored HP Abyssal Chicken spawns after 10 enemies. Abyssal Chickens drop no gold and do not count towards quest progress. After every 10 areas, the number of Abyssal Chickens that spawn is increased by 1. The number of Abyssal Chickens spawned caps at 50.
restrictions.display: 在每个区域，刷新 10 名敌人后，会出现一只拥有 3 点重甲生命值的深渊鸡。深渊鸡不会掉落金币也不计入任务进度。每经过 10 个区域，刷新的深渊鸡数量增加 1。刷新的深渊鸡数量上限为 50。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Mechanical Menace (Jaheira)" Costs up to 2500 Rusted Gears to start
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“机械威胁（贾希拉）” 花费最多 2500 个锈蚀的零件开启

restrictions.original: No restrictions
restrictions.display: 无限制

restrictions.original: Must have completed "Let Sleeping Dragons Lie (Nova)" Costs 250 Dragon Claws to start
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“放倒沉睡巨龙（诺娃）” 花费 250 个龙爪开启

restrictions.original: Only Champions with WIS 14 or lower can be used. Whenever an enemy spawns, there is a 25% chance that it will be an illusory enemy, and won't count towards quest progress or drop gold. When an illusory enemy is killed with a normal attack, the Champion that killed the enemy is stunned for 10 seconds.
restrictions.display: 只能使用感知小于等于 14 的勇士。每个刷新的敌人有 25% 几率变为幻象敌人，不会计入任务进度或掉落金币。当幻象敌人被普通攻击击杀时，击杀该敌人的勇士会被眩晕 10 秒。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "Let Sleeping Dragons Lie (Nova)" Costs 625 Dragon Claws to start
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“放倒沉睡巨龙（诺娃）” 花费 625 个龙爪开启

restrictions.original: Two of the slots in your formation are affected by a magical spell that's causing folks around Luskan to start snoring! The affected slots change every 15 seconds by moving to a random adjacent slot. Champions in affected slots must concentrate on not falling asleep, so they do not attack and Ultimates are disabled.
restrictions.display: 你阵型中的两格受到一个魔法咒语影响，导致路斯坎周围的人开始打呼噜！魔法咒语每 15 秒回转移到相邻的随机格子，处于受影响格子内的勇士必须努力与睡意抗争，因此他们无法发起攻击与使用杀招。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "Let Sleeping Dragons Lie (Nova)" Costs 1250 Dragon Claws to start
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“放倒沉睡巨龙（诺娃）” 花费 1250 个龙爪开启

restrictions.original: Only Champions with INT 14 or higher can be used. Nova begins in the formation and can't be moved. Dolgrims appear at a rate of 2 per wave. They drop no gold and do not count towards quest progress. Dolgrims movement speed is doubled and their damage is increased by 400%.
restrictions.display: 只能使用智力大于等于 14 的勇士。诺娃初始位于阵型中且无法移动。每波敌人中会出现 2 个多尔格里姆。他们不会掉落金币也不计入任务进度。多尔格里姆的移动速度加倍，伤害提高 400%。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "Let Sleeping Dragons Lie (Nova)" Costs up to 2500 Dragon Claws to start
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“放倒沉睡巨龙（诺娃）” 花费最多 2500 个龙爪开启

restrictions.original: No restrictions
restrictions.display: 无限制

restrictions.original: Must have completed "Party Crashers (Freely)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“不速之客（弗里）”

restrictions.original: Only Champions with INT 12 or lower can be used.
restrictions.display: 只能使用智力小于等于 12 的勇士。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "Party Crashers (Freely)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“不速之客（弗里）”

restrictions.original: Whenever a demon or fiend spawns normally, two additional copies of that creature spawn. These additional creatures move twice as fast as normal, but don't drop gold or credit quest progress.
restrictions.display: 每当有恶魔或炼狱生物正常刷新时，会额外刷新该生物的两个复制体。这些复制体的移动速度加倍，但不会掉落金币，也不计入任务进度。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "Party Crashers (Freely)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“不速之客（弗里）”

restrictions.original: Freely starts out in the formation with Luck of Yondalla unlocked and can not be moved or removed. Champions placed adjacent to Freely automatically get Luck of Yondalla. Only enemies who are affected by at least one Lucky Break can be damaged.
restrictions.display: 弗里初始位于阵型中并解锁悠达拉好运，但无法移动或移除。与弗里相邻的勇士自动获得悠达拉好运。只有受到至少一层时来运转影响的敌人会受到伤害。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "Party Crashers (Freely)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“不速之客（弗里）”

restrictions.original: No restrictions
restrictions.display: 无限制

name.display: 阿瓦伊斯的下一个陷阱

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Missing Lord (Beadle)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“失踪的领主（比德尔）”

restrictions.original:
Beadle starts in the formation. He can be moved, but not removed.
Only Champions within 2 slots of Beadle can deal damage.
Various creatures attack your formation, each with different abilities. See the buff icon for details.
Getting to Know Beadle: Beadle's In The Shadows ability buffs the damage of Champions within two slots of him.
restrictions.display:
比德尔初始位于阵型中。他可以被移动，但不能被移除。
只有在比德尔 2 格范围内的勇士能造成伤害。
各种生物会攻击你的阵型，其各自拥有不同技能。请查看增益图标了解详情。
了解比德尔：比德尔的“身处暗影”技能会提高距离他两格以内的勇士的伤害。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Missing Lord (Beadle)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“失踪的领主（比德尔）”

restrictions.original:
Beadle takes up a slot in your formation. Only Champions with DEX of 14 or higher can be used.
Getting to Know Beadle (& Grimm!): While Grimm wouldn't normally be eligible for this adventure due to his low Dexterity, he can still be added to the formation due to the two of them being Inseparable.
restrictions.display:
比德尔会占据你阵型中的一格。只能使用敏捷大于等于 14 的勇士。
了解比德尔（和格林！）：尽管由于敏捷较低，格林正常来说是不符合此冒险的条件的，但由于他们俩是密不可分的关系，因此他依然可以加入阵型。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Missing Lord (Beadle)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“失踪的领主（比德尔）”

restrictions.original:
Beadle starts in the formation. He can be moved, but not removed.
Other than Beadle & Grimm, you may only use Champions that have at least one piece of Epic rarity, Shiny, or Golden equipment.
Enemies have 300% more health and attack twice as often.
Getting to know Beadle: Beadle's specialization choice improves his buffs based on the gear your Champions have. Choose the best specialization for your formation!
restrictions.display:
比德尔初始位于阵型中。他可以被移动，但不能被移除。
除了比德尔和格林，你只能使用至少拥有一件史诗稀有度、闪亮或金色品质装备的勇士。
敌人拥有 300% 额外生命值，且攻击速度加倍。
了解比德尔：比德尔的专精选择会根据你勇士拥有的装备提高他的增益。选择最适合你阵型的专精吧！

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Missing Lord (Beadle)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“失踪的领主（比德尔）”

restrictions.original: No restrictions
restrictions.display: 无限制

restrictions.original: Must have completed "Reclaiming the Past (Omin)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“重拾过去（欧敏）”

restrictions.original:
- A masked lord takes up a slot in your formation. Others join the formation periodically until area 601. 
 Starting in area 601, the lords provide a global damage buff to your formation that starts at 20% and increases by 20% (multiplicatively) in each additional area.
restrictions.display:
- 一位蒙面领主会占据你阵型中的一格。其他人会定期加入你的阵型，直到区域 601。
从区域 601 起，领主会为你的阵型提供一个整体伤害增益，起始为 20%，每额外前进一个区域增加 20%（乘算）。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "Reclaiming the Past (Omin)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“重拾过去（欧敏）”

restrictions.original: Only Champions with a CON score of 14 or higher, or an associate of Omin, can be used. Associates of Omin include Champions with the Acquisition Incorporated or "C" Team affiliation.
restrictions.display: 只能使用体质大于等于 14 的勇士或欧敏的同伴。欧敏的同伴包括艾奎兹玄有限公司和 C 小队的勇士。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "Reclaiming the Past (Omin)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“重拾过去（欧敏）”

restrictions.original: Omin begins in the formation and can not be moved or removed. Whenever a Champion kills a non-boss enemy, the base attack cooldown of Champions adjacent to them is reduced for their next attack. Whenever a Champion attacks but does not kill a non-boss enemy, that enemy moves faster and deals more damage. This effect can stack.
restrictions.display: 欧敏初始位于阵型中且无法移动或移除。每当有勇士击杀非首领敌人时，与之相邻的勇士下一次攻击的基本攻击冷却时间会降低。每当有勇士攻击但并未击杀非首领敌人时，该敌人的移动速度加快且会造成更高伤害。此效果可以叠加。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "Reclaiming the Past (Omin)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“重拾过去（欧敏）”

restrictions.original: No restrictions
restrictions.display: 无限制

restrictions.original: Must have completed "Brightly into Darkness (Lazaapz)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“光明踏入黑暗（拉扎普）”

restrictions.original: Additional Drow Fighters spawn in each wave. Whenever you kill any drow enemy, Lolth grows angry and tracks your transgressions. For every drow killed during this adventure, the damage and movement speed of every other drow enemy goes up by 0.1% (additively)
restrictions.display: 每一波会刷新额外的卓尔精灵战士。每当你击杀任意卓尔精灵敌人，罗丝的怒气会增长并记录你的罪行。在本次冒险中每击杀一个卓尔精灵，其他卓尔精灵敌人的伤害和移动速度会增加 0.1%（以加算方式叠加）

restrictions.original: Must have completed "Brightly into Darkness (Lazaapz)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“光明踏入黑暗（拉扎普）”

restrictions.original: Only Champions with INT 14 or lower, plus Lazaapz, can be used.
restrictions.display: 只能使用智力小于等于 14 的勇士和拉扎普。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "Brightly into Darkness (Lazaapz)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“光明踏入黑暗（拉扎普）”

restrictions.original:
A roving band of Ogres have joined the enemies waves during this adventure! Let's show 'em what Lazaapz and her crew can do!
Lazaapz starts in the formation. She cannot be moved, removed, or swapped. All enemies have their damage and movement speed increased by 100% for each Ogre Battering Ram on screen (additive). Champions in the two columns behind Lazaapz become part of her posse. Everyone's smaller than an ogre, right?
restrictions.display:
在本次冒险中，一群流浪的食人魔加入了敌人队伍。让他们看看拉扎普和她队员们的能耐吧！
拉扎普初始位于阵型中。她无法被移动、移除或交换。屏幕上每存在一个攻城锤食人魔，所有敌人的伤害和移动速度提高 100%（加算）。处于拉扎普后方两列的勇士将成为她的同伙。人人都比食人魔矮，对吧？

restrictions.original: Must have completed "Brightly into Darkness (Lazaapz)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“光明踏入黑暗（拉扎普）”

restrictions.original: No restrictions
restrictions.display: 无限制

campaign.display: 博德之门：坠入阿弗纳斯

restrictions.original: Must have completed "A Tale of Two Cities"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“双城传说”

restrictions.original: Two fiends take up slots in the formation. Fiend enemies move quicker and deal more damage to your party.
restrictions.display: 两个炼狱生物会占据阵型中的格子。炼狱生物敌人的移动速度更快，且对你的队伍造成更高伤害。

campaign.display: 博德之门：坠入阿弗纳斯

restrictions.original: Must have completed "A Tale of Two Cities" Must have completed 4 Descent into Avernus adventures or variants
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“双城传说” 必须已完成 4 次坠入阿弗纳斯冒险或支线任务

restrictions.original: You can only field two Champions at a time.
restrictions.display: 你只能同时部署 2 名勇士。

campaign.display: 博德之门：坠入阿弗纳斯

restrictions.original:
Must have completed "A Tale of Two Cities" 
Must have completed 13 Descent into Avernus adventures or variants
restrictions.display:
必须已完成“双城传说”
必须已完成 13 次坠入阿弗纳斯冒险或支线任务

restrictions.original: Only Event Champions from Year Two can be used.
restrictions.display: 只能使用来自第二年的活动勇士。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "A Tale of Two Cities"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“双城传说”

restrictions.original: No restrictions
restrictions.display: 无限制

campaign.display: 博德之门：坠入阿弗纳斯

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Dead Three"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“死亡三神”

restrictions.original: Only Champions with a base attack cooldown of 5 seconds or higher can be used.
restrictions.display: 只能使用基本攻击冷却时间大于等于 5 秒的勇士。

campaign.display: 博德之门：坠入阿弗纳斯

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Dead Three" Must have completed 5 Descent into Avernus adventures or variants
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“死亡三神” 必须已完成 5 次坠入阿弗纳斯冒险或支线任务

restrictions.original: Minsc starts out in the formation and can not be removed or swapped out. Champions can only be placed adjacent to Minsc. When Minsc is moved, any Champions that are not adjacent to him after the move will be removed from the formation.
restrictions.display: 明斯克初始位于阵型中且无法移除或交换。其他勇士只能放置在与明斯克相邻的位置上。移动明斯克时，所有在移动后未与他相邻的勇士都会从阵型中移除。

campaign.display: 博德之门：坠入阿弗纳斯

restrictions.original:
Must have completed "The Dead Three" 
Must have completed 14 Descent into Avernus adventures or variants
restrictions.display:
必须已完成“死亡三神”
必须已完成 14 次坠入阿弗纳斯冒险或支线任务

Earthquakes cause a screenshake and cause falling pieces of the city hit the Champions, dealing damage equal to 75% of their max health (subject to a DEX save). The earthquake also triggers the following effects to occur for 15 seconds: - All Champion damage is disabled - Enemies speed increased by 200% - Enemies deal 400% more damage.
restrictions.display: 只能使用敏捷大于等于 14 的勇士。每隔 20-120 秒发生一次地震。地震会导致屏幕震动，从城市中掉落的瓦砾会击中勇士，造成等同于其最大生命值 75% 的伤害（可通过敏捷检定豁免）。地震还会触发以下效果，持续 15 秒：- 所有勇士的伤害无效 - 敌人的移动速度提高 200% - 敌人造成 400% 额外伤害。

Champions with a blood drain debuff lose 5% of their max HP every second. Blood drain debuffs are removed when you change areas or kill Ireena.

restrictions.original: No favor bonus or favor reward. Areas get harder much much more quickly. Click damage is reduced to 0 after area 5 and fire breath potions can not be used. Once a Champion is placed in the formation they can not be swapped or removed. In areas 13, 27, and 37, 60% of the Champions in your active formation are removed from your party and locked for the remainder of the adventure(chosen at random).
restrictions.display: 没有恩赐奖励或恩赐加成。区域会更快变难。在通过区域 5 后，点击伤害将为 0 且火息药剂无法使用。在阵型中放置勇士后，不能替换或撤下。在区域 13、27 和 37，当前阵型中 60% 的勇士将被从队伍中移除，且在剩余冒险中被锁定（随机选择）。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "Split The Party 2" Must have at least four Champions in every bench seat
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“分散队伍 2” 每个出战栏位必须至少有四名勇士

restrictions.original: No favor bonus or favor reward. Areas get harder much much much more quickly. Click damage is reduced to 0 after area 5 and fire breath potions can not be used. Once a Champion is placed in the formation they can not be swapped or removed. In areas 13, 27, and 37, 70% of the Champions in your active formation are removed from your party and locked for the remainder of the adventure(chosen at random).
restrictions.display: 没有恩赐奖励或恩赐加成。区域会更快变难。在通过区域 5 后，点击伤害将为 0 且火息药剂无法使用。在阵型中放置勇士后，不能替换或撤下。在区域 13、27 和 37，当前阵型中 70% 的勇士将被从队伍中移除，且在剩余冒险中被锁定（随机选择）。

restrictions.original: Whenever you change perspective between Seadeeps and Alterdeep (Areas 1, 21, & 41) the party is affected by a different Elder Rune. The bane effect of the Elder Rune will persist until you change perspective again.
restrictions.display: 每当你在深海和变幻深渊之间切换视角时（区域 1、21 及 41），队伍会被不同的古代符文影响。古代符文的灾祸效果会持续到你再次切换视角为止。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "Alterdeep"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“变幻深渊”

restrictions.original: Generally only Champions with a magic base attack can be used, but a few extra helping hands tag along as well. In each non-boss area, enemies from a different faction attack. The faction members will not count toward quest progress, nor will they drop gold. Each faction also has a unique boon granted by Halaster which will be active for the entire area.
restrictions.display: 几乎只能使用以魔法为基本攻击方式的勇士，但你还是能带上几个小帮手。在每个非首领区域，都会有来自不同阵营的敌人发起进攻。阵营成员不计入任务进度，也不会掉落金币。每个阵营还会获得来自海拉斯特的独特恩赐，在整个区域中生效。

name.display: 乌尔科莉亚逃离变幻深渊

restrictions.display:
必须已完成“变幻深渊”
必须已完成 75 次龙金之劫冒险或支线任务

restrictions.original:
Every 50 areas, the champion with the lowest Intelligence is captured by mind flayers and removed from the formation. They cannot be added back for the duration of the adventure.
Ulkoria joins the formation in slot 3. She can be moved, but not removed or swapped out, and she will never be taken away by mind flayers.
You may only use Champions with a magical base attack.
Champions can't be removed from the formation once they have been added.
Fire breath potions can't be used during the adventure, and click damage has no effect after area 100.
restrictions.display:
每经过 50 个区域，智力数值最低的勇士会被夺心魔俘虏，并从阵型中移除。在冒险期间，他们无法回归阵型。
乌尔科莉亚加入阵型并处于 3 号位。她可以被移动，但不能被移除或替换，并且永远不会被夺心魔俘虏。
你只能使用拥有魔法基本攻击的勇士。
勇士一旦加入阵型，将无法被移除。
此冒险不能使用火息药剂，且区域 100 后点击伤害失效。

restrictions.original: Bel's Forge was built into an active volcano. As such, the formation is taking a bit of heat while adventuring. Every 3 seconds, each Champion takes 10% of their max health as damage. Whenever a Champion's health is below 50% of their max health, their damage is reduced by 99%.
restrictions.display: 拜尔的熔炉建在一座活火山里。因为如此，勇士们的冒险之旅会变得酷热难当。每隔 3 秒，所有勇士受到自身最大生命值 10% 的伤害。生命值低于 50% 的勇士造成的伤害将降低 99%。

restrictions.original: In each non-boss area, one Lesser Fire Elemental appears with each wave. They do not count towards quest progress, nor do they drop gold. The Elemental's movement is 300% faster. If the Elemental hits with an attack, it explodes and all champions lose 20% of their max HP. In each boss area a Cultist of Zariel appears. You must defeat this additional boss to advance. Only champions with STR of 10 or higher and CHA of 13 or higher can be used.
restrictions.display: 在每个非首领区域，每波会出现一个小型火元素。它们不计入任务进度，也不会掉落金币。火元素的移动速度提升 300%。在击中勇士后，火元素会炸开并使所有勇士损失 20% 最大生命值。在每个首领区域都会出现一名扎瑞尔的信徒。你必须击败此额外首领才能继续前进。只能使用力量大于等于 10 和魅力大于等于 13 的勇士。

每 10 秒，一个随机阵型栏位起火 10 秒，每秒对占据该栏位的任意勇士造成伤害，数值相当于其最大生命值的 10%。

Skeletons spawn randomly with each enemy wave. These extra skeleton enemies deal 300% more damage, do not drop gold, and do not count towards quests.

These enemies don't count toward quest progress, nor do they drop any gold. They are intent on recapturing Ireena for their master.
