restrictions.original:
Must have completed "The Everlasting Rime"
Must have complete 14 Icewind Dale: Rime of the Frostmaiden adventures or variants
restrictions.display:
必须已完成“永恒的白霜”
必须已完成 14 次冰风谷：冰霜少女的白霜冒险或支线任务

restrictions.original: A random Human Champion is immediately unlocked, added to the formation, and can't be removed. Other Human Champions cannot be used. In each area, enemies move 2% faster and deal 4% more damage, stacking additively.
restrictions.display: 立即解锁一名随机的人类勇士并添加到阵型中，无法将其移除。不能使用其他人类勇士。在每个区域中，敌人的移动速度提高 2%，额外造成 4% 的伤害，以加算方式堆叠。

campaign.original: Icewind Dale: Rime of the Frostmaiden
campaign.display: 冰风谷：冰霜少女的白霜

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Everlasting Rime"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“永恒的白霜”

restrictions.original: No restrictions
restrictions.display: 无限制

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Bandit's Harvest (Torogar)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“强盗的收割（托罗加）”

restrictions.original:
-Two abyssal chickens start in slots in the formation.
- Additional Chickens join in the following areas:
	- Area 51: Slot 5
	- Area 151: Slot 6
	- Area 351: Slot 7
restrictions.display:
两只深渊鸡初始占据阵型中的格子。
- 更多深渊鸡会在以下区域加入：
	- 区域 51：栏位 5
	- 区域 151：栏位 6
	- 区域 351：栏位 7

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Bandit's Harvest (Torogar)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“强盗的收割（托罗加）”

restrictions.original: Only Champions with a CON score of 14 or higher can be used. The Resurrected Hero of the Vale appears in area 25 as an additional boss.
restrictions.display: 只能使用体质大于等于 14 的勇士。复活的谷地英雄会在区域 25 作为额外首领出现。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Bandit's Harvest (Torogar)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“强盗的收割（托罗加）”

restrictions.original: Torogar and Arkhan start in the formation and can not be moved or swapped out. Only members of The Dark Order (Torogar, Arkhan, and Krull) can deal damage. All other Champions have their DPS disabled, but can still contribute formation abilities.
restrictions.display: 托罗加和阿克汉初始位于阵型中且无法移动或交换。只有黑暗教团的成员（托罗加、阿克汉和克鲁尔）能造成伤害。其他所有勇士将无法造成伤害，但仍可以贡献阵型技能。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Bandit's Harvest (Torogar)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“强盗的收割（托罗加）”

restrictions.original: No restrictions
restrictions.display: 无限制

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Trickster's Delight (Ezmerelda)"
restrictions.display: 必须先完成“骗子的欢欣（艾丝美拉达）”

restrictions.original: Strahd von Zarovich sent his Zombies to follow Ezmerelda from Barovia. Strahd Zombies appear in each wave. These Zombies deal 100% additional damage, do not drop gold, and do not count towards quest progress.
restrictions.display: 斯特拉德·冯·扎罗维奇派遣他的僵尸，从巴洛维亚跟踪艾丝美拉达。每一波都会出现斯特拉德僵尸。这些僵尸造成 100% 额外伤害，不会掉落金币，也不计入任务进度。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Trickster's Delight (Ezmerelda)"
restrictions.display: 必须先完成“骗子的欢欣（艾丝美拉达）”

restrictions.original: The mists of Ravenloft encroach upon us, making it harder for the Champions to see. Enemies move 100% faster and drop 99% less gold.
restrictions.display: 鸦阁魔域的迷雾笼罩着我们，勇士队伍的视野非常糟糕。敌人的移动速度提高 100% 且掉落的金币减少 99%。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Trickster's Delight (Ezmerelda)"
restrictions.display: 必须先完成“骗子的欢欣（艾丝美拉达）”

restrictions.original: Ezmerelda starts in the formation and can't move. Only Champions in Ezmerelda's column can deal damage. All other Champions have their DPS disabled, but their formation abilities are active. Vampire Spawn appear in each wave. They deal 100% additional damage. They do not drop gold, nor do they count towards quest progress. This adventure has unique dialogue.
restrictions.display: 艾丝美拉达初始位于阵型中且无法移动。只有与艾丝美拉达同列的勇士能造成伤害。其他所有勇士将无法造成伤害，但他们的阵型技能仍然生效。吸血鬼衍体会在每一波中出现。它们造成 100% 额外伤害。它们不会掉落金币，也不计入任务进度。此冒险包含独特对话。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Trickster's Delight (Ezmerelda)"
restrictions.display: 必须先完成“骗子的欢欣（艾丝美拉达）”

restrictions.original: No restrictions
restrictions.display: 无限制

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Crypt of Legends (Penelope)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“传说的墓穴（佩内洛普）”。

restrictions.original: Grave Robbers spawn in each area While any Grave Robber remains alive, undead creatures move faster and deal more damage
restrictions.display: 盗墓者在每个区域刷新 只要有盗墓者存活，亡灵生物的移动速度加快且造成更高伤害

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Crypt of Legends (Penelope)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“传说的墓穴（佩内洛普）”。

restrictions.original: Awakened Cleaning Supplies spawn with each wave These magical cleaning supplies deal more damage and have hits-based health. Penelope can one-shot the cleaning supplies, and thus starts in the formation to help out (she can't be removed)
restrictions.display: 被唤醒的清洁工具会随每一波刷新 这些魔法清洁工具造成更高伤害且拥有基于命中次数的生命值 佩内洛普可以对清洁工具一击必杀，因此她会初始位于阵型中帮忙（无法被移除）

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Crypt of Legends (Penelope)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“传说的墓穴（佩内洛普）”。

restrictions.original: Penelope starts in the formation and can not be moved or removed. Penelope attacks a bit faster because she's very excited to make new friends. Only Good Champions can be used.
restrictions.display: 佩内洛普初始位于阵型中且无法移动或移除 佩内洛普的攻击速度稍微加快，因为她对于交到新朋友感到非常兴奋 只能使用善良阵营的勇士

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Crypt of Legends (Penelope)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“传说的墓穴（佩内洛普）”。

restrictions.original: No restrictions
restrictions.display: 无限制

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Simril Spoilsport (Lucius)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“观星节扫兴者（卢修斯）”

restrictions.original: Only Champions with a CHA score of 14 or higher can be used. Quest goals are doubled.
restrictions.display: 只能使用魅力大于等于 14 的勇士。任务目标翻倍。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Simril Spoilsport (Lucius)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“观星节扫兴者（卢修斯）”

restrictions.original: Lucius starts in the formation (slot 5) and cannot be moved. Lucius is the only Champion that can deal damage. All other Champions have their DPS disabled, but their formation abilities are active. Lucius' attacks twice as fast as normal and his Ultimate cooldown is reduced to 30 seconds. In each area, a cursed cow appears; if the cursed cow attacks a Champion, that Champion becomes cursed, disabling all of its upgrades until you change areas.
restrictions.display: 卢修斯初始位于阵型中（栏位 5）且无法移动。卢修斯是唯一能造成伤害的勇士。其他所有勇士将无法造成伤害，但他们的阵型技能仍然生效。卢修斯的攻击速度加倍，他的杀招冷却时间减少至 30 秒。每个区域会出现一头被诅咒的奶牛；如果被诅咒的奶牛攻击到勇士，该勇士也会被诅咒，在改变区域前禁用其所有进阶效果。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Simril Spoilsport (Lucius)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“观星节扫兴者（卢修斯）”

restrictions.original: Nat, Jenks, and Squiddly join the Champions for their first Simril outside of Waterdeep! They each take up a slot in the formation. Lesser Gibbering Mouthers appear in each area, and move 100% faster (as nightmares do).
restrictions.display: 纳特、詹克斯和斯奎加入勇士队伍，首次在深水城外度过观星节！他们会各自占据阵型中的一格。小型惧噬体会出现在每个区域，且移动速度加快 100%（就像梦魇一样）。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Simril Spoilsport (Lucius)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“观星节扫兴者（卢修斯）”

restrictions.original: No restrictions
restrictions.display: 无限制

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Merry Map Misadventure (Baeloth)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“快乐地图灾祸（贝洛斯）”

restrictions.original: Only Champions with INT and WIS of 11 or higher can be used Baeloth starts in the formation but he can be moved or benched.
restrictions.display: 只能使用智力和感知大于等于 11 的勇士 贝洛斯初始位于阵型中但可以移动或收回出战栏位。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Merry Map Misadventure (Baeloth)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“快乐地图灾祸（贝洛斯）”

restrictions.original: The streets of waterdeep have been overrun by deadly giant rats from avernus! All beast enemies in the adventure have been replaced by Abyssal Rats throughout the adventure. Additional Abyssal Rats spawn in each area. Abyssal Rats start out by dealing 100% additional damage, but each time an Abyssal Rat attacks a Champion, the damage of all enemies increases by 10%.
restrictions.display: 深水城的街道被来自阿弗纳斯的致命巨鼠淹没了！整个冒险中的所有兽类敌人被深渊老鼠替代。每个区域会刷新额外的深渊老鼠。深渊老鼠初始造成 100% 额外伤害，但深渊老鼠每次攻击一位勇士后，所有敌人的伤害提高 10%。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Merry Map Misadventure (Baeloth)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“快乐地图灾祸（贝洛斯）”

restrictions.original: Baeloth starts in the formation and cannot be moved. An Ogre, a Shambling Mound and a Fire Elemental appear in each area. While they are alive, they each grant a unique buff to the enemies. - Ogre: Enemies can only be damaged by Champions with Magical or Ranged base attacks. - Shambling Mound: Enemies deal 100% additional damage. - Fire Elemental: Enemies move 100% faster. This adventure contains unique dialogue.
restrictions.display: 贝洛斯初始位于阵型中且无法移动。一个食人魔、一个蔓生怪和一个火元素会出现在每个区域。它们存活时，会各自为敌人提供一个独特的增益。 - 食人魔：敌人只会被拥有魔法或远程基本攻击的勇士所伤害。 - 蔓生怪：敌人造成 100% 额外伤害。 - 火元素：敌人的移动速度提高 100%。此冒险包含独特对话。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Merry Map Misadventure (Baeloth)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“快乐地图灾祸（贝洛斯）”

restrictions.original: No restrictions
restrictions.display: 无限制

restrictions.original: Must have completed "Deadwinter Day (Talin)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“仲冬节（塔林）”

restrictions.original: A collection of fiends spawn in each area. While they are alive, the fiends bestow the following buffs to other enemies. - Imp: Enemies drop 99% less gold. - Dretch: Enemies deal 100% additional damage. - Abyssal Chicken: Enemies move 100% faster. Charge!
restrictions.display: 每个区域都会刷新几只炼狱生物。当它们存活时，这些炼狱生物会为其他敌人提供以下增益。 - 小魔鬼：敌人掉落的金币减少 99%。 - 怯魔：敌人造成 100% 额外伤害。 - 深渊鸡：敌人的移动速度提高 100%。冲锋！

restrictions.original: Must have completed "Deadwinter Day (Talin)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“仲冬节（塔林）”

restrictions.original: Only Champions with WIS 13 or higher can be used. Gazers spawn in each area. They do not drop gold, nor do they count towards quest progress. Champions hit by a gazer are stunned for 3 seconds.
restrictions.display: 只能使用感知大于等于 13 的勇士。每个区域会刷新凝视者。它们不会掉落金币，也不计入任务进度。被凝视者击中的勇士会眩晕 3 秒。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "Deadwinter Day (Talin)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“仲冬节（塔林）”

restrictions.original: Talin starts in the formation and can't be moved or removed Only Champions with DEX 14 or higher AND INT 12 or higher can be used.
restrictions.display: 塔林初始位于阵型中且无法移动或移除。只能使用敏捷大于等于 14 和智力大于等于 12 的勇士。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "Deadwinter Day (Talin)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“仲冬节（塔林）”

restrictions.original: No restrictions
restrictions.display: 无限制

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Missing Merchants (Hew Maan)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“失踪的商人（休马恩）”

restrictions.original: Hew Maan starts in the front row of the formation. They can't be moved or removed. Two of Hew Maan's "Human" friends have also joined the formation to see them in action! Quest requirements are doubled in non-boss areas Getting to know Zrang - Because of their location in the formation, Zrang is on top of Hew Maan, meaning that enemies have a 25% chance to count double for quest progress (Teamwork). Kleeb and Yassa are not on top, which means that hits-based and armor-based enemies and blockers have a 50% chance of spawning with 25% of their hits already gone, and the base attack cooldown of Champions adjacent to Hew Maan are reduced by .5 seconds (Please Stand By)!
restrictions.display: 休马恩初始位于阵型前排。他无法被移动或移除。两位休马恩的“人类”朋友也会加入阵型来参观他们的行动！非首领区域的任务要求翻倍 了解兹朗 - 基于他们在阵型中的位置，兹朗会处于休马恩的头部，此时团队合作技能生效，有 25% 几率获得双倍任务进度。克莱布和雅萨不在头部，此时请待命技能生效，拥有基于命中次数和护甲次数生命值的敌人或障碍物刷新时，有 50% 几率耗损 25% 的次数，且与休马恩相邻的勇士基本攻击冷却时间减少 0.5 秒！

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Missing Merchants (Hew Maan)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“失踪的商人（休马恩）”

restrictions.original: Hew Maan starts in one of the middle rows of the formation (slot 5). They can't be moved or removed. Relentless Undead monsters spawn and attack your formation. When they are killed, they don't disappear. Instead, after 5 seconds, they get back up and resume their relentless attack. Getting to know Kleeb - Because of their location in the formation, Kleeb is on top of Hew Maan, meaning that Champion damage against bosses is increased and if that boss has hits-based or armor-based health, successful attacks destroy twice as many segments as they normally would (Teamwork). Yassa and Zrang are not on top, which means that boss enemies move 25% slower, and the base attack cooldown of Champions adjacent to Hew Maan are reduced by .5 seconds (Please Stand By)!
restrictions.display: 休马恩初始位于阵型的中排（栏位 5）。他无法被移动或移除。无情的亡灵怪物会刷新并攻击你的阵型。被击杀后，它们不会消失。5 秒后它们会重新站起来，并继续无情地攻击。了解克莱布 - 基于他们在阵型中的位置，克莱布会处于休马恩的头部。此时团队合作技能生效，勇士对首领的伤害增加。如果首领拥有基于命中次数和护甲次数的生命值，成功攻击会消除两倍的常规次数。雅萨和兹朗不在头部，此时请待命技能生效，首领的移动速度降低 25%，且与休马恩相邻的勇士基本攻击冷却时间减少 0.5 秒！

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Missing Merchants (Hew Maan)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“失踪的商人（休马恩）”

restrictions.original: Hew Maan starts in the back row of the formation. They can't be moved or removed. Armored abyssal chickens spawn in each area. These chickens drop no gold, nor do they count towards quest progress. Every 10 areas an additional Armored Abyssal Chicken spawns and attacks. Getting to know Yassa - Because of their location in the formation, Yassa is on top of Hew Maan, meaning that Champion damage is increased in the two columns in front of Hew Maan (Teamwork). Kleeb and Zrang are not on top, which means that hits-based and armor-based enemies and blockers have a 50% chance of spawning with 25% of their hits already gone, and bosses move 25% slower (Please Stand By)!
restrictions.display: 休马恩初始位于阵型的后排。他无法被移动或移除。每个区域会刷新深渊鸡。这些鸡不会掉落金币，也不计入任务进度。每经过 10 个区域，会额外刷新一只重甲深渊鸡发动攻击。了解雅萨 - 基于他们在阵型中的位置，雅萨会处于休马恩的头部。此时团队合作技能生效，位于休马恩前两列的勇士造成的伤害提高。克莱布和兹朗不在头部，此时请待命技能生效，拥有基于命中次数和护甲次数生命值的敌人或障碍物刷新时，有 50% 几率耗损 25% 的次数，且首领的移动速度降低 25%！

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Missing Merchants (Hew Maan)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“失踪的商人（休马恩）”

restrictions.original: No restrictions
restrictions.display: 无限制

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Unfair Sea (Orisha)" Costs 250 Fresh Fishes to start
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“不公平的海（奥瑞莎）” 花费 250 条鲜鱼开启

restrictions.original: Abyssal crabs appear in each area. They do not drop gold, nor do they count towards quest progress. Enemies deal 200% additional damage. Only Champions with the Support tag can be used.
restrictions.display: 深渊螃蟹会在每个区域中出现。它们不会掉落金币，也不计入任务进度。敌人造成 200% 额外伤害。只能使用有支援标签的勇士。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Unfair Sea (Orisha)" Costs 625 Fresh Fishes to start
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“不公平的海（奥瑞莎）” 花费 625 条鲜鱼开启

restrictions.original: Volo joins the formation. Only Champions adjacent to Volo deal damage. Champions not adjacent to Volo deal no damage, but their formation abilities are still active.
restrictions.display: 瓦罗将加入阵型。只有与瓦罗相邻的勇士能造成伤害。不与瓦罗相邻的勇士无法造成伤害，但他们的阵型技能仍能生效。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Unfair Sea (Orisha)" Costs 1250 Fresh Fishes to start
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“不公平的海（奥瑞莎）” 花费 1250 条鲜鱼开启

restrictions.original: A collection of bards that were rejected at the last Sirens of the Realms audition are back for revenge! Each area, 3 bards appear. Each of them has a unique effect that is active while they are alive - Duergar - Enemies deal 300% additional damage. - Elf - Enemies move 200% faster. -Goblin - Champions normal attack cooldown is increased by 0.5 seconds. Non-Bard Champions have their damage reduced by 99%.
restrictions.display: 在上一次海妖国度试唱时，被拒绝的一群吟游诗人回来复仇了！每个区域会出现 3 名吟游诗人。他们存活时各自拥有一种独特的效果 - 灰矮人 - 敌人造成 300% 额外伤害。 - 精灵 - 敌人的移动速度提高 200%。 - 地精 - 勇士的基本攻击冷却时间增加 0.5 秒。非吟游诗人职业的勇士造成的伤害降低 99%。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Unfair Sea (Orisha)" Costs up to 2500 Fresh Fishes to start
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“不公平的海（奥瑞莎）” 花费最多 2500 条鲜鱼开启

restrictions.original: No restrictions
restrictions.display: 无限制

restrictions.original: Must have completed "A Fool's Errand (Alyndra)" Costs 250 Pennants to start
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“愚人的差事（艾琳朵拉）” 花费 250 面锦旗开启

restrictions.original: In each boss area, you will encounter the current boss AND the next boss at once. You'll need to defeat both to progress. Chadwick joins the formation. He mostly observes and tries to figure out what's going on.
restrictions.display: 在每个首领区域，你会同时遭遇到当前首领和下一个首领。你需要击败两位首领才能继续前进。查德威克将加入阵型。他主要负责观察和试图搞清楚发生了什么。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "A Fool's Errand (Alyndra)" Costs 625 Pennants to start
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“愚人的差事（艾琳朵拉）” 花费 625 面锦旗开启

restrictions.original: Additional Frost Giants appear in each area. Each of these additional Frost Giants start with 4 hits-based hit points. Every 25 areas they gain 4 additional hits-based hit points. Champion damage is reduced by 99%.
restrictions.display: 每个区域会出现额外的霜巨人。这些额外的霜巨人初始拥有 4 次基于命中次数的生命值。每经过 25 个区域，它们额外获得 4 次基于命中次数的生命值。勇士的伤害减少 99%。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "A Fool's Errand (Alyndra)" Costs 1250 Pennants to start
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“愚人的差事（艾琳朵拉）” 花费 1250 面锦旗开启

restrictions.original: Only Champions with INT of 14 or higher can be used. Alyndra starts in your formation. She can be moved or removed.
restrictions.display: 只能使用智力大于等于 14 的勇士。艾琳朵拉初始位于你的阵型中。她可以被移动或移除。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "A Fool's Errand (Alyndra)" Costs up to 2500 Pennants to start
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“愚人的差事（艾琳朵拉）” 花费最多 2500 面锦旗开启

restrictions.original: No restrictions
restrictions.display: 无限制

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Endless War (Orkira)" Costs 250 Bouquets to start
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“无止境的战争（奥尔基拉）” 花费 250 个花束开启

restrictions.original: Only Champions with a WIS score of 13 or higher can be used. Enemies move 100% faster. Every 25 areas, that speed boost is increased by 100% (additively).
restrictions.display: 只能使用感知大于等于 13 的勇士。敌人的移动速度提高 100%。每经过 25 个区域，此速度加成提高 100%（加算）。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Endless War (Orkira)" Costs 625 Bouquets to start
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“无止境的战争（奥尔基拉）” 花费 625 个花束开启

restrictions.original: Orkira starts in the formation and can't be moved or removed. Volo joins the formation and catalogs Orkira's unique capabilities. Volo forgot to mention that he angered a swarm of Spined devils before joining us. They appear in each area and deal 300% additional damage.
restrictions.display: 奥尔基拉初始位于阵型中且无法移动或移除。瓦罗加入阵型并为奥尔基拉的独特能力分类。不过瓦罗忘了说，他在加入我们之前惹恼了一群针刺魔。它们会在每个区域出现，造成 300% 额外伤害。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Endless War (Orkira)" Costs 1250 Bouquets to start
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“无止境的战争（奥尔基拉）” 花费 1250 个花束开启

restrictions.original: Armored Mind Flayer Guards appear in each area. The Elder Brain's whispers slowly drive your Champions mad When a Champion gets a killing blow, they gain a random number of stacks of a debuff When the debuff reaches 100 stacks, they are stunned for 15 seconds Mind Flayers and the Elder Brain all deal 100% additional damage.
restrictions.display: 重甲夺心魔守卫会在每个区域出现。主脑的低语会逐渐使你的勇士发疯 当勇士造成击杀时，会被附加随机数量的减益层数 减益堆叠至 100 层时，勇士会被眩晕 15 秒 夺心魔和主脑会造成 100% 额外伤害。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Endless War (Orkira)" Costs up to 2500 Bouquets to start
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“无止境的战争（奥尔基拉）” 花费最多 2500 个花束开启

restrictions.original: No restrictions
restrictions.display: 无限制

name.original: The Web Was On The Wall

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Grandfather Acorn (Shaka)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“祖父橡果（沙卡）”

restrictions.original: Giant Spiders appear in each area. Whenever a Champion destroys a Giant Spider, they become webbed (stunned) for 3 seconds. Gold Find reduced by 99%.
restrictions.display: 巨型蜘蛛会在每个区域中出现。击杀巨型蜘蛛的勇士会被网住（眩晕），持续 3 秒。金币寻获量减少 99%。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Grandfather Acorn (Shaka)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“祖父橡果（沙卡）”

restrictions.original: Shaka starts in the formation (slot 6). He can be moved. Only Shaka and the Champions who match the tag for their slot from Shaka's A Celestial Puzzle ability can deal damage; Shaka's A Celestial Puzzle starts out unlocked. Getting to know Shaka: Shaka's main ability is A Celestial Puzzle. It will tag 4 random slots with a specific tag. When you solve the puzzle and place a Champion that matches the tag, A Celestial Puzzle buffs the damage of the entire party by a massive amount. Match all the tags to give your party the biggest boost!
restrictions.display: 沙卡初始位于阵型中（栏位 6）。可以移动。只有沙卡和符合天神谜题技能指定的位置标签者能造成伤害；沙卡的天神谜题初始默认解锁。了解沙卡：沙卡的主要技能是天神谜题。它会给 4 个随机格子标上特定的标签。每当你解决谜题并将一名符合标签的勇士放到格子中时，天神谜题会为整个队伍提供大量伤害增益。匹配所有标签能为你的队伍提供最大增益！

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Grandfather Acorn (Shaka)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“祖父橡果（沙卡）”

restrictions.original: A Drow Wizard spawns in each area with the Blessing of Lolth. While the Drow Wizard is alive, all Drow enemies deal 300% additional damage and move 100% faster.
restrictions.display: 每个区域会刷新一位受罗丝祝福的卓尔精灵法师。卓尔精灵法师存活时，所有卓尔精灵敌人造成 300% 额外伤害，且移动速度提高 100%。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Grandfather Acorn (Shaka)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“祖父橡果（沙卡）”

restrictions.original: No restrictions
restrictions.display: 无限制

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Mechanical Menace (Mehen)" Costs 250 Rusted Gears to start
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“机械威胁（梅亨）” 花费 250 个锈蚀的零件开启

restrictions.original:
Mehen starts in the formation. He can not be moved or removed. The pixie arrives in each boss area to taunt Mehen, buffing all enemies so they move 100% faster and deal 100% additional damage. You must defeat her in addition to the area requirements to advance. 
Getting to know Mehen: To maximize Mehen's contribution, try to build a formation that meets as many of his Grumpy checks as possible. Note that empty slots in the formation do not count as adjacent spaces, and therefore can't be skipped across for the "within 2 slots" checks.
restrictions.display:
梅亨初始位于阵型中。他无法被移动或移除。皮克精会在每个首领区域出现并嘲讽梅亨，使所有敌人的移动速度提高 100%，且造成 100% 的额外伤害。除完成区域要求外，你必须击败她才能继续前进。
了解梅亨：要使梅亨的贡献最大化，请尝试组建一个尽可能满足他“暴躁”条件的阵型。请注意，阵型中的空格子不算作相邻位置，因此在检验“2 格内”条件时不能跳过这些格子。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Mechanical Menace (Mehen)" Costs 625 Rusted Gears to start
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“机械威胁（梅亨）” 花费 625 个锈蚀的零件开启

restrictions.original: Every time a Modron is killed in non-boss areas it shuts down for 5 seconds and then comes back to life with full health. Modron enemies deal 100% additional damage.
restrictions.display: 每当在非首领区域有魔冢被击杀时，它会停止运作 5 秒然后满血回归。魔冢敌人造成 100% 额外伤害。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Mechanical Menace (Mehen)" Costs 1250 Rusted Gears to start
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“机械威胁（梅亨）” 花费 1250 个锈蚀的零件开启

restrictions.original:
Volo has returned to observe the formation. 
Mehen starts in the formation. He can be moved but not removed.
Only Male and non-binary Champions can be used. 
Enemies move 100% faster, and deal 100% additional damage. 
Getting to know Mehen: Despite the variant restriction that you may only use Male Champions, Mehen can still rely on his adopted daughters Farideh and Havilar to show up due to his passive ability.
restrictions.display:
瓦罗又回来视察你的阵型了。
梅亨初始位于阵型中。他可以被移动，但不能被移除。
只能使用男性和非二元性别的勇士。
敌人的移动速度增加 100%，且造成 100% 额外伤害。
了解梅亨：尽管有只能使用男性勇士的支线任务限制，但得益于梅亨的被动技能，他仍然可以让他的养女法莉德和哈维拉上阵。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Mechanical Menace (Mehen)" Costs up to 2500 Rusted Gears to start
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“机械威胁（梅亨）” 花费最多 2500 个锈蚀的零件开启

restrictions.original: No restrictions
restrictions.display: 无限制

restrictions.original: Must have completed "Let Sleeping Dragons Lie (Selise)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“放倒沉睡巨龙（赛丽斯）”

restrictions.original: Selise starts in the formation. She can be moved or removed. Only Champions with STR of 13 or higher can be used. Getting to know Selise: Each time you trigger her ultimate attack, she switches shield stances. Each shield stance (Aggressive, Wall, and Last Resort) changes the way her normal attack works, and also how Divine Sense buffs Champions in the two columns behind her.
restrictions.display: 赛丽斯初始位于阵型中。她可以被移动或移除。只能使用力量大于等于 13 的勇士。了解赛丽斯：你每次触发她的杀招攻击，她都会切换盾牌姿态。每种盾牌姿态（激进、坚壁和死斗）会改变她的普通攻击运作方式，以及神圣感知对她身后两列勇士的增益效果。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "Let Sleeping Dragons Lie (Selise)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“放倒沉睡巨龙（赛丽斯）”

restrictions.original: Selise starts in the formation. She can be moved or removed. While in outdoor areas, rain falls, increasing the speed and attack damage of enemies by 100%. Champions' base attack cooldowns are increased by 1 second. Only Champions with a WIS of 13 or higher can be used. Getting to know Selise: Keep Selise in her Aggressive shield stance to keep Champions attacking as quickly as possible!
restrictions.display: 赛丽斯初始位于阵型中。她可以被移动或移除。户外区域会下雨，使敌人的移动速度和攻击伤害提高 100%。勇士的基本攻击冷却时间增加 1 秒。只能使用感知大于等于 13 的勇士。了解赛丽斯：让赛丽斯保持在激进姿态，使勇士们以最快的速度发动攻击！

restrictions.original: Must have completed "Let Sleeping Dragons Lie (Selise)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“放倒沉睡巨龙（赛丽斯）”

restrictions.original: Selise starts in the formation. She can be moved or removed. Crawling Claws appear in each area. They deal 200% additional damage. When a Crawling Claw is destroyed by anyone other than Selise Astorio, it immediately respawns and continues its attack! Crawling Claws do not count towards quest progress, nor do they drop any gold. Getting to know Selise: Her Last Resort shield stance is optimal for this variant, as it has a small AOE. Using her ultimate to switch between Last Resort and Aggressive shield stances will trigger Thunderous Smite, allowing her to attack even more enemies and clear the field of Crawling Claws!
restrictions.display: 赛丽斯初始位于阵型中。她可以被移动或移除。爬行爪会在每个区域中出现。它们造成 200% 额外伤害。当爬行爪被除赛丽斯·阿斯托里奥以外的其他人消灭时，它会立即重生并继续发动攻击！爬行爪不计入任务进度，也不会掉落金币。了解赛丽斯：她的死斗盾牌姿态最适合这个支线任务，因为它能提供少量范围伤害。使用她的杀招，在死斗和激进盾牌姿态之间来回切换会触发雷霆猛击，让她能攻击到更多敌人，清理掉战场上的爬行爪！

restrictions.original: Must have completed "Let Sleeping Dragons Lie (Selise)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“放倒沉睡巨龙（赛丽斯）”

restrictions.original: No restrictions
restrictions.display: 无限制

restrictions.original: Must have completed "Party Crashers (Sergeant Knox)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“不速之客（诺克斯中士）”

restrictions.original:
Sergeant Knox starts in the formation. He cannot be moved or removed. 
The damage of all Champions is increased by 50% if Celeste is in the formation, and an additional 50% if Makos is in the formation.
Enemy damage & Speed is increased by 100%. 
Getting to know Sergeant Knox: Knox works best with his fellow Neverwinter Allies Celeste & Makos in the formation.
restrictions.display:
诺克斯中士初始位于阵型中。他无法被移动或移除。
西莱丝特在阵型中时，阵型中所有勇士的伤害提高 50%。如果马科斯在阵型中，再额外增加 50%。
敌人的伤害和速度提高 100%。
了解诺克斯中士：诺克斯与他的无冬城盟友西莱丝特和马科斯在阵型中配合最佳。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "Party Crashers (Sergeant Knox)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“不速之客（诺克斯中士）”

restrictions.original:
A pair of Bearded Devils join the formation. They're just here for the souvenirs.  
Quest goals are doubled.
restrictions.display:
一对须魔加入阵型。他们只是来打酱油的。
任务目标翻倍。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "Party Crashers (Sergeant Knox)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“不速之客（诺克斯中士）”

restrictions.original:
Only Champions with INT of 12 or higher can be used. 
Sergeant Knox starts in the formation. He cannot be moved or removed. 
Each area, zombies aligned with Valindra attack. They do not drop gold, nor do they count towards quest progress.
Valindra Shadowmantle replaces Zariel in area 50.
restrictions.display:
只能使用智力大于等于 12 的勇士。
诺克斯中士初始位于阵型中。他无法被移动或移除。
在每个区域中，都会有听命于瓦琳德拉的僵尸向你发起进攻。它们不会掉落金币，也不计入任务进度。
瓦琳德拉·暗影斗篷取代了扎瑞尔的位置，出现在区域 50。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "Party Crashers (Sergeant Knox)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“不速之客（诺克斯中士）”

restrictions.original: No restrictions
restrictions.display: 无限制

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Missing Lord (Ellywick)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“失踪的领主（艾利薇）”

restrictions.original:
A slot is taken up in the formation by a Pixie riding an intellect devourer, who is along to watch Ellywick do her thing. 
Each time a boss arrives on screen, all Champions are stunned for 5 seconds. If Ellywick is in the formation, the stun does not take effect.
restrictions.display:
骑着噬脑怪的皮克精将占据阵型里的一格栏位，它是来督促艾利薇干活的。
每次首领出现时，所有勇士眩晕 5 秒。如果艾利薇在阵型中，则眩晕效果无效。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Missing Lord (Ellywick)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“失踪的领主（艾利薇）”

restrictions.original:
Ellywick starts in your formation. She can be moved. 
Every area, 2 Satyrs arrive to harmonize . While any Satyrs are on screen, all enemies can only be damaged by bards.
Only Champions with CHA 14 or higher can be used.
restrictions.display:
艾利薇初始位于你的阵型中。她无法被移动。
每个区域需要两个半羊人一同吟唱。场中存在任何半羊人时，只有吟游诗人才能对敌人造成伤害。
只能使用魅力大于等于 14 的勇士。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Missing Lord (Ellywick)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“失踪的领主（艾利薇）”

restrictions.original:
Every area, 5 random chromatic Dragon Wyrmlings spawn with the second wave. Each type of Dragon buffs the Dragons on screen in a unique way. Buffs combine additively if multiples of the same dragon are spawned. 
- White - When a Dragon attacks, it heals 20% of its health.
- Blue - Increase the normal attack cooldown of Champions by 0.5 seconds.
- Black - When a non-boss Dragon dies, there's a 25% chance that it immediately respawns. 
- Red - Dragons move 100% faster.
- Green - Dragons deal 100% additional damage. 
If Ellywick is in the formation, one fewer Wyrmling spawns in each area.
restrictions.display:
每个区域都会在第二波敌人进攻时随机刷新 5 条彩色雏龙。每种龙族都会对场中的龙类提供独特增益。如有多条同种龙族刷新，则增益将以加算方式堆叠。
- 白色 - 当一条龙攻击时，恢复自身 20% 生命值。
- 蓝色 - 增加勇士普通攻击冷却时间 0.5 秒。
- 黑色 - 当非首领龙死亡时，有 25% 概率立即重生。
- 红色 - 所有龙族移动速度提高 100%。
- 绿色 - 所有龙族造成 100% 额外伤害。
如果艾利薇在阵型中，则每个区域内会重生一条种类数量较少的龙。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Missing Lord (Ellywick)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“失踪的领主（艾利薇）”

restrictions.original: No restrictions
restrictions.display: 无限制

restrictions.original: Must have completed "Reclaiming the Past (Prudence)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“重拾过去（普鲁登斯）”

restrictions.original:
Giant Wolf Spiders arrive in each area. These spiders drop no gold, nor do they count towards quest progress. 
Each time a spider is killed, a random Champion is stunned for 2 seconds. 
Only Champions with DEX of 12 or higher can be used.
restrictions.display:
巨型狼蛛会出现在每个区域。蜘蛛不会掉落金币，也不计入任务进度。
每次击杀蜘蛛时，将会随机眩晕一个勇士 2 秒。
只能使用敏捷大于等于 12 的勇士。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "Reclaiming the Past (Prudence)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“重拾过去（普鲁登斯）”

restrictions.original:
Only Evil Champions can deal damage. Prudence starts in your formation and her base attack cooldown is reduced by 2 seconds.

Getting to know Prudence - Prudence finds it fun to kill enemies in front of her more squeamish good-aligned allies. Add good-aligned champions to power up her Glee stacks. If she maxes her stacks of Glee consistently, consider adding a non-good champion to give her someone who gets her jokes, increasing her max stacks and super-charging her power level!
restrictions.display:
只有邪恶阵营的勇士才能造成伤害。普鲁登斯初始出现在阵型中，其基本攻击冷却时间降低 2 秒。

了解一下普鲁登斯这个人--普鲁登斯发觉在她拘谨的正义盟友面前干掉敌人相当有趣。添加更多正义阵营勇士能增加她的“欢欣”堆叠层数。如果她的欢欣堆叠层数已经达到最大，可以考虑添加非正义阵营中认同她的勇士。这样不仅能进一步增加最大堆叠数，更能充分增强其能力。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "Reclaiming the Past (Prudence)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“重拾过去（普鲁登斯）”

restrictions.original:
A tentacle accompanies the formation. No one knows what it's doing, but it's freaking most of us out. 
Enemies move 100% faster and deal 100% additional damage. Every 25 areas, all enemies' speed and damage is increased by an additional 35% (additive). 
Whenever Prudence kills an enemy, stun all enemies for 0.5 seconds.
restrictions.display:
一条触手也将加入阵型。没人知道它在做什么，但它把大多数人都吓坏了。
敌人的移动速度增加 100%，且造成 100% 额外伤害。每过 25 个区域，所有敌人额外增加 35% 速度和伤害（以加算方式堆叠）。
普鲁登斯每击杀一名敌人，就眩晕全体敌人 0.5 秒。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "Reclaiming the Past (Prudence)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“重拾过去（普鲁登斯）”

restrictions.original: No restrictions
restrictions.display: 无限制

restrictions.original: Must have completed "Brightly into Darkness (Corazón)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“光明踏入黑暗（科拉松）”

restrictions.original: Corazón starts in the formation and can't be moved or removed.  Every area cursed pirate ghosts appear. When a cursed pirate ghost attacks a Champion, they are stunned for 1 second. Only Corazón can deal damage to the cursed pirate ghosts, and he prioritizes attacking them over anything else.
restrictions.display: 科拉松初始位于阵型中且无法移动或移除。每个区域都会有被诅咒的海盗幽灵出现。当被诅咒的海盗幽灵攻击勇士时，勇士会被眩晕 1 秒。只有科拉松能对被诅咒的海盗幽灵造成伤害，他会优先攻击此类目标。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "Brightly into Darkness (Corazón)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“光明踏入黑暗（科拉松）”

restrictions.original: In every boss area an orc war wagon appears to hamper the Champions' progress. The war wagon must also be defeated in order to progress. The effects of Corazón's Grease ability are doubled against the War Wagon. Getting to know Corazón: Not only does Grease slow enemies, but if you time Corazón's ultimate correctly, you can unleash a massive firestorm, burning the enemies as they slip and slide through the grease puddles!
restrictions.display: 每一个首领区域都会有一辆兽人战车来拖慢勇士们的脚步。兽人战车必须也被击败，才能继续游戏。科拉松的减速效果在兽人战车上会加倍。了解科拉松：科拉松释放的油不止有减速效果，如果你完美释放了他的杀招，将会燃起大火灼烧敌人。要是能抓住敌人滑过油坑的时机，那就再好不过了。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "Brightly into Darkness (Corazón)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“光明踏入黑暗（科拉松）”

restrictions.original: Corazón starts in the formation and can't be moved or removed. Two cursed pirate ghosts join the formation, watching and judging Corazón. Every 25 areas they change positions. Cursed pirate ghosts increase the base attack cooldown of adjacent Champions by 1 second. Neutral Champions (on the good/evil spectrum), deal 100% additional damage.
restrictions.display: 科拉松初始位于阵型中且无法移动或移除。两个被诅咒的海盗幽灵会加入阵型，时时监视和审判科拉松。他们每经过 25 个区域会改变位置。被诅咒的海盗幽灵会增加 1 秒相邻勇士的基本攻击冷却时间。中立勇士（不属于善良/邪恶阵营）会造成 100% 额外伤害。

Only Champions with CON 14 or higher can be used.

As a kobold in a trench coat, they move 100% faster. After the kobolds fall out of the trench coat, they each deal 300% additional damage. Only Champions with DEX score of 14 or higher can be used.
restrictions.display: 堑壕斗篷里的狗头人会在每个区域发动攻击。首次被击败后，狗头人会从堑壕斗篷中散开，成为 3 名新敌人！狗头人处于堑壕斗篷中时，移动速度提高 100%。在狗头人从堑壕斗篷中散落后，他们各自造成 300% 额外伤害。只能使用敏捷大于等于 14 的勇士。

The mists of Ravenloft have invaded Undermountain, infusing the entire area with an unnatural charm. Strahd taunts the Champions, foreshadowing their upcoming failure to save Ten-Towns. Vampire Spawn appear in each boss area and deal 300% additional damage. Only Champions with WIS of 12 or higher can be used. This adventure contains unique dialogue.
restrictions.display: 鲁道夫·范·里希顿会跟随你的勇士，占据阵型中的一格。鸦阁魔域的迷雾入侵了地脉迷城，为整个区域注入了一种不自然的魔力。斯特拉德会嘲讽勇士队伍，预言他们会在拯救十镇时惨遭失败。吸血鬼衍体会在每个首领区域出现并造成 300% 额外伤害。只能使用感知大于等于 12 的勇士。此冒险包含独特对话。

每个首领区域开始时都会出现一头冬狼头领。必须击败它们才能继续游戏。

In each area, the mimic plant gets distracted by something that is either blue, green, or red, thinking it is the lantern. It accidentally grants a buff to the enemies based on which color it's excited about. - Blue - Enemies deal 300% additional damage. - Green - Enemies' speed is increased by 100%. - Red - Gold Find is reduced by 99%.

restrictions.original: Gargauth's betrayal saps the will of the Champions, who are facing ruin at every turn. From area 26 onward, Gargauth the Pit Fiend has a 25% chance of appearing in each non-boss area. Whenever he doesn't spawn the chance increases by 25% (additively) until he does spawn. While Gargauth is on screen, all other enemies are invulnerable.
restrictions.display: 加葛斯的背叛动摇了勇士们的意志，他们每时每刻都在面临毁灭性的打击。从区域 26 开始，深狱炼魔加葛斯有 25% 几率出现在每个非首领区域。他没有出现的时候，该几率增加 25%（以加算方式叠加）直到他出现为止。加葛斯出现在屏幕上时，其他所有敌人免疫伤害。

restrictions.original:
Every 25 areas, a random champion with the lowest Dexterity will be sucked into a portal and removed from the formation. They cannot be added back for the duration of the adventure.
Reya starts in the formation. She can be moved, but not removed. (She also can't be sucked into a portal.)
You may only use Champions that are either Good or Lawful.
Champions can't be removed from the formation once they have been added.
Fire breath potions can't be used during the adventure, and click damage has no effect after area 100.
restrictions.display:
每经过 25 个区域，敏捷数值最低的一名随机勇士会被吸入一个传送门，并从阵型中移除。在冒险期间，他们无法回归阵型。
蕾雅初始位于阵型中。她可以被移动，但不能被移除。（她也不会被吸入传送门。）
你只能使用善良或守序阵营的勇士。
加入阵型的勇士不能被移除。
冒险过程中不能使用火息药剂，并且点击伤害在区域 100 之后无效。

While the additional demons are alive, they grant a buff to enemies, or a debuff to the Champions. - Abyssal Chicken - Champions' normal attack cooldown is increased by 1 second. - Bulezau - Enemy Damage is increased by 100% - Quasit - Enemy Speed is increased by 100%
restrictions.display: 多种恶魔会在每个区域中出现，给勇士们带来巨大的麻烦。每当有额外的恶魔存活时，它们会为敌人提供增益，对勇士们施加减益。 - 深渊鸡 - 勇士的普通攻击冷却时间增加 1 秒。 - 布雷祖魔 - 敌人的伤害提高 100% - 夸塞魔 - 敌人的移动速度提高 100%

Whenever a Champion takes damage, their base attack cooldown is increased by 0.5 seconds until the area changes, stacking additively.

你只能使用年龄在 75 岁或以上的勇士。
每波会刷新 1-2 个白色阿比沙龙魔。它们不会掉落金币，也不计入任务进度。
每当一名勇士受到伤害时，其基本攻击冷却时间增加 0.5 秒，持续到变换区域为止，以加算方式堆叠。

campaign.original: Icewind Dale: Rime of the Frostmaiden

restrictions.display: 必须已完成“强盗的收割（德·哈尼）”

restrictions.original:
Champion Damage and Gold Find is reduced by 99%
Enemies who have not been painted by D'hani's attacks move 100% faster.
Getting to know D'hani: When D'hani attacks an enemy (and doesn't kill it outright) they paint the enemy with red paint. For each painted enemy on screen, D'hani's damage is increased. In later adventures, D'hani tracks the total number of enemies she has ever painted, so the longer you use her, the more powerful she becomes!
restrictions.display:
勇士的伤害和金币寻获量减少 99%。
没有被德·哈尼攻击所涂色的敌人移动速度提高 100%。
了解德·哈尼：当德·哈尼攻击一名敌人（并没有直接杀死它）时，她会用红色颜料涂在敌人身上。屏幕上每有一名被涂色的敌人，德·哈尼的伤害都会增加。在之后的冒险中，德·哈尼会统计被她涂色的敌人总数。所以你使用她的时间越长，她就变得越强大！

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Bandit's Harvest (D'hani)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“强盗的收割（德·哈尼）”

restrictions.original:
Bullywugs spawn in each area. They do not drop gold, nor do they count towards quest progress. 
Only Champions with DEX of 14 or higher can be used.
Getting to know D'hani: D'hani's specializations allow you to add an additional color of paint when they attack, augmenting the way they take damage or drop gold!
restrictions.display:
每个区域会刷新狂蛙人。它们不会掉落金币，也不计入任务进度。
只能使用敏捷大于等于 14 的勇士。
了解德·哈尼：德·哈尼的专精允许你在她攻击时添加额外颜色，增加敌人受到的伤害或掉落的金币！

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Bandit's Harvest (D'hani)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“强盗的收割（德·哈尼）”

restrictions.original:
The effects of D'hani's specializations are doubled.
Quest requirements are doubled
In each boss area, a second boss spawns. Both bosses must be defeated in order to progress.
restrictions.display:
德·哈尼的专精效果翻倍。
任务要求翻倍
在每个首领区域都会出现第二名首领。两名首领必须都被击败，游戏才能继续。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Bandit's Harvest (D'hani)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“强盗的收割（德·哈尼）”

restrictions.original: No restrictions
restrictions.display: 无限制

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Trickster's Delight (Brig)"
restrictions.display: 必须先完成“骗子的欢欣（布格）”

restrictions.original:
Brig starts in the formation. He can be moved, but not removed.
In each area, a duergar bard appears. The bard can only be damaged by other bards. 
Bard Champions deal 100% additional damage. 
Getting to know Brig Hellclaw - Brig wants to maximize his hype stacks. Keep him surrounded by other Champions that are dealing more damage to maximize his hype stacks from his Inspired Bard ability.
restrictions.display:
布格初始位于阵型中。他可以被移动，但不能被移除。
在每个区域，都会出现一个灰矮人吟游诗人。吟游诗人只能被其他吟游诗人伤害。
吟游诗人勇士造成 100% 额外伤害。
了解布格·地狱之爪 - 布格想最大限度地提高他的狂热气氛堆叠层数。让他的周围环绕着其他能造成更多伤害的勇士，这样他就能借助“灵感焕发的诗人”技能，最大化他的狂热气氛堆叠层数。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Trickster's Delight (Brig)"
restrictions.display: 必须先完成“骗子的欢欣（布格）”

restrictions.original:
A goblin bard joins the formation attempting to try out for the Champions, but they practiced the wrong song! Whenever they play their instrument, each Champions adjacent to them has a 50% chance to be stunned for 2 seconds. 
Enemies deal 200% additional damage. 
Gold Find and Champion Damage is reduced by 99%.
Getting to know Brig Hellclaw - If Brig is one of your higher damage dealers, choose his Cream of the Crop Specialization. If not, choose 'Back'-Up Singer and place him in the rear of your formation to maximize his hype stacks!
restrictions.display:
一名地精吟游诗人加入了队伍，试图为勇士献唱，但它唱错了歌！每当它演奏乐器时，它周围的每位勇士都有 50% 几率晕眩 2 秒。
敌人造成 200% 额外伤害。
金币寻获量和勇士的伤害减少 99%。
了解布格·地狱之爪 - 若布格是你阵型中的高伤害勇士之一，请选择他的“百里挑一”专精。如果不是，则选择“后备歌手”专精并将他放在你的阵型后方，以最大限度地提高他的“狂热气氛”增益堆叠层数！

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Trickster's Delight (Brig)"
restrictions.display: 必须先完成“骗子的欢欣（布格）”

restrictions.original:
An elf bard appears in each area with the Masked Man.
Until the elf bard is destroyed, the Masked Man is invulnerable. Every time the elf bard attacks, the damage of the Masked Man is increased by 100%. 

Getting to know Brig Hellclaw: Brig's Critical Moment ability helps turn up the volume when you're at your wall, or in a boss area. Make sure he's ready to play when the Masked Man arrives!
restrictions.display:
精灵吟游诗人和面具男出现在每个区域。
在精灵吟游诗人被击败之前，面具男免疫伤害。每当精灵吟游诗人攻击时，面具男的伤害增加 100%。

了解布格·地狱之爪：布格的“关键时刻”技能让你在面临困境或到达首领区域时强化自身。当面具男到来时，确保他已经准备好上场！

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Trickster's Delight (Brig)"
restrictions.display: 必须先完成“骗子的欢欣（布格）”

restrictions.original: No restrictions
restrictions.display: 无限制

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Crypt of Legends (Widdle)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“传说的墓穴（威德尔）”。

restrictions.original:
Widdle begins in the formation. She can't be moved or removed.
Undead Enemies deal 200% additional damage and move 200% faster.
Gold Find is reduced by 99%.

Getting to Know Widdle: Widdle charms her adjacent allies with her Vampiric Gaze, increasing their damage. However, as a Speed Champion, she also increases enemy spawn speed with each adjacent ally! Fill in your formation quickly, Widdle's at the wheel!
restrictions.display:
威德尔初始位于阵型中。她无法被移动或移除。
亡灵敌人造成 200% 额外伤害，且移动速度提高 200%。
金币寻获量减少 99%。

了解威德尔：威德尔用吸血鬼之视魅惑周围的盟友，提高他们的伤害。然而，作为一名速度型勇士，她还会根据相邻盟友的数量提升敌人刷新速度！快布置好你的阵型，威德尔将带你们前进！

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Crypt of Legends (Widdle)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“传说的墓穴（威德尔）”。

restrictions.original:
Widdle may have a vendetta against Strahd, but she's also eligible for his Patron variants. As such, the dark lord has set up a test for our latest Champion.
At each boss level, an additional undead boss appears.
restrictions.display:
威德尔可能对斯特拉德有敌意，但她也有资格获取他的赞助者支线任务。因此，黑暗领主为我们最新的勇士设置了一个测试。
在每个首领关卡，都会出现一名额外的亡灵首领。

name.original: A Widdle of This, A Widdle of That
name.display: 威德尔在这，威德尔在那

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Crypt of Legends (Widdle)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“传说的墓穴（威德尔）”。

restrictions.original:
Widdle begins in the formation. She can't be moved or removed.
The Base attack cooldown of all Champions is increased by 5 seconds. This increase does not affect Heroes of the Planes Champions.
A Giant Rat accompanies the formation, intent on becoming friends with Widdle's pet rat Gerard. Widdle said not to hurt it.

Getting to Know Widdle: Widdle's Hurry Up Now ability grants a chance for adjacent allies to have their base attack cooldown reset after attacking. Level her up quickly to gain access to this necessary skill for this variant.
restrictions.display:
威德尔初始位于阵型中。她无法被移动或移除。
勇士的基本攻击冷却时间增加 5 秒。此减益不会影响位面英雄的勇士们。
一只巨型老鼠跟随着阵型，打算和威德尔的宠物老鼠杰拉德成为朋友。威德尔说不要伤害它。

了解威德尔：威德尔的“抓紧时间”技能，使相邻盟友有机会在攻击后重置其基本攻击冷却时间。快速升级她并获得该技能，以顺利通过此支线任务。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Crypt of Legends (Widdle)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“传说的墓穴（威德尔）”。

restrictions.original: No restrictions
restrictions.display: 无限制

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Simril Spoilsport (Yorven)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“观星节扫兴者（约尔文）”

restrictions.original:
Yorven starts in your formation and can't be moved or removed.
Three ravens appear in each area. The ravens drop no gold, nor do they count towards quest progress.
Every 10 areas an additional raven spawns in the swarm, capped at 50 ravens.

Getting to Know Yorven: If you choose the Hunger for Blood specialization, once Yorven defeats an enemy, he'll jump to another enemy to attack them as well!
restrictions.display:
约尔文初始位于阵型中且无法移动或移除。
三只渡鸦会在每个区域中出现。这些渡鸦不会掉落金币，也不计入任务进度。
每经过 10 个区域，渡鸦群中会增加一只渡鸦，上限为 50 只渡鸦。

了解约尔文：如果你选择“渴血”专精，每当约尔文击败一名敌人，他就会跳到另一名敌人身上发动攻击！

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Simril Spoilsport (Yorven)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“观星节扫兴者（约尔文）”

restrictions.original:
In each boss area, a vicious rabbit boss enemy appears. It must also be defeated in order to progress. 
Gold Find is reduced by 99%
Only Champions with DEX of 14 or higher can be used.
restrictions.display:
在每个首领区域都会出现一只凶暴兔首领。必须也将它击败，游戏才能继续。
金币寻获量减少 99%。
只能使用敏捷大于等于 14 的勇士。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Simril Spoilsport (Yorven)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“观星节扫兴者（约尔文）”

restrictions.original:
Yorven Springpaw is haunted by his time in the shadowfell.
A Wraith escorts the formation - increasing the base attack cooldown of each adjacent Champion by 4 seconds. 
If Yorven is in the formation, the increase is only 2 seconds. 
Enemies move 200% faster.
restrictions.display:
约尔文·春爪被他在阴影中的过去所困扰。
一只缚灵护卫着阵型 - 与其相邻的勇士基本攻击冷却时间增加 4 秒。
如果约尔文在阵型中，那么只会增加 2 秒。
敌人的移动速度提高 200%。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Simril Spoilsport (Yorven)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“观星节扫兴者（约尔文）”

restrictions.original: No restrictions
restrictions.display: 无限制

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Merry Map Misadventure (Viconia)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“快乐地图灾祸（维康妮亚）”

restrictions.original: Viconia joins the formation. She can be moved but not removed from the formation. Flaming Fist Soldiers spawn with each wave, they don't drop gold, nor do they count towards quest progress. Gold Find is reduced by 99%.
restrictions.display: 维康妮亚加入阵型。她可以被移动，但不能从阵型中移除。每一波会刷新烈焰之拳士兵，他们不会掉落金币，也不计入任务进度。金币寻获量减少 99%。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Merry Map Misadventure (Viconia)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“快乐地图灾祸（维康妮亚）”

restrictions.original: Only Champions with INT 13 or higher can be used. Each wave spawns Drow Rangers that fire their ranged attack at a random Champion. These attacks also stun any non-elf Champion for 2 seconds due to sleep poison.
restrictions.display: 只能使用智力大于等于 13 的勇士。每一波会刷新卓尔精灵巡林客，向随机勇士发射远程攻击。由于睡眠毒药的作用，这些攻击也会使任何非精灵勇士眩晕 2 秒。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Merry Map Misadventure (Viconia)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“快乐地图灾祸（维康妮亚）”

restrictions.original: Only Evil Champions and other Heroes of Baldur's Gate Champions can deal damage. Enemies move 200% faster and deal 500% additional damage. Getting to know Viconia: Viconia buffs both evil Champions and other Heroes of Baldur's Gate. Use these types of Champions to get the most out of her support abilities!
restrictions.display: 只有邪恶勇士和其他属于“博德之门的英雄们”的勇士才能造成伤害。敌人的移动速度增加 200%，且造成 500% 额外伤害。了解维康妮亚：维康妮亚为邪恶勇士和其他属于“博德之门的英雄们”的勇士提供增益。使用这些类型的勇士，最大限度地发挥她的支援能力！

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Merry Map Misadventure (Viconia)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“快乐地图灾祸（维康妮亚）”

restrictions.original: No restrictions
restrictions.display: 无限制

restrictions.original: Must have completed "Deadwinter Day (Rust)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“仲冬节（拉斯特）”

restrictions.original:
Rust begins in the formation. He can't be moved or removed from the formation. 
The Devourer appears as a secondary boss on area 25. It must be defeated in order to advance.
Gold Find is reduced by 99%.
Gold Find is increased by 200% for each Champion with the "Gold" role, stacking multiplicatively.
Getting to know Rust: Rust increases your damage based on your total gold find. Use gold find buffing Champions in your formation to boost his support abilities!
restrictions.display:
拉斯特初始位于阵型中。他不能被移动，也不能从阵型中移除。
囚魂魔作为额外首领出现在区域 25，必须将它击败才能继续游戏。
金币寻获量减少 99%。
每位担任“金币寻获”角色的勇士，金币寻获量会增加 200%，以乘算方式叠加。
了解拉斯特：拉斯特会根据你的总金币寻获量增加你的伤害。在你的阵型中使用拥有金币寻获量增益的勇士，来提升他支援技能的效果！

restrictions.original: Must have completed "Deadwinter Day (Rust)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“仲冬节（拉斯特）”

restrictions.original:
Only Champions with CON of 14 or higher can be used. 
Every area, frozen skeleton archers that attack a random Champion from range appear. These enemies do not drop gold, nor do they count towards quest progress. 
If any undead enemy attacks a Champion, that Champion is stunned for 1 second.
restrictions.display:
只能使用体质大于等于 14 的勇士。
每个区域都会出现冰冻的骷髅弓箭手，他们会从范围内随机攻击一位勇士。这些敌人不会掉落金币，也不计入任务进度。
被任何亡灵敌人击中的勇士会眩晕 1 秒。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "Deadwinter Day (Rust)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“仲冬节（拉斯特）”

restrictions.original:
Rust begins in the formation (slot 6). He can't be moved or removed from the formation. 
When Rust is not holding his shiny gold piece, adjacent champions damage is disabled
When Rust is holding his shiny gold piece, non-adjacent champion damage is disabled
restrictions.display:
拉斯特初始位于阵型中（第 6 栏位）。他不能被移动，也不能从阵型中移除。
当拉斯特不持有他的闪亮金币时，相邻勇士的伤害无效。
当拉斯特持有他的闪亮金币时，非相邻勇士的伤害无效。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "Deadwinter Day (Rust)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“仲冬节（拉斯特）”

restrictions.original: No restrictions
restrictions.display: 无限制

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Missing Merchants (Vi)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“失踪的商人（蔚）”

restrictions.original:
Vi starts in the formation. She can be moved to other slots, but she can't be removed from the formation.
Vi's Arcane Cannon ultimate starts out unlocked.
All Champion Base Attack cooldown speeds are increased by 8 seconds.
If you activate Vi's second use of her Arcane Cannon ultimate in the last 5 seconds of the ultimate's duration, it's cooldown is immediately reset.
Getting to know Vi: Vi's ultimate has a second stage that you might lose if you forget to activate it. Learn how to get the most out of it!
restrictions.display:
蔚初始位于阵型中。她可以被移动到其他栏位，但不能从阵型中移除。
蔚的奥术大炮杀招初始默认解锁。
全部勇士的基本攻击冷却时间增加 8 秒。
如果你在蔚的奥术大炮杀招持续时间最后五秒内激活杀招第二阶段，它的冷却时间会立即重置。
了解蔚：蔚的杀招有第二阶段。但你要记得激活它，否则就无法使用。多多研究，了解如何最大限度发挥它的功效！

name.display: 是时候好好拥抱一下了

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Missing Merchants (Vi)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“失踪的商人（蔚）”

restrictions.original:
Vi starts in the formation. She can't be moved or removed from the formation.
You can only use Neutral on good/evil axis and Evil Champions that have the DPS role, and you can only use Good Champions that have the Support role.
Getting to know Vi: Vi likes formations where you surround a neutral Champion with good ones. Figure out how to use it to your advantage!
restrictions.display:
蔚初始位于阵型中。她无法从阵型中移动或移除。
你只能使用可以担任输出角色的中立（以善良/邪恶划分时）和邪恶勇士，并且你只能使用可以担任支援角色的善良勇士。
了解蔚：蔚喜欢用善良勇士包围中立勇士的阵型。想想如何利用它来为你获取优势！

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Missing Merchants (Vi)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“失踪的商人（蔚）”

restrictions.original:
Two Explorers join the formation. They deal no damage and can't be moved.
Good Champions deal no damage with their base attacks.
All non-boss area quest requirements are doubled, twice as many monsters spawn with each wave, and monsters drop half the amount of gold.
restrictions.display:
两名探险家加入阵型。他们无法造成伤害且不能被移动。
善良勇士的基本攻击无法造成伤害。
所有非首领区域的任务要求翻倍，每一波出现的怪物数量翻倍，怪物掉落的金币数量减半。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Missing Merchants (Vi)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“失踪的商人（蔚）”

restrictions.original: No restrictions
restrictions.display: 无限制

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Unfair Sea (Desmond)" Costs 250 Fresh Fishes to start
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“不公平的海（戴斯蒙德）” 花费 250 条鲜鱼开启

restrictions.original:
Desmond joins the formation. He can't be moved or removed from the formation.
In Non-Boss areas, each wave creates an extra 3-5 random sailors. They do not drop gold, or count towards quest progress.
Getting to know Desmond: Desmond attack speed-up during the full moon can help you cut through hordes of enemies. Use his specialization to make the most of this!
restrictions.display:
戴斯蒙德加入了阵型，他无法被移动或移出阵型。
在非首领区域，每波将额外随机刷新 3-5 个水手。 他们不掉落金币，也不计入任务进度。
了解戴斯蒙德：满月期间戴斯蒙德的攻击速度会提升，使用他的专精将这种特性发挥到极致，帮助你穿越成群的敌人！

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Unfair Sea (Desmond)" Costs 625 Fresh Fishes to start
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“不公平的海（戴斯蒙德）” 花费 625 条鲜鱼开启

restrictions.original:
Desmond joins the formation. He can't be moved or removed from the formation.
In Non-Boss areas, each wave spawns one additional Armored Crab with 10 armored HP. It does not drop gold or count towards quest progress.
Every time a crab spawns, a random Champion is stunned until it is defeated.
Getting to know Desmond: Desmond's damage boost during the new moon can help you get through heavily armored foes. Use his specialization to make the most of this!
restrictions.display:
戴斯蒙德加入了阵型，他无法被移动或移出阵型。
在非首领区域，每波将额外刷新一只拥有 10 点重甲生命值的装甲蟹。
每次装甲蟹刷新时，随机一名勇士将被击晕，直到它被击败为止。
了解戴斯蒙德：新月期间戴斯蒙德的伤害会提升。使用他的专精将这种特性发挥到极致，帮助你战胜拥有重甲生命值的敌人！

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Unfair Sea (Desmond)" Costs 1250 Fresh Fishes to start
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“不公平的海（戴斯蒙德）” 花费 1250 条鲜鱼开启

restrictions.original:
Only Champions with a STR of 16 or higher may be used.
A werewolf starts in the formation, an additional werewolf joins the formation every 100 areas. Until there are six werewolves in the formation.
Getting to know Desmond: Desmond increases the damage of the formation when slots are filled with escorts (or dead Champions). Use him to reduce the sting of missing formation slots!
restrictions.display:
只能使用力量大于等于 16 的勇士。
阵型初始自带一名狼人。每推进 100 个区域，额外加入一名狼人。阵型最多存在六名狼人。
了解戴斯蒙德：戴斯蒙德会在阵型中的被护卫对象（或死去的勇士）增加时提升阵型的伤害。用他来弥补阵型中缺少人手的不足！

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Unfair Sea (Desmond)" Costs up to 2500 Fresh Fishes to start
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“不公平的海（戴斯蒙德）” 花费最多 2500 条鲜鱼开启

restrictions.original: No restrictions
restrictions.display: 无限制

restrictions.original: Must have completed "A Fool's Errand (Tatyana)" Costs 250 Pennants to start
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“愚人的差事（塔季扬娜）” 花费 250 面锦旗开启

restrictions.original:
Tatyana starts in the formation. She can't be moved or removed from the formation.
Quest requirements are doubled.
Tatyana's "Find a Feast" ability starts out unlocked.
Enemies spawned by Tatyana's "Find a Feast" ability count for 5x quest progress.
Getting to know Tatyana: When Tatyana hasn't been attacked in a while, she'll run off screen to find snacks (and more enemies to fight).
restrictions.display:
塔季扬娜初始位于阵型中。她无法被移动或从阵型中移除。
任务需求翻倍。
塔季扬娜初始解锁“寻找宴会”技能。
因塔季扬娜的“寻找宴会”技能而刷新的敌人可提供 5 倍任务进度。
了解塔季扬娜：如果塔季扬娜在一段时间内没有受到攻击，她会跑出屏幕去寻找零食（同时还会带回更多敌人）。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "A Fool's Errand (Tatyana)" Costs 625 Pennants to start
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“愚人的差事（塔季扬娜）” 花费 625 面锦旗开启

restrictions.original:
Tatyana starts in the formation. She can't be moved or removed from the formation.
In area 51 and beyond, only Tatyana, and the Champions affected by Tatyana's Faithful Friend can deal damage.
Getting to know Tatyana: Tatyana buffs a random slot with her Faithful Friend ability. Use her specializations to increase the number of slots affected.
restrictions.display:
塔季扬娜初始位于阵型中。她无法被移动或从阵型中移除。
从区域 51 开始，只有塔季扬娜和受到她“忠诚之友”技能效果影响的勇士能造成伤害。
了解塔季扬娜：塔季扬娜会使用“忠诚之友”技能，为一个随机栏位提供增益。可以使用她的专精来增加受影响的栏位数量。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "A Fool's Errand (Tatyana)" Costs 1250 Pennants to start
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“愚人的差事（塔季扬娜）” 花费 1250 面锦旗开启

restrictions.original:
Every 5 seconds, each champion takes damage which increases the further you get in the adventure.
Getting to know Tatyana: Tanks like Tatyana often protect your Champions by granting additional health. Include them to offset the constant damage!
restrictions.display:
每隔 5 秒，所有勇士会受到伤害，且伤害值会随冒险进程不断提升。
了解塔季扬娜：像塔季扬娜这样的坦克勇士能为你的勇士提供额外生命值来保护他们。让坦克勇士们加入阵型来抵消持续伤害吧！

restrictions.original: Must have completed "A Fool's Errand (Tatyana)" Costs up to 2500 Pennants to start
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“愚人的差事（塔季扬娜）” 花费最多 2500 面锦旗开启

restrictions.original: No restrictions
restrictions.display: 无限制

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Endless War (Gazrick)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“无止境的战争（加兹里克）”

restrictions.original:
Gazrick starts in the formation. He can't be moved or removed from the formation.
Two Ice Mephits have befriended Gazrick. It's not weird.
Getting to know Gazrick: Gazrick's main support ability gets stronger with distance in a straight line. Place your damage dealers to get the most out of Gazrick's buffs!
restrictions.display:
加兹里克初始位于阵型中。他无法从阵型中移动或移除。
两只冰雪魔蝠与加兹里克成为了朋友。没啥奇怪的。
了解加兹里克：加兹里克的主要支援技能随着直线距离的增加而增强。妥善放置你的伤害输出者，以获得加兹里克最大限度的增益！

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Endless War (Gazrick)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“无止境的战争（加兹里克）”

restrictions.original:
Gazrick starts in the formation. He can't be moved or removed from the formation.
Gazrick has created three Snow Golems companions. Each Golem has an intellect devourer perched on their head. It's not weird.
Only Champions with an INT score of 13 or higher can be used.
It's snowing in all areas where there is not already weather set.
Getting to know Gazrick: Gazrick's main support ability can still support through gaps in the formation. Place your damage dealers to get the most out of Gazrick's buffs!
restrictions.display:
加兹里克初始位于阵型中。他无法从阵型中移动或移除。
加兹里克创造出了三个雪魔像来陪伴他。每个魔像的头上都栖息着一只噬脑怪。没啥奇怪的。
只能使用智力大于等于 13 的勇士。
所有未预先设定天气的区域都在下雪。
了解加兹里克：加兹里克的主要支援技能不受阵型中缺少勇士的格子影响。妥善放置你的伤害输出者，以获得加兹里克最大限度的增益！

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Endless War (Gazrick)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“无止境的战争（加兹里克）”

restrictions.original:
Gazrick starts in the formation. He can be moved, but he can't be removed. His Armor Ablation ability starts unlocked.
All boss enemies have at least 25 armored health.
Armored enemies require 100% more damage to deal one armored hit.
Gazrick's Armor Ablation ability is +100% more effective.
Getting to Know Gazrick: Gazrick's attacks can weaken armor. Use his specialization and increase his attack speed to make the most of this feature!
restrictions.display:
加兹里克初始位于阵型中。他可以被移动，但不能被移除。他的技能“护甲消融术”初始处于解锁状态。
所有首领敌人拥有至少 25 点重甲生命值。
需要对披甲的敌人多造成 100% 的伤害，才能打掉一个点的重甲生命值。
加兹里克的技能“护甲消融术”效果提升 100%。
了解加兹里克：加兹里克的攻击可以削弱护甲。使用他的专精并增加他的攻击速度，以最大限度利用这一特性吧！

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Endless War (Gazrick)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“无止境的战争（加兹里克）”

restrictions.original: No restrictions
restrictions.display: 无限制

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Grandfather Acorn (Dungeon Master)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“祖父橡果（地下城主）”

restrictions.original:
Only Champions that are 40 years old or younger can be used.
At the start of each Boss area, Venger arrives on his nightmare as an additional boss that must be defeated.
Getting to know Dungeon Master: Dungeon Master is eligible for all adventures even if restrictions say otherwise. Try adding him to your formation to improve these youngsters!
restrictions.display:
只能使用 40 岁或以下的勇士。
每个首领区域开始时，驾驭着梦魇坐骑的复仇者会作为额外首领出现，必须同时击败它才能继续前进。
了解地下城主：除非限制条件中有明确规定，否则地下城主可以参加所有冒险。尝试将他加入阵型来增强年轻人们的实力吧！

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Grandfather Acorn (Dungeon Master)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“祖父橡果（地下城主）”

restrictions.original:
Dungeon Master starts in the formation with his ultimate unlocked. He can be moved but not removed.
All Champion base attacks deal 99% less damage.
All Champion ultimate attacks deal 10,000% more damage.
Ultimate cooldowns take half as long.
Getting to know Dungeon Master: Dungeon Master's ultimate ability allows you to recharge another Champion's ultimate use. Use it to get the most out of your favorite damaging ultimate!
restrictions.display:
地下城主初始位于阵型中并解锁杀招。他可以被移动，但不能被移除。
所有勇士的基本攻击伤害降低 99%。
所有勇士的杀招攻击造成 10000% 额外伤害。
杀招冷却时间减半。
了解地下城主：地下城主的杀招将帮助你充能其他勇士的杀招。善加利用，让你最喜爱的伤害性杀招最大限度发挥功效！

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Grandfather Acorn (Dungeon Master)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“祖父橡果（地下城主）”

restrictions.original:
Dungeon Master starts in the formation with Words of Encouragement unlocked. He can be moved but not removed.
Champions only regain 50% of their max hit points when changing areas.
At the start of each area, Tiamat has a 75% chance to show up. She briefly appears and breathes on the Champions, dealing 90% of the Champion's max health in damage if the Champion does not have any temporary hit points, but only wiping out the temp HP if they do.
Getting to know Dungeon Master: Dungeon Master grants temporary health at the start of areas when he doesn't run off to do his own thing. Use his specialization to make it more likely he sticks around if Tiamat is giving you grief.
restrictions.display:
地下城主初始位于阵型中并解锁“鼓励之词”。他可以被移动，但不能被移除。
区域变更时勇士只会恢复 50% 最大生命值。
在每个区域开始时，提亚马特有 75% 几率出现。她会短暂出现并向勇士们喷出吐息，没有临时生命值的勇士将会受到最大生命值 90% 的伤害，拥有临时生命值的勇士则会扣减所有临时生命值。
了解地下城主：如果地下城主没有离开去做他自己的事情，则会在区域变更时为勇士们提供临时生命值。如果提亚马特让你很难受，请善用地下城主的专精，使他留在队伍中的时间更长。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Grandfather Acorn (Dungeon Master)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“祖父橡果（地下城主）”

restrictions.original: No restrictions
restrictions.display: 无限制

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Mechanical Menace (Nordom)" Costs 250 Rusted Gears to start
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“机械威胁（诺顿）” 花费 250 个锈蚀的零件开启

restrictions.original:
Nordom starts in the formation. He can't be moved or removed.
Nordom is hunted by Duodrones and Pentadrones! They drop no gold, nor do they count towards quest progress.
Getting to know Nordom: Nordom increases the damage of Champions in the column in front of him. Use this to defeat these rogue modron hunters!
restrictions.display:
诺顿初始位于阵型中。他无法被移动或移除。
诺顿正遭受二元冢和五元冢的猎杀！它们不会掉落金币，也不计入任务进度。
了解诺顿：诺顿会提高他前列勇士的伤害。利用这一点来击败这些游荡的魔冢猎手！

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Mechanical Menace (Nordom)" Costs 625 Rusted Gears to start
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“机械威胁（诺顿）” 花费 625 个锈蚀的零件开启

restrictions.original:
Nordom starts in the formation. He can't be moved or removed.
Chaotic Champions can't be used, and Neutral champions on the law/chaos axis deal no damage but can still use their formation abilities.
Getting to know Nordom: Based on the Modron Core attached to his party, Nordom's buffs change. When his party has no core attached to it, he increases his buff based on the number of Lawful Champions in your formation.
restrictions.display:
诺顿初始位于阵型中。他无法被移动或移除。
不能使用混乱勇士。中立勇士（以守序/混乱划分时）无法造成伤害，但仍能使用阵型技能。
了解诺顿：根据附加在诺顿所在探险队中的魔冢核心，他的增益会有所不同。当他所在的探险队没有附加的核心，他会根据你阵型中守序勇士的数量提高他的增益。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Mechanical Menace (Nordom)" Costs 1250 Rusted Gears to start
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“机械威胁（诺顿）” 花费 1250 个锈蚀的零件开启

restrictions.original:
Nordom starts in the formation. He can't be moved or removed.
Potions of Speed gain a 100% duration bonus.
You may only use Champions with the Speed tag and/or Champions with a STR of 16 or higher.
Getting to know Nordom: If you have a Modron Core, Nordom has a specialization choice that increases the rate it gains levels. Use some speed Champions to maximize this ability!
restrictions.display:
诺顿初始位于阵型中。他无法被移动或移除。
速度药剂获得 100% 的持续时间加成。
只能使用带有速度标签和/或力量大于等于 16 的勇士。
了解诺顿：如果你拥有魔冢核心，诺顿有一个专精选项可提高它升级的速度。利用速度型勇士来最大化它的效能吧！

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Mechanical Menace (Nordom)" Costs up to 2500 Rusted Gears to start
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“机械威胁（诺顿）” 花费最多 2500 个锈蚀的零件开启

restrictions.original: No restrictions
restrictions.display: 无限制

restrictions.original: Must have completed "Let Sleeping Dragons Lie (Merilwen)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“放倒沉睡巨龙（梅尔文）”

restrictions.original:
Merilwen starts in the formation. She can be moved, but not removed.
Only Neutral Champions (on the g/e axis) can deal damage.
Getting to Know Merilwen: Merilwen increases the damage of Neutral champions. Use a Neutral DPS Champion to make the most of this!
restrictions.display:
梅尔文初始位于阵型中。她可以被移动，但不能被移除。
只有中立勇士（以善良/邪恶划分阵营时）可以造成伤害。
了解梅尔文：梅尔文能提升所有中立勇士的伤害。使用一位伤害输出型中立勇士来充分利用这一点！

restrictions.original: Must have completed "Let Sleeping Dragons Lie (Merilwen)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“放倒沉睡巨龙（梅尔文）”

restrictions.original:
Merilwen starts in the formation. She can be moved, but not removed.
Champions' Normal attack cooldowns are increased by 3 seconds.
Merilwen's Wild Shape ability starts out unlocked and offers an additional 1.5 second bonus to attack speed cooldowns.
Getting to Know Merilwen: Merilwen's cat form makes nearby Champions attack faster. Use this to your advantage!
restrictions.display:
梅尔文初始位于阵型中。她可以被移动，但不能被移除。
勇士的基本攻击冷却时间增加 3 秒。
梅尔文的自然变身技能初始默认解锁，并额外提供 1.5 秒攻击速度冷却时间加成。
了解梅尔文：梅尔文的猫形态能提升附近勇士的攻击速度。好好利用这一点吧！

restrictions.original: Must have completed "Let Sleeping Dragons Lie (Merilwen)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“放倒沉睡巨龙（梅尔文）”

restrictions.original:
Merilwen starts in the formation. She can be moved, but not removed.
Only Champions with an Affiliation may be used, and Oxventurers Champions do 400% more damage.
Merilwen's Ultimate starts unlocked and its cooldown takes half as long.
Getting to Know Merilwen: Merilwen's ultimate grows stronger with other Oxventurers Champions. Try it out if you have already unlocked some of them!
restrictions.display:
梅尔文初始位于阵型中。她可以被移动，但不能被移除。
只能使用从属于各个组织的勇士，公牛冒险公会所属的勇士会额外造成 400% 伤害。
梅尔文的杀招初始默认解锁，冷却时间减半。
了解梅尔文：有其他的公牛冒险公会勇士在场时，梅尔文的杀招会变得更强。如果您已解锁了几位公牛冒险公会的勇士，请尝试一下！

restrictions.original: Must have completed "Let Sleeping Dragons Lie (Merilwen)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“放倒沉睡巨龙（梅尔文）”

restrictions.original: No restrictions
restrictions.display: 无限制

restrictions.original: Must have completed "Party Crashers (Nahara)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“不速之客（纳哈拉）”

restrictions.original:
Nahara starts in the formation. She can be moved, but not removed.
Armored Imps appear in each area. They do not drop gold, nor do they count towards quest progress.
Getting to Know Nahara: If Nahara attacks an enemy and doesn't defeat it, she'll continue to target it until it is vanquished.
restrictions.display:
纳哈拉初始位于阵型中。她可以被移动，但不能被移除。
披甲小恶魔会在每个区域出现。它们不会掉落金币，也不计入任务进度。
了解纳哈拉：如果纳哈拉攻击一名敌人而没有击败它，她会继续将该敌人作为目标，直至其被击败。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "Party Crashers (Nahara)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“不速之客（纳哈拉）”

restrictions.original:
Nahara starts in the formation. She can be moved, but not removed.
Normal area requirements are doubled.
Getting to Know Nahara: When Nahara is easily taking out enemies, she decreases the next area's requirements. Unlock her "To Amuse or Avenge" to progress faster!
restrictions.display:
纳哈拉初始位于阵型中。她可以被移动，但不能被移除。
一般区域要求翻倍。
了解纳哈拉：当纳哈拉轻松地干掉敌人时，她会降低下一个区域的要求。解锁她的“娱乐或报复”以加快进度！

restrictions.original: Must have completed "Party Crashers (Nahara)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“不速之客（纳哈拉）”

restrictions.original:
The weather is foggy in all areas.
Only Champions with an INT of 13+ and/or Black Dice Society affiliation members may be used.
Each boss area features Strahd as an additional boss that must be defeated to progress.
Getting to know Nahara: Nahara's ties to Strahd means she's always available to adventure when he is your patron.
restrictions.display:
所有区域都会被雾气覆盖。
只能使用智力高于 13 和/或从属于黑骰子协会的勇士。
斯特拉德会在每个首领区域中作为额外首领出现，玩家必须打败他才能继续前进。
了解纳哈拉：纳哈拉和斯特拉德之间的关系非常紧密。因此当斯特拉德作为赞助者时，纳哈拉随时都可以参加冒险。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "Party Crashers (Nahara)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“不速之客（纳哈拉）”

restrictions.original: No restrictions
restrictions.display: 无限制

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Missing Lord (Valentine)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“失踪的领主（瓦伦汀）”

restrictions.original: A black cat joins the formation. There's nothing strange about it at all, although Champions next to it are distracted and their normal attack cooldown increases by 5 seconds.
restrictions.display: 一只黑猫将加入阵型。虽然与它相邻的勇士开了小差，其普通攻击的冷却时间增加 5 秒，但这一点都不奇怪。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Missing Lord (Valentine)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“失踪的领主（瓦伦汀）”

restrictions.original:
Valentine starts in the formation.
Monsters take 99% less damage while they are not stunned.
All stun effects last twice as long.
Getting to Know Valentine: Valentine's normal attack has a chance to stun enemies. Use her and other Champions that stun to get through this!
restrictions.display:
瓦伦汀初始位于阵型中。
怪物没有被眩晕时受到的伤害降低 99%。
所有眩晕效果的持续时间都是原来的两倍。
了解瓦伦汀：瓦伦汀的普通攻击有几率眩晕敌人。利用她和其他会眩晕的勇士来度过难关！

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Missing Lord (Valentine)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“失踪的领主（瓦伦汀）”

restrictions.original:
Valentine starts in the formation. She can be moved, but not removed.
You may only use Champions that have positional formation abilities.
Valentine can still be used even though she doesn't have a positional formation ability.
Getting to Know Valentine: A positional formation ability depends on a champion's spot in the formation. Valentine's features improve as more positional abilities affect her!
restrictions.display:
瓦伦汀初始位于阵型中。她可以被移动，但不能被移除。
只能使用拥有位置阵型技能的勇士。
尽管瓦伦汀没有位置阵型技能，但她仍然可以使用。
了解瓦伦汀：位置阵型技能取决于勇士在阵型中的位置。瓦伦汀的特性会在她受到更多位置技能影响时获得强化！

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Missing Lord (Valentine)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“失踪的领主（瓦伦汀）”

restrictions.original: No restrictions
restrictions.display: 无限制

restrictions.original: Must have completed "Reclaiming the Past (Voronika)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“重拾过去（沃罗妮卡）”

restrictions.original:
Voronika starts in your formation and can't be moved or removed.
Only Black Dice Society affiliation members, Evil Champions, Debuff Champions, or Champions with a Favored Foe can deal damage.
Getting to know Voronika: Voronika's support abilities increase with specific types of Champions in the formation, based on the specialization you choose.
restrictions.display:
沃罗妮卡初始位于阵型中且无法移动或移除。
只有黑骰子协会从属组织成员、邪恶勇士、减益勇士或有偏好对手的勇士能造成伤害。
了解沃罗妮卡：根据你选择的专精，沃罗妮卡的支援技能会增强阵型中特定类型的勇士。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "Reclaiming the Past (Voronika)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“重拾过去（沃罗妮卡）”

restrictions.original:
Voronika starts in your formation and can't be removed.
After area 25, Champions deal no damage unless at least one Ultimate is on cooldown.
Getting to know Voronika: Voronika increases her damage buff for the rest of the adventure each time an ultimate is used. Use those ultimates to increase Voronika's power!
restrictions.display:
沃罗妮卡初始位于阵型中且无法被移除。
在区域 25 之后，勇士不会造成任何伤害，除非至少有一个杀招处于冷却状态。
了解沃罗妮卡：在接下来的冒险中每次使用杀招时，沃罗妮卡的伤害增益效果都会提高。使用这些杀招来提高沃罗妮卡的力量吧！

restrictions.original: Must have completed "Reclaiming the Past (Voronika)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“重拾过去（沃罗妮卡）”

restrictions.original:
Voronika starts in your formation and can't be removed. Her base level-up cost is reduced by 99%.
Two Eladrin bodyguards join the formation.
Additional Orc Fighters attack with each wave. They don't drop gold nor count for quest progress.
Getting to know Voronika: Voronika achieves her Darklord form after you achieve her 3 goals. Level her up, use ultimate attacks, and complete the goal you choose via her specialization to get that crown!
restrictions.display:
沃罗妮卡初始位于阵型中且无法被移除。她的基础升级费用减少 99%。
两名雅灵保镖加入阵型。
每一波会有额外的兽人战士发动攻击。它们不会掉落金币，也不计入任务进度。
了解沃罗妮卡：在你实现沃罗妮卡的 3 个目标后，她进入黑暗领主形态。提升她的等级，使用杀招并完成你通过她的专精选择的目标来找到那顶王冠！

restrictions.original: Must have completed "Reclaiming the Past (Voronika)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“重拾过去（沃罗妮卡）”

restrictions.original: No restrictions
restrictions.display: 无限制

restrictions.original: Must have completed "Brightly into Darkness (Dob)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“光明踏入黑暗（多比）”

restrictions.original:
Dob starts in the formation. He can't be moved or removed.
Champions next to Dob deal no damage.
Getting to Know Dob: Dob increases the damage of Champions NOT next to him. Place your DPS Champions away from him!
restrictions.display:
多比初始位于阵型中。他不能被移动或移除。
与多比相邻的勇士不会造成伤害。
了解多比：多比使不与他相邻的勇士的伤害提高。让你的伤害输出勇士远离他！

restrictions.original: Must have completed "Brightly into Darkness (Dob)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“光明踏入黑暗（多比）”

restrictions.original:
Dob starts in the formation. He can be moved, but not removed.
Only Champions with a Charisma and/or Dexterity of 17+ may be used.
Getting to Know Dob: Dob's specialization has the potential to greatly enhance your formation. Pick the one that is best for your Champions!
restrictions.display:
多比初始位于阵型中。他可以移动，但不能被移除。
只能使用魅力和/或敏捷为 17 以上的勇士。
了解多比：多比的专精有可能大幅强化你的阵型。选择最适合勇士的专精！

restrictions.original: Must have completed "Brightly into Darkness (Dob)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“光明踏入黑暗（多比）”

restrictions.original: Dob starts in the formation. He can be moved, but not removed.Dob's Ultimate starts unlocked and its cooldown duration is half as long.Each wave in non-boss areas spawns a relentless Striking Skeleton. They are slow, but they deal 400% damage. In addition, if they are defeated, they respawn in the same location after 5 seconds.Getting To Know Dob: Dob's attacks can prevent dangerous opponents from reaching the formation. Use him and other knockback attacks to keep the Striking Skeletons away!
restrictions.display: 多比初始位于阵型中。他可以移动，但不能被移除。多比的杀招初始解锁，其冷却时间减半。非首领区域的每一波都会刷新一具无情的罢工骷髅。它们速度很慢，但可以造成 400% 的伤害。此外，如果被击败，它们 5 秒后会在相同位置重生。了解多比：多比的攻击可以阻止危险的对手靠近阵型。使用他和其他击退攻击来远离罢工骷髅！

restrictions.original: Must have completed "Brightly into Darkness (Dob)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“光明踏入黑暗（多比）”

restrictions.original: No restrictions
restrictions.display: 无限制

campaign.original: Icewind Dale: Rime of the Frostmaiden
campaign.display: 冰风谷：冰霜少女的白霜

restrictions.original: Must have completed "Cold as Ice"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“其冷如冰”

restrictions.original: Kingsport, the awakened giant penguin, joins the formation in an effort to not have him fall into a trap this time. In Area 50, the other Gelatinous Cubes are invulnerable until the one with Kingsport in it is destroyed. Enemies move 100% faster and deal 100% additional damage.
restrictions.display: 醒来的巨型企鹅金斯波特加入了阵型，希望这次不要让它掉进陷阱。在区域 50，有金斯波特的立方体被摧毁之前，其他的凝胶立方怪免疫伤害。敌人的移动速度增加 100%，且造成 100% 额外伤害。

campaign.original: Icewind Dale: Rime of the Frostmaiden
campaign.display: 冰风谷：冰霜少女的白霜

restrictions.original:
Must have completed "Cold as Ice"
Must have completed 60 Rime of the Frostmaiden adventures or variants
restrictions.display:
必须已完成“其冷如冰”
必须已完成 60 次冰霜少女的白霜冒险或支线任务

restrictions.original:
Only Chaotic Evil champions can deal damage.
After every 50 areas, a random active non-Chaotic Evil Champion is permanently removed from the formation.
Once a Champion is added to the formation they can not be removed.
restrictions.display:
只有混乱邪恶阵营的勇士才能造成伤害。

restrictions.display: 必须已完成“伊斯林的陨落”

restrictions.original:
- From area 30 onward, an earthquake occurs every 20-120 seconds. Earthquakes cause falling pieces of ice hit the Champions, dealing damage equal to 75% of their max health and stunning them for 15 seconds, subject to a DEX save. 
- The earthquake also triggers the following effects for 15 seconds if one or more Champions fail the save.
  - Champion damage is reduced by 99.9%.
  - Enemies move 200% faster.
restrictions.display:
- 从区域 30 开始，每隔 20 至 120 秒发生一次地震。地震会导致冰块掉落。冰块击中勇士时，造成等同于其最大生命值 75% 的伤害并眩晕 15 秒，可通过敏捷检定豁免。
- 如果一位或多位勇士未能豁免，地震还会触发以下效果 15 秒。
- 勇士的伤害减少 99.9%。
- 敌人的移动速度提高 200%。

campaign.original: Icewind Dale: Rime of the Frostmaiden
campaign.display: 冰风谷：冰霜少女的白霜

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Fall of Ythryn"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“伊斯林的陨落”

restrictions.original:
- Xerophon joins the formation for this adventure to see what it's like to fight alongside the Champions. They don't attack, they're just here to observe. 
- Only one Champion of each class can be included in the formation at any time. Multiclass Champions count for all of their classes. Xerophon does not have a class for this variant.
- In an attempt to distract and confuse the enemies, Xerophon transforms into the first enemy who spawns in each area, increasing damage against that type of enemy by 100% for the rest of the area.
restrictions.display:
- 瑟诺芬加入了这次冒险的阵型，想看看与勇士并肩作战是什么感觉。瑟诺芬不会攻击，只是来观战的。
- 在任何时候，每个职业只有一名勇士可以加入阵型。如选择的是多职业勇士，则其拥有的所有职业都将计算在内。瑟诺芬没有适合此支线任务的职业。
- 为了分散敌人的注意力并迷惑他们，瑟诺芬变成了每个区域中刷新的第一名敌人，在该区域的剩余部分对该类型敌人的伤害增加 100%。

campaign.original: Icewind Dale: Rime of the Frostmaiden
campaign.display: 冰风谷：冰霜少女的白霜

restrictions.original: Must have completed all other Icewind Dale: Rime of the Frostmaiden adventures and variants.
restrictions.display: 必须已完成所有其他冰风谷：冰霜少女的白霜冒险和支线任务。

restrictions.original:
Xerophon starts in the formation with their ultimate unlocked. They can be moved, but not removed.
After area 10, Champions can only deal damage while Xerophon is imitating an enemy with their Perfect Imitation ultimate attack.
Champions can't be removed from the formation once they have been added.
Every 50 areas, a random Champion that matches the highest number of Xerophon's specialization choices is removed from the formation and can not be used again in the adventure. In the case of a tie, a random tied Champion is picked. If you have not chosen any spec choices for Xerophon, a random Champion is picked. Xerophon themself is never removed.
Fire breath potions can't be used during the adventure, and click damage has no effect after area 100.
restrictions.display:
瑟诺芬初始位于阵型中并解锁杀招。瑟诺芬可以被移动，但不能被移除。
完成区域 10 后，勇士们只有在瑟诺芬用其“完美模仿”杀招攻击模仿敌人时才能造成伤害。
加入阵型的勇士不能被移除。
每经过 50 个区域，随机一名与瑟诺芬的最大专精选择数匹配的勇士会从阵型中被移除，并无法再在冒险中使用。如果有并列的情况，随机一名并列的勇士会被选中。如果你没有为瑟诺芬选中任何专精选择，则随机一名勇士会被选中。瑟诺芬自己永远不会被移除。
冒险过程中不能使用火息药剂，并且点击伤害在区域 100 之后无效。

Fire breath potions can't be used during the adventure, and click damage has no effect after area 100.

此冒险不能使用火息药剂，且区域 100 后点击伤害失效。

一旦添加，勇士无法从阵型中移动或移除。

restrictions.display: 必须已完成“回城堡去”并已完成 27 次剑湾之旅冒险。

restrictions.original:
You must have Kas unlocked.
Kas starts in the formation.
Every 100 areas, all Champions are removed (other than Kas) and can't be used again during this adventure.
Champions can't be removed from the formation once they have been added.
Fire breath potions can't be used during the adventure, and click damage has no effect after area 100.
restrictions.display:
必须已解锁凯斯。
凯斯初始位于阵型中。
每经过 100 个区域，所有勇士均会被移除（除了凯斯），在本次冒险中无法再次使用。
加入阵型的勇士不能被移除。
冒险过程中不能使用火息药剂，并且点击伤害在区域 100 之后无效。

campaign.original: A Grand Tour of the Sword Coast

restrictions.original:
Kas starts in the formation. He can be moved, but not removed.
You may not use any other Champions that have the DPS role.
A random elemental boss spawns in the first wave of non-boss areas. These bosses don't drop gold or loot bags, or count towards quest progress.
Champions don't recover health when moving to a new area. 
Champions resurrect at half health when changing areas instead of full health.
At the start of each area, Champions take damage equal to 30% of their max health.
Champions that aren't Evil deal no damage with their base attacks.
restrictions.display:
凯斯初始位于阵型中。他可以被移动，但不能被移除。
不能使用任何其他拥有伤害输出角色定位的勇士。
在非首领区域的第一个波次会刷新一个随机元素生物首领。这些首领不会掉落金币或战利品袋，也不计入任务进度。
勇士在移动到新区域时不会恢复生命值。
改变区域时，复活的勇士只会恢复一半生命值而非全部。
在每个区域开始时，勇士们会受到等同于他们最大生命值 30% 的伤害。
非邪恶勇士的基本攻击无法造成伤害。

第 9 栏位的勇士必须拥有伤害输出角色。不能使用任何其他拥有伤害输出角色的勇士。

只能使用拥有全套史诗装备，并且平均物品等级至少为 1000 的勇士。
前 300 个区域的任务要求降低 50%。

campaign.original: A Grand Tour of the Sword Coast

restrictions.original:
You must have Blooshi unlocked. She can be found in the Wild Beyond the Witchlight adventure "The Fairy Rings of Thither", Variant 2.
Blooshi joins the formation. She can be moved but not removed.
You may only use Champions that have a magical base attack.
A Bullywug joins the formation. Every 50 areas the bullywug leaps to a new formation slot. The Bullywug does not knock Blooshi out of the formation.
Any Champion the Bullywug leaps on is knocked out for the rest of the adventure.
Champions can't be removed from the formation once they have been added.
Fire breath potions can't be used during the adventure, and click damage has no effect after area 100.
restrictions.display:
必须已解锁布鲁西。她出现在“女巫之光的荒野之旅”冒险”支线任务 2：“彼方的蘑菇圈”中。
布鲁西加入阵型。她可以被移动，但不能被移除。
只能使用拥有魔法基本攻击的勇士。
一名狂蛙人加入阵型。每隔 50 个区域，狂蛙人就会跳到一个新的阵型栏位中。狂蛙人不会将布鲁西砸出阵型。
任何被狂蛙人跳中的勇士都将在接下来的冒险中被砸出阵型。
加入阵型的勇士不能被移除。
冒险过程中不能使用火息药剂，并且区域 100 之后，点击伤害无效。
