只能使用邪恶阵营的勇士。
每完成 100 个区域，在之前 100 个区域中造成最多伤害的勇士将从阵型中被移除，并且无法在剩下的冒险中使用。
冒险过程中不能使用火息药剂，并且点击伤害在区域 100 之后无效。

Fire breath potions can't be used during the adventure, and click damage has no effect after area 100.

每经过 50 个区域后，就会有一名随机的非邪恶勇士从阵型中移除，并无法在剩下的冒险中使用。如果阵型中没有非邪恶勇士了，那会改为移除一名邪恶勇士。
冒险过程中不能使用火息药剂，并且点击伤害在区域 100 之后无效。

Every five seconds, a giant cream pie falls from the sky and hits a random Champion, dealing 25% of their health in damage and stunning them for ten seconds.
restrictions.display:
太空小丑出现在每个区域。它们不会掉落金币，也不计入任务进度。  
每过 5 秒，一个巨大的奶油派从天而降，击中一名随机勇士，对其造成生命值 25% 的伤害，同时令其眩晕 10 秒。

只能使用力量和魅力大于等于 14 的勇士。
首领一出现就会立即开始狂暴。
首领额外增加 100% 的生命值和 100% 的速度，并且会造成 200% 的额外伤害。

restrictions.original: Must have completed Who Lurks Below?
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“是谁潜伏在下面？”

restrictions.original: No restrictions
restrictions.display: 无限制

restrictions.original: Must have completed Xanathaaaaaaaaaar!
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“珊那萨啊啊啊啊！”

restrictions.original:
An Adolescent Kindori joins the formation. They're so big they take up three spots in your formation, but don't do much else.
Only Champions with a WIS score of 13 or higher can be used.
restrictions.display:
一名未成熟的金多利加入阵型。它太大了，占据了你阵型中的三个栏位，但除此之外就没什么作用了。
只能使用感知大于等于 13 的勇士。

restrictions.original:
Must have completed Xanathaaaaaaaaaar!
Must have completed 11 Light of Xaryxis adventures or variants.
restrictions.display:
必须已完成“珊那萨啊啊啊啊！”
必须已完成 11 次萨雷西斯之光冒险或支线任务。

restrictions.original:
You may only use fighters or paladins.
All familiars are wearing fancy hats.
restrictions.display:
只能使用战士或圣武士。
所有魔宠都戴着花哨的帽子。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "Xanathaaaaaaar!"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“珊那萨啊啊啊啊！”

restrictions.original:
You may only use Champions with a Charisma of 18 or higher.
1-2 Shadar-kai Warriors spawn with each wave. They don't drop gold nor count towards quest progress.
In Boss areas, 5 additional Shadar-kai Warriors spawn with the first two waves. They also need to be defeated to progress.
restrictions.display:
只能使用魅力大于等于 18 的勇士。
每波会刷新 1-2 个影灵战士。它们不会掉落金币，也不计入任务进度。
在首领区域，前两波会额外刷新 5 名影灵战士。必须将它们一并击败才能继续前进。

restrictions.original: Must have completed Xanathaaaaaaaaaar!
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“珊那萨啊啊啊啊！”

restrictions.original: No restrictions
restrictions.display: 无限制

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Bandit's Harvest (Egbert)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“强盗的收割（艾伯特）”

restrictions.original:
Egbert starts in the formation. He can't be moved or removed.
Enemies can take at most 10% of their max health per hit in damage for the first 10 seconds after they appear.
Speed potions last twice as long.
Getting to know Egbert: Egbert's Homemade Bomb attack knocks back enemies. Delay your enemies with this and other similar abilities!
restrictions.display:
艾伯特初始位于阵型中。他无法被移动或移除。
敌人出现后前 10 秒可承受每次击中自身最大生命值 10% 的伤害。
速度药剂持续时间变为两倍。
了解艾伯特：艾伯特的自制炸弹攻击可击退敌人。用这招和其他类似能力来延迟敌人的到来吧！

name.original: Kicked out of Le Dragon d'Or

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Bandit's Harvest (Egbert)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“强盗的收割（艾伯特）”

restrictions.original:
Egbert starts in the formation and his Atonement of the Past ability starts out unlocked. He can't be moved or removed.
If Egbert has positive Atonement points, only Lawful Champions can deal damage. Otherwise, only Chaotic Champions can deal damage.
Getting to know Egbert: Egbert's Atonement for his past actions depends on the alignment of his companions. Try to maximize the absolute value of his Atonement points!
restrictions.display:
艾伯特初始位于阵型中，且其“过去的赎罪”技能初始解锁。他无法被移动或移除。
艾伯特的赎罪点数为正时，只有守序勇士可造成伤害。否则，只有邪恶阵营的勇士才能造成伤害。
了解艾伯特：艾伯特对自己过去行为的赎罪会根据自己伙伴的阵营而定。尝试将他的赎罪点绝对值最大化吧！

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Bandit's Harvest (Egbert)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“强盗的收割（艾伯特）”

restrictions.original:
- Egbert starts in the formation. (Slot 0) He can't be moved or removed.
- Every 10 seconds, Egbert accidentally drops a lit bomb which bounces back and explodes, dealing a random amount of damage up to the area's number to a random Champion (other than Egbert) and anyone standing next to them. The damage doubles every 100 areas.
- Getting to know Egbert: As a tank and healer, Egbert helps make your Champions more resilient to damage. They're going to need it.
restrictions.display:
- 艾伯特初始位于阵型中。（栏位 0）他无法被移动或移除。
- 每过 10 秒，艾伯特会不小心掉下一个点燃的炸弹。炸弹会向后方弹跳并爆炸，对一名随机勇士（除艾伯特之外）和旁边的其他人等造成最高不超过区域编号的随机伤害。每经过 100 个区域伤害翻倍。
- 执行：伤害量为从 1 到当前区域编号的随机数。每个目标受到的伤害可能不同。每 100 个区域的伤害增加从 101/201/301 等区域开始，并以乘算叠加（即 101-200 区域 x2 伤害，201-300 区域 x4 伤害，301-400 区域 x8 伤害，以此类推）。
- 艺术：坠落、弹跳炸弹和爆炸，与他的基本攻击具有相同的视觉效果。
- 了解艾伯特：作为坦克和治疗师，艾伯特可使你的勇士们更耐受伤害。他们会需要的。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Bandit's Harvest (Egbert)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“强盗的收割（艾伯特）”

restrictions.original: No restrictions
restrictions.display: 无限制

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Trickster's Delight (Kent)"
restrictions.display: 必须先完成“骗子的欢欣（肯特）”

restrictions.original:
Kent begins in the formation. He can't be removed.
There is an additional wave of enemies in each boss area.
Bosses have 3 times the health and deal 3 times the damage.
Getting to know Kent: Kent's buff increases as you defeat higher level bosses while he is in the formation. Get him as far as you can in an event and in each campaign to maximize his buff!
restrictions.display:
肯特初始位于阵型中。他无法被移动。
每个首领区域额外常出现一批敌人。
首领生命值 3 倍，伤害 3 倍。
了解肯特：肯特在阵型中时，击败较高等级首领可提升肯特的增益。带他深入活动和战役，最大限度提升其增益！

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Trickster's Delight (Kent)"
restrictions.display: 必须先完成“骗子的欢欣（肯特）”

restrictions.original:
Kent begins in the formation. He can't be removed.
You may only use Champions with a Dexterity and Charisma of 13 or higher. Champions affiliated with the Rivals of Waterdeep are also allowed.
Getting to know Kent: Kent's damage increases each time he makes an attack. Speed up his attack with other Champions to increase his damage faster!
restrictions.display:
肯特初始位于阵型中。他无法被移动。
只能使用敏捷和魅力大于等于 13 的勇士。与“深水城的竞争对手”有关的勇士也允许使用。
了解肯特：肯特每次攻击都会令自身伤害提升。借助其他勇士加快其攻击速度，可更快提升其伤害！

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Trickster's Delight (Kent)"
restrictions.display: 必须先完成“骗子的欢欣（肯特）”

restrictions.original:
Kent begins in the formation. He can't be removed.
Each wave spawns 1-3 Giant Rats. They don't drop gold, nor do they count towards quest progress.
The first time an enemy is hit by a normal attack, they only take 1 point of damage.
Getting to know Kent: Kent's Potent Poison specialization deals ongoing damage. Use it to take out those pesky rats!
restrictions.display:
肯特初始位于阵型中。他无法被移动。
每一波都会刷新 1-3 只巨型老鼠。它们不会掉落金币，也不计入任务进度。
敌人首次被普通攻击击中时，只会受到 1 点伤害。
了解肯特：肯特的强力毒药专精可造成持续伤害。利用它来解决讨厌的老鼠吧？

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Trickster's Delight (Kent)"
restrictions.display: 必须先完成“骗子的欢欣（肯特）”

restrictions.original: No restrictions
restrictions.display: 无限制

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Crypt of Legends (Virgil)".
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“传说的墓穴（维吉尔）”。

restrictions.original:
Virgil begins in the formation. He can't be moved or removed.
Only Champions next to Virgil can deal damage.
Getting to know Virgil: Virgil increases the damage and attack speeds of Champions next to him. Place your Champions carefully to best benefit from this!
restrictions.display:
维吉尔初始位于阵型中。他无法被移动或移除。
只有与维吉尔相邻的勇士才能造成伤害。
了解维吉尔：维吉尔会为与他相邻的勇士提高伤害和攻击速度。精心放置你的勇士，从中获得最大收益！

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Crypt of Legends (Virgil)".
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“传说的墓穴（维吉尔）”。

restrictions.original:
Virgil begins in the formation. He can't be removed.
You may only use Champions with a Wisdom of 12 or higher.
Getting to know Virgil: Virgil and Kent's inseparable bond means when one is eligible for an adventure, the other is too. Try adding Kent to formation to try it out!
restrictions.display:
维吉尔初始位于阵型中。他无法被移除。
只能使用感知大于等于 12 的勇士。
了解维吉尔：维吉尔和肯特之间拥有密不可分的羁绊。如果其中一方有资格参加某场冒险，则另一方同样也能参加。试着将肯特加入阵型吧！

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Crypt of Legends (Virgil)".
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“传说的墓穴（维吉尔）”。

restrictions.original:
Virgil begins in the formation. He can't be removed.
Every 5 areas, the weather drastically changes. While snowing, all Champions' normal attack cooldown speeds are increased by 5 seconds. While thundering, a bolt of lightning strikes a random Champion every 5 seconds dealing damage equal to 50% of their max health and stunning them for 5 seconds. While foggy, Champions deal no damage with ranged attacks.
Getting to know Virgil: Virgil's buff increases each time the weather changes. See if you can find other ways to change the weather for an even greater buff!
restrictions.display:
维吉尔初始位于阵型中。他无法被移除。
每隔 5 个区域，天气会发生急剧变化。天气为“降雪”时，全部勇士的普通攻击冷却时间增加 5 秒。天气为“闪电”时，每 5 秒会降下雷霆打击一名随机勇士，造成等同于其最大生命值 50% 的伤害并使其眩晕 5 秒。天气为“迷雾”时，勇士的远程攻击不会造成伤害。
了解维吉尔：每次天气变换时，维吉尔的增益效果都会提高。看看你是否能找到其他方法来改变天气，以获得更大的增益！

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Crypt of Legends (Virgil)".
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“传说的墓穴（维吉尔）”。

restrictions.original: No restrictions
restrictions.display: 无限制

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Simril Spoilsport (Warduke)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“观星节扫兴者（战争公爵）”

restrictions.original:
Warduke joins the formation.
He can't be moved or removed.
Warduke's normal attack speed cooldown is reduced by 1 second.
All other Champions have their normal attack speed cooldown increased by 3 seconds.
Getting to Know Warduke: Warduke's damage increases each time he attacks or is attacked.
This damage bonus resets when moving to a new area.
restrictions.display:
战争公爵加入阵型。
他无法被移动或移除。
战争公爵的普通攻击速度冷却时间减少 1 秒。
所有其他勇士的普通攻击速度冷却时间增加 3 秒。
了解战争公爵：每次发动攻击或受到攻击时，战争公爵的伤害都会提高。
移动到新区域时，此伤害加成将重置。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Simril Spoilsport (Warduke)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“观星节扫兴者（战争公爵）”

restrictions.original:
Warduke joins the formation. He can't be moved or removed.
Only Evil Champions, Chaotic Champions, or Champions with the Gold Find role can be used.
Strongheart spawns in each boss area. He must additionally be defeated to progress.
Getting to Know Warduke: Warduke's damage increases based on what specialization you pick.
Choose the best one for the champions you use!
restrictions.display:
战争公爵加入阵型。他不能被移动或移除。
只能使用邪恶勇士、混乱勇士或拥有金币寻获角色的勇士。
每个首领区域都会刷新强心。必须击败他才能继续游戏。
了解战争公爵：战争公爵的伤害根据你所选择的专精而提高。
为你使用的勇士选择最好的专精！

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Simril Spoilsport (Warduke)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“观星节扫兴者（战争公爵）”

restrictions.original:
Warduke joins the formation. He can't be moved or removed.
You may only use Champions that have positional formation abilities.
Warduke can still be used even though he doesn't have a positional formation abilities.
Getting to Know Warduke: Warduke inverts many positional formation abilities. This means your Champions will buff the opposite slots that they normally do!
restrictions.display:
战争公爵加入阵型。他无法被移动或移除。
你只能使用具有位置阵型技能的勇士。
尽管战争公爵没有位置阵型技能，但仍然可以使用他。
了解战争公爵：战争公爵会反转许多位置阵型技能。这意味着你的勇士将增益与平时相反的栏位！

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Simril Spoilsport (Warduke)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“观星节扫兴者（战争公爵）”

restrictions.original: No restrictions
restrictions.display: 无限制

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Merry Map Misadventure (Imoen)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“快乐地图灾祸（伊梦）”

restrictions.original:
Imoen joins the formation. She can't be moved or removed.
Only Imoen and Champions next to her can deal damage.
Getting to Know Imoen: Imoen increases the damage of Champions next to her. Place your damage dealers near her to make the most of this!
restrictions.display:
伊梦加入阵型。她无法被移动或移除。
只有伊梦以及与她相邻的勇士才能造成伤害。
了解伊梦：伊梦使与她相邻的勇士伤害提高。将你的伤害输出者放置在她附近，从而充分利用这一点！

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Merry Map Misadventure (Imoen)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“快乐地图灾祸（伊梦）”

restrictions.original:
Imoen joins the formation. She can't be moved or removed.
1-2 Beasts spawn with every wave. They don't drop gold nor count towards quest progress.
Getting to know Imoen: Imoen's specialization lets you pick a Favored Foe. Her buffs increase as these foes appear and are defeated.
restrictions.display:
伊梦加入阵型。她无法被移动或移除。
每波刷新 1-2 头兽类。它们不会掉落金币，也不计入任务进度。
了解伊梦：伊梦的专精让你可以选择一种偏好对手。当这些敌人出现并被击败时，她的增益效果提高。

name.original: Gotta Go Fast To Cast Fast

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Merry Map Misadventure (Imoen)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“快乐地图灾祸（伊梦）”

restrictions.original:
You may only use Champions with an INT of 12 or higher, and/or Champions from the Heroes of Baldur's Gate affiliation.
Imoen joins the formation. She can be moved, but not removed.
Imoen's base attack cooldown is reduced by 0.5 seconds for each Champion next to her.
1-2 Monstrosities spawn with every wave. They don't drop gold nor count towards quest progress.
Getting to know Imoen: Imoen casts Polymorph and Stoneskin after a certain number of attacks. Reduce her attack cooldown to cast them more often.
restrictions.display:
只能使用智力大于等于 12 的勇士，和/或来自“博德之门的英雄们”从属组织的勇士。
伊梦加入阵型。她可以被移动，但不能被移除。
每位与伊梦相邻的勇士均使她的基本攻击冷却时间减少 0.5 秒。
每波刷新 1-2 只怪兽。它们不会掉落金币，也不计入任务进度。
了解伊梦：发动一定次数的攻击后，伊梦会施展变形术和石肤术。她的攻击冷却时间减少，从而更频繁地施放这些法术。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Merry Map Misadventure (Imoen)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“快乐地图灾祸（伊梦）”

restrictions.original: No restrictions
restrictions.display: 无限制

restrictions.original: Must have completed "Deadwinter Day (Fen)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“仲冬节（芬）”

restrictions.original:
Fen joins the formation. She can be moved, but not removed.
Mirt joins the formation. Only Champions in Mirt's column can deal damage.
Getting to know Fen:  Fen increases the damage of all Champions in her column, including herself.
restrictions.display:
芬加入阵型。她可以被移动，但不能被移除。
米尔特加入阵型。只有米尔特所在列中的勇士能够造成伤害。
了解芬：芬可以提高她所在列中所有勇士的伤害，包括她自己。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "Deadwinter Day (Fen)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“仲冬节（芬）”

restrictions.original:
Fen joins the formation. She can be moved, but not removed.
Vajra and redeemed Zariel join the formation. They're here for moral support.
You may only use Warlocks, Black Dice Society Champions, or Champions with WIS 15+.
Getting to Know Fen: Surround Fen with Champions that have high Wisdom scores to make her (and other Warlocks) attack faster!
restrictions.display:
芬加入阵型。她可以被移动，但不能被移除。
跋折罗与赎罪的扎瑞尔加入阵型。他们前来提供道义支持。
你只能使用邪术师、“黑骰子协会”勇士或感知为 15+ 的勇士。
了解芬：让高感知值的勇士包围芬，使她（和其他邪术师）的攻击速度更快！

restrictions.original: Must have completed "Deadwinter Day (Fen)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“仲冬节（芬）”

restrictions.original:
Fen joins the formation. She can be moved, but not removed.
The weather is foggy.
You can't use Champions with ranged attacks, except for Desmond.
1-2 zombies spawn with each wave. They don't drop gold nor count towards quest progress.
Strahd spawns as a second boss in each boss area. He must also be defeated to progress.
Getting to Know Fen: Now that you've unlocked her, you can use Fen to speed up your progress in Patron challenges!
restrictions.display:
芬加入阵型。她可以被移动，但不能被移除。
天气为迷雾。
你不能使用拥有远程攻击的勇士，戴斯蒙德除外。
每个波次刷新 1-2 个僵尸。它们不会掉落金币，也不计入任务进度。
斯特拉德会在每个首领区域刷新第二个首领。必须击败他才能前进。
了解芬：解锁芬之后，你可以使用她来加快赞助者挑战的进度！

restrictions.original: Must have completed "Deadwinter Day (Fen)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“仲冬节（芬）”

restrictions.original: No restrictions
restrictions.display: 无限制

name.original: Perhaps I'd Be Safer in the Middle?

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Missing Merchants (Brother Uriah)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“失踪的商人（乌利亚修士）”

restrictions.original:
Brother Uriah joins the formation. He can't be moved or removed.
Only Champions in the middle two columns can deal damage.
Getting to Know Brother Uriah: Uriah increases the damage of Champions in his column and the column behind him. Place your damage dealing Champions to take advantage of this!
restrictions.display:
乌利亚修士加入阵型。他无法被移动或移除。
只有中间两列的勇士可以造成伤害。
了解乌利亚修士：乌利亚可以提高所在列及后方列勇士的伤害。合理放置你的伤害输出勇士以利用这一点！

name.original: Perhaps an Escort is in Order?

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Missing Merchants (Brother Uriah)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“失踪的商人（乌利亚修士）”

restrictions.original:
Brother Uriah joins the formation. He can be moved, but not removed. Uriah's Ezra's Embrace ability starts unlocked.
Two Ravens join the formation.
Every 10 seconds, a boulder falls on a random Champion dealing 25% of their total health in damage.
Getting to Know Brother Uriah: Uriah can heal Champions within two slots of him. Place him to make the most of this!
restrictions.display:
乌利亚修士加入阵型。他可以被移动，但不能被移除。乌利亚的“伊丝拉的拥抱”技能解锁。
两只渡鸦加入阵型。
每 10 秒，一块巨石降落到一名随机勇士身上，造成其总生命值 25% 的伤害。
了解乌利亚修士：乌利亚可以治愈距离他两个栏位以内的勇士。充分发挥他的能力！

name.display: 也许我们应该抓紧时间？

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Missing Merchants (Brother Uriah)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“失踪的商人（乌利亚修士）”

restrictions.original:
Brother Uriah joins the formation. He can be moved, but not removed.
You may only use Champions from the Black Dice Society affiliation or Champions with a normal attack cooldown of 5 seconds or less.
Getting to Know Azalin Rex: Azalin Rex has a mysterious tie to Brother Uriah. Increase the attack speed of your champions to spend more time with the darklord of Darkon!
restrictions.display:
乌利亚修士加入阵型。他可以被移动，但不能被移除。
你只能使用“黑骰子协会”从属组织的勇士，或普通攻击冷却时间为 5 秒及以下的勇士。
了解亚扎林·雷克斯：亚扎林·雷克斯与乌利亚修士有着神秘的纽带。提高勇士的攻击速度，从而与达孔的黑暗领主相处更久！

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Missing Merchants (Brother Uriah)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“失踪的商人（乌利亚修士）”

restrictions.original: No restrictions
restrictions.display: 无限制

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Unfair Sea (Solaak)" Costs 250 Fresh Fishes to start
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“不公平的海（索剌克）” 花费 250 条鲜鱼开启

restrictions.original:
Solaak, Tempest, and Levits join the formation. Levits can be moved, but not removed.
You may only use Champions with a DEX of 13 or higher.
Getting to know Solaak: Solaak's Pseudodragon pet Levits takes his place in the formation. Look for Solaak riding a drake in the back of the formation!
restrictions.display:
索剌克、坦皮斯特和雷维兹加入阵型。雷维兹可以被移动，但不能被移除。
只能使用敏捷大于等于 13 的勇士。
了解索剌克：索剌克的伪龙宠物雷维兹会加入阵型。在阵型后方寻找骑着龙的索剌克吧！

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Unfair Sea (Solaak)" Costs 625 Fresh Fishes to start
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“不公平的海（索剌克）” 花费 625 条鲜鱼开启

restrictions.original:
Solaak, Tempest, and Levits join the formation. Levits can be moved, but not removed.
The base attack cooldowns of Champions with magic and melee base attacks are increased by 10 seconds.
Getting to know Solaak: Solaak's buffs focus on Champions with ranged attacks. Make the best ranged formation possible!
restrictions.display:
索剌克、坦皮斯特和雷维兹加入阵型。雷维兹可以被移动，但不能被移除。
勇士的魔法基本攻击和近战基本攻击冷却时间增加 10 秒。
了解索剌克：索剌克的增益专注于使用远程攻击的勇士。打造最强的远程阵型吧！

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Unfair Sea (Solaak)" Costs 1250 Fresh Fishes to start
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“不公平的海（索剌克）” 花费 1250 条鲜鱼开启

restrictions.original:
Solaak, Tempest, and Levits join the formation. Levits can be moved, but not removed.
A Bronze Dragon joins the formation as an escort. It takes up three spots in the formation, but doesn't do much else.
Getting to know Solaak: One of Solaak's specializations can help offset the presence of escorts in the formation. Choose wisely!
restrictions.display:
索剌克、坦皮斯特和雷维兹加入阵型。雷维兹可以被移动，但不能被移除。
一条青铜龙加入阵型作为护卫。它占据了你阵型中的三个栏位，但除此之外就没什么作用了。
了解索剌克：索剌克的一项专精有助于抵消阵型中存在的护卫。请谨慎选择！

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Unfair Sea (Solaak)" Costs up to 2500 Fresh Fishes to start
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“不公平的海（索剌克）” 花费最多 2500 条鲜鱼开启

restrictions.original: No restrictions
restrictions.display: 无限制

restrictions.original: Must have completed "A Fool's Errand (Miria)" Costs 250 Pennants to start
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“愚人的差事（米莉雅）”花费 250 面锦旗开启

restrictions.original:
Miria starts in the formation. She can be moved but not removed.
Only champions next to Miria can deal damage.
Getting to know Miria: Miria increases the damage of Champions next to her. Place your damage dealing champions to take advantage of this!
restrictions.display:
米莉雅初始位于阵型中。她可以被移动，但不能被移除。
只有与米莉雅相邻的勇士可以造成伤害。
了解米莉雅：米莉雅使与她相邻的勇士伤害提高。放置你的伤害输出勇士，以充分利用这一点！

name.original: The Knight of the Black Rose

restrictions.original: Must have completed "A Fool's Errand (Miria)" Costs 625 Pennants to start
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“愚人的差事（米莉雅）”花费 625 面锦旗开启

restrictions.original:
Miria starts in the formation. She can be moved but not removed.
Miria's Zombie Bodyguards ability starts out unlocked.
1-2 Skeleton Archers spawn with each wave. They don't drop gold nor count towards quest progress.
In Boss areas, Lord Soth spawns and must also be defeated to progress.
Getting to know Miria: Miria summons zombies to protect the front of the formation, causing her to take some of their damage. Use healers to give her more longevity!
restrictions.display:
米莉雅初始位于阵型中。她可以被移动，但不能被移除。
米莉雅的僵尸保镖技能初始已解锁。
每波额外刷新 1-2 名骷髅弓箭手。它们不会掉落金币，也不计入任务进度。
在首领区域中会刷新索斯领主，必须击败他才能继续。
了解米莉雅：米莉雅召唤僵尸保护阵型前排，使其承受盟友的部分伤害。使用治疗者增强她的持久力！

restrictions.original: Must have completed "A Fool's Errand (Miria)" Costs 1250 Pennants to start
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“愚人的差事（米莉雅）”花费 1250 面锦旗开启

restrictions.original:
Miria starts in the formation. She can be moved but not removed.
You may only use Champions that are Lawful, Unaffiliated, or have INT 15 or higher.
Getting to Know Miria: Miria's specialization determines what types of Champions she works best with. Pick the choice that best fits your formation!
restrictions.display:
米莉雅初始位于阵型中。她可以被移动，但不能被移除。
只能使用守序、无从属组织或智力大于等于 15 的勇士。
了解米莉雅：米莉雅的专精决定她与哪类勇士的合作最为紧密。选择最适合阵型的选项！

restrictions.original: Must have completed "A Fool's Errand (Miria)" Costs up to 2500 Pennants to start
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“愚人的差事（米莉雅）” 花费最多 2500 面锦旗开启

restrictions.original: No restrictions
restrictions.display: 无限制

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Endless War (Antrius)" Costs 250 Bouquets to start
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“无止境的战争（安裘斯）” 花费 250 个花束开启

restrictions.original:
Antrius starts in the formation. He can be moved, but not removed.
Two reflections of Antrius take up slots in the formation. These reflections are just that, and don't actually have any of Antrius' abilities.
Getting to Know Antrius: Antrius is the most charming Bard in all the realms. Having 2 extra "copies" of him in your formation won't make this variant more challenging, right?
restrictions.display:
安裘斯初始位于阵型中。他可以被移动，但不能被移除。
两个安裘斯的映像会占据阵型中的格子。这些映像仅仅是存在，实际上没有安裘斯的任何技能。
了解安裘斯：安裘斯是全世界最迷人的吟游诗人。阵型中多出两个他的“复制体”，不会提高支线任务的难度，对吧？

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Endless War (Antrius)" Costs 625 Bouquets to start
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“无止境的战争（安裘斯）” 花费 625 个花束开启

restrictions.original:
Antrius starts in the formation. He can be moved, but not removed.
Antrius starts out with Inspiring Song unlocked.
After area 5, Champions' health is set to 1 and can not be healed above this.
1-3 Skeleton Archers spawn with each wave. These enemies attack random targets. They do not drop gold, or count towards quest progress.
Getting to Know Antrius: Antrius provides temporary hit points to nearby allies, and if those allies have a high enough Charisma they can pass it on. Spread the hit points to the whole formation to survive!
restrictions.display:
安裘斯初始位于阵型中。他可以被移动，但不能被移除。
安裘斯初始已解锁激励之歌。
在区域 5 之后，勇士的生命值变为 1，并且无法通过治疗超越此数值。
每波额外刷新 1-3 名骷髅弓箭手。这些敌人攻击随机目标。它们不会掉落金币，也不计入任务进度。
了解安裘斯：安裘斯为附近的盟友提供临时生命值，如果这些盟友的魅力够高，则可以将此效果传递下去。将生命值扩散到整个阵型以存活下来！

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Endless War (Antrius)" Costs 1250 Bouquets to start
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“无止境的战争（安裘斯）” 花费 1250 个花束开启

restrictions.original:
Antrius starts in the formation. He can be moved, but not removed.
You can only use Champions who are Bards, or are Chaotic, or have a total ability score of 78 or lower.
Getting to Know Antrius: Antrius' specializations allow him to increase his damage buff based on the other Champions in the formation. Pick a specialization and build your formation around it to maximize your damage!
restrictions.display:
安裘斯初始位于阵型中。他可以被移动，但不能被移除。
只能使用吟游诗人、混乱阵营，或总属性值小于等于 78 的勇士。
了解安裘斯：安裘斯的专精使他能够依据阵型中其他勇士的数量强化伤害增益。选择一个专精，并依此编组你的阵型，从而最大限度地提高伤害！

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Endless War (Antrius)" Costs up to 2500 Bouquets to start
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“无止境的战争（安裘斯）” 花费最多 2500 个花束开启

restrictions.original: No restrictions
restrictions.display: 无限制

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Grandfather Acorn (Nixie)" Costs 250 Leaves to start
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“祖父橡果（妮茜）” 花费 250 片树叶开启

restrictions.original:
Nixie starts in the formation. She can be moved, but not removed.
Any Champions you use with the DPS role must have a CHA of 17+.
Getting to Know Nixie: Nixie's main buff increases the damage of Champions with a high Charisma, including herself.
restrictions.display:
妮茜初始位于阵型中。她可以被移动，但不能被移除。
担当伤害输出角色的任何勇士的魅力都必须达到 17+。
了解妮茜：妮茜的主要增益可使高魅力值勇士的伤害提高，包括她自己。

name.original: If the Trees are Thin, Let the Flames Begin!

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Grandfather Acorn (Nixie)" Costs 625 Leaves to start
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“祖父橡果（妮茜）” 花费 625 片树叶开启

restrictions.original:
Nixie starts in the formation. She can be moved, but not removed.
Nixie's Wild Magic Surge ability starts out unlocked.
Nixie attacks faster as her base attack cooldown is reduced by 2 seconds.
Nixie's base attacks sometimes accidentally light a random Champion on fire, damaging them for 20% of their max health.
Getting to Know Nixie: Nixie's attacks often come with unexpected results. Check out her Wild Magic Surge effects!
restrictions.display:
妮茜初始位于阵型中。她可以被移动，但不能被移除。
妮茜的野魔法涌动技能初始已解锁。
妮茜的基本攻击冷却时间缩短 2 秒，因此攻击速度加快。
妮茜的基本攻击有时会意外点燃一名随机勇士，使其受到最大生命值 20% 的伤害。
了解妮茜：妮茜的攻击往往附带意想不到的结果。快看看她的野魔法涌动效果！

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Grandfather Acorn (Nixie)" Costs 1250 Leaves to start
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“祖父橡果（妮茜）” 花费 1250 片树叶开启

restrictions.original:
Nixie starts in the formation. She can be moved, but not removed.
You may only use Champions that are Tieflings, Chaotic, or have a total ability score of 78 or lower.
Getting to Know Nixie: Nixie's specialization bonuses depend on the other Champions in the formation. Pick a specialization and build your formation around it to maximize your damage!
restrictions.display:
妮茜初始位于阵型中。她可以被移动，但不能被移除。
只能使用提夫林、混乱阵营，或总属性值小于等于 78 的勇士。
了解妮茜：妮茜的专精加成取决于阵型中的其他勇士。选择一个专精，并依此编组你的阵型，从而最大限度地提高伤害！

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Grandfather Acorn (Nixie)" Costs up to 2500 Leaves to start
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“祖父橡果（妮茜）” 花费最多 2500 片树叶开启

restrictions.original: No restrictions
restrictions.display: 无限制

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Mechanical Menace (Evandra)" Costs 250 Rusted Gears to start
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“机械威胁（伊万德拉）” 花费 250 个锈蚀的零件开启

restrictions.original:
Evandra starts in the formation. She can't be moved or removed.
Only Neutral (Good/Evil axis) Champions can deal damage.
Getting to Know Evandra: Evandra buffs the damage of Neutral (Good/Evil axis) Champions in the formation. Build your formation to make the best use of her abilities!
restrictions.display:
伊万德拉初始位于阵型中。她无法被移动或移除。
只有中立（以善良/邪恶划分时）的勇士才能造成伤害。
了解伊万德拉：伊万德拉会提高阵型中中立（以善良/邪恶划分时）勇士的伤害。编组阵型时务必充分利用她的技能！

name.display: 半精灵、粉红与吟游诗人

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Mechanical Menace (Evandra)" Costs 625 Rusted Gears to start
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“机械威胁（伊万德拉）” 花费 625 个锈蚀的零件开启

restrictions.original:
Evandra starts in the formation. She can't be moved or removed.
If you have them and they're not already on another adventure, Antrius and Nixie start unlocked and in the formation.
1-2 Mechanical Guards spawn with every wave. They don't drop gold, nor do they count towards quest progress.
Construct enemies move at 300% speed and deal 300% damage.
Getting to Know Evandra: Evandra is the Tank of the Awful Ones affiliation. Use them all to repel these mechanical menaces!
restrictions.display:
伊万德拉初始位于阵型中。她无法被移动或移除。
如果你拥有安裘斯和妮茜，并且他们没有正在进行另一场冒险，则两人开场解锁并位于阵型中。
每一波敌人中都将刷新 1-2 个机械守卫。它们不会掉落金币，也不计入任务进度。
构装生物敌人的移动速度达到 300%，造成 300% 的伤害。
了解伊万德拉：伊万德拉是恶人从属组织的坦克。使用它们来击退这些机械威胁！

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Mechanical Menace (Evandra)" Costs 1250 Rusted Gears to start
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“机械威胁（伊万德拉）” 花费 1250 个锈蚀的零件开启

restrictions.original:
Evandra starts in the formation. She can't be moved or removed.
You may only use Champions that are female, nonbinary, fighters, rangers, barbarians, paladins, or have a total ability score of 78 or less.
Getting to Know Evandra: Evandra's specialization bonuses depend on the other Champions in the formation. Pick the best specialization for your formation!
restrictions.display:
伊万德拉初始位于阵型中。她无法被移动或移除。
只能使用女性、非二元性别、战士、巡林客、野蛮人、圣武士，或总属性值小于等于 78 的勇士。
了解伊万德拉：伊万德拉的专精加成取决于阵型中的其他勇士。为你的阵型选择最佳专精！

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Mechanical Menace (Evandra)" Costs up to 2500 Rusted Gears to start
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“机械威胁（伊万德拉）” 花费最多 2500 个锈蚀的零件开启

restrictions.original: No restrictions
restrictions.display: 无限制

restrictions.original: Must have completed "Let Sleeping Dragons Lie (BBEG)" Costs 250 Dragon Claws to start
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“放倒沉睡巨龙（BBEG）” 花费 250 个龙爪开启

restrictions.original:
BBEG starts in the formation and can be moved, but not removed.
You may only use BBEG and/or Champions with an Intelligence of 12 or lower
Getting to Know BBEG: BBEG increases the damage of his less intelligent minions, like zombies.
restrictions.display:
BBEG 初始位于阵型中，可以被移动但不能被移除。
只能使用 BBEG 和/或智力为 12 及以下的勇士
了解 BBEG：BBEG 可提高不太聪明的随从的伤害，比如僵尸。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "Let Sleeping Dragons Lie (BBEG)" Costs 625 Dragon Claws to start
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“放倒沉睡巨龙（BBEG）” 花费 625 个龙爪开启

restrictions.original:
BBEG starts in the formation and can be moved, but not removed.
Every second, a cat spawns and moves towards a random champion. When the cat reaches the champion, they are stunned for 3 seconds because of overwhelming cuteness. The cats can't be attacked.
Stunned Champions can not attack, but their formation abilities remain enabled.
Getting To Know Pat: Pat is the long-suffering Dungeon Master for the Awful Ones and runs all the NPCs, including the BBEG. Herd those cats and stop this homebrew adventure from going off the rails!
restrictions.display:
BBEG 初始位于阵型中，可以被移动但不能被移除。
每一秒刷新一只猫，并向一名随机勇士移动。被猫接触到勇士时会因为难以抗拒的可爱而被眩晕 3 秒。猫无法受到攻击。
被眩晕的勇士无法攻击，但他们的阵型技能仍然有效。
了解帕特：帕特是受难已久的恶人地下城主，掌管着包括 BBEG 在内的所有 NPC。放牧那些猫，阻止这场自制冒险偏离轨道！

restrictions.original: Must have completed "Let Sleeping Dragons Lie (BBEG)" Costs 1250 Dragon Claws to start
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“放倒沉睡巨龙（BBEG）” 花费 1250 个龙爪开启

restrictions.original:
BBEG starts in the formation and can be moved, but not removed.
You may only use Lawful Champions, Evil Champions, or Champions with a total ability score of 78 or less.
Getting to know BBEG: BBEG's specialization bonuses depend on the other Champions in the formation. Pick a specialization and build your formation around it to maximize your damage!
restrictions.display:
BBEG 初始位于阵型中，可以被移动但不能被移除。
只能使用守序勇士、邪恶勇士，或总属性值小于等于 78 的勇士。
了解 BBEG：BBEG 的专精加成取决于阵型中的其他勇士。选择一个专精，并依此编组你的阵型，从而最大限度地提高伤害！

restrictions.original: Must have completed "Let Sleeping Dragons Lie (BBEG)" Costs up to 2500 Dragon Claws to start
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“放倒沉睡巨龙（BBEG）” 花费最多 2500 个龙爪开启

restrictions.original: No restrictions
restrictions.display: 无限制

restrictions.original: Must have completed "Party Crashers (Strongheart)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“不速之客（强心）”

restrictions.original:
Strongheart starts in the formation and can be moved, but not removed.
Only Strongheart and Champions next to him can deal damage.
Getting to know Strongheart: Strongheart increases the damage of adjacent Champions. Build the best formation to take advantage of this!
restrictions.display:
强心初始位于阵型中，他可以被移动，但不能从阵型中移除。
只有强心和与他相邻的勇士可以造成伤害。
了解强心：强心会提高相邻勇士的伤害。建立最佳阵型，以充分利用这一点！

restrictions.original: Must have completed "Party Crashers (Strongheart)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“不速之客（强心）”

restrictions.original:
Strongheart starts in the formation and can be moved, but not removed.
Only Strongheart and Good champions can deal damage.
Getting to know Strongheart: Strongheart is the leader of Valor's Call, a group of good aligned heroes. Pick the right specialization to support good champions!
restrictions.display:
强心初始位于阵型中，他可以被移动，但不能从阵型中移除。
只有强心和善良阵营的勇士才能造成伤害。
了解强心：强心是英勇召唤的领袖，这是由善良勇士组成的队伍。挑选正确的专精以便支持善良的勇士！

restrictions.original: Must have completed "Party Crashers (Strongheart)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“不速之客（强心）”

restrictions.original:
Strongheart starts in the formation and can be moved, but not removed.
Only Strongheart and Champions from the affiliation with the most members in the formation can deal damage.
Getting to know Strongheart: Strongheart can become an honorary member of any affiliation. Pick the right specialization to have him join your favorite team!
restrictions.display:
强心初始位于阵型中，他可以被移动，但不能从阵型中移除。
只有强心以及与阵型大多数成员来自相同从属组织的勇士才能造成伤害。
了解强心：强心可以成为任何从属组织的荣誉成员。挑选正确的专精，让他加入你最喜爱的队伍！

restrictions.original: Must have completed "Party Crashers (Strongheart)"

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Missing Lord (Vin Ursa)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“失踪的领主（文·乌尔萨）”

restrictions.original:
Vin Ursa starts in the formation. She can be moved, but not removed.
Only Champions in the front two columns can deal damage.
Getting to know Vin Ursa: Vin Ursa's first specialization choice determines the target of her main positional support abilities. Choose wisely!
restrictions.display:
文·乌尔萨初始位于阵型中。她可以被移动，但不能被移除。
只有处于阵型最前两列的勇士能造成伤害。
了解文·乌尔萨：文·乌尔萨的第一个专精选择决定了她主要位置支援技能的目标。请谨慎选择！

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Missing Lord (Vin Ursa)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“失踪的领主（文·乌尔萨）”

restrictions.original:
Vin Ursa starts in the formation with her Bounty Hunter and ultimate abilities unlocked. She can be moved, but not removed.
Each wave, an extra monster with a random monster type spawns. It drops no gold nor does it count towards quest progress.
Every 10 areas, all monster health is increased by an additional 100%, stacking multiplicatively.
Getting to know Vin Ursa: Champions in the formation deal extra damage and benefit from additional gold drops when defeating Vin Ursa's favored foe. Use her ultimate to add more favored foe types to her list!
restrictions.display:
文·乌尔萨初始位于阵型中，并已解锁她的“赏金猎人”和杀招技能。她可以被移动，但不能被移除。
每一波都会额外刷新一只随机类型的怪物。它不会掉落金币，也不计入任务进度。
每过 10 个区域，所有怪物额外增加 100% 生命值，以乘算方式堆叠。
了解文·乌尔萨：在击败文·乌尔萨的偏好对手时，阵型中的勇士会造成额外伤害，并获得额外的金币掉落。用她的杀招来添加更多偏好对手类型！

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Missing Lord (Vin Ursa)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“失踪的领主（文·乌尔萨）”

restrictions.original:
Vin Ursa starts in the formation. She can be moved, but not removed.
Only Champions from the most represented alignment(s) on the good/evil axis can deal damage.
Getting to know Vin Ursa: Vin Ursa's second specialization choice boosts the damage of Champions of a particular alignment. Pick the best one for the Champions in your formation!
restrictions.display:
文·乌尔萨初始位于阵型中。她可以被移动，但不能被移除。
只有最具代表性的阵营（以善良/邪恶划分时）中的勇士可以造成伤害。
了解文·乌尔萨：文·乌尔萨的第二专精选择可以提升特定阵营勇士的伤害。选择最适合你阵型中勇士的专精！

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Missing Lord (Vin Ursa)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“失踪的领主（文·乌尔萨）”

restrictions.original: No restrictions

restrictions.original: Must have completed "Reclaiming the Past (Lae'zel)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“重拾过去（莱埃泽尔）”

restrictions.original:
Lae'zel starts in the formation. She can't be moved or removed.
Only Champions in Lae'zel's column can deal damage.
Getting to know Lae'zel: Lae'zel increases the damage of all champions in her column, including herself. Place your champions to best take advantage of this!
restrictions.display:
莱埃泽尔初始位于阵型中。她无法被移动或移除。
只有与莱埃泽尔同列的勇士能造成伤害。
了解莱埃泽尔：莱埃泽尔会提高她自己与同列所有勇士的伤害。谨慎放置你的勇士，以充分利用此特性！

restrictions.original: Must have completed "Reclaiming the Past (Lae'zel)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“重拾过去（莱埃泽尔）”

restrictions.original:
Lae'zel starts in the formation with her Straight to the Point ability unlocked. She can't be moved or removed.
You may only use Champions with a base attack cooldown of 5 seconds or faster. 
Getting to know Lae'zel: Lae'zel is impatient when facing weak foes. She'll occasionally skip the rest of an area when the enemies aren't challenging enough!
restrictions.display:
莱埃泽尔初始位于阵型中，并已解锁她的“单刀直入”技能。她无法被移动或移除。
只能使用基本攻击冷却时间小于等于 5 秒的勇士。
了解莱埃泽尔：莱埃泽尔面对弱小敌人时会不耐烦。如果敌人不够强大，她有时会跳过区域中剩下的部分！

restrictions.original: Must have completed "Reclaiming the Past (Lae'zel)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“重拾过去（莱埃泽尔）”

restrictions.original:
Lae'zel starts in the formation with her Lethal Coordination, Ceremorphosis and Aberration Hunter abilities unlocked. She can't be moved or removed.
You may only use Lae'zel and Champions with an Intelligence of 13 or higher.
A Mind Flayer spawns with each wave. They don't drop gold nor do they count for quest progress.
Getting to know Lae'zel: Aberrations like Mind Flayers are Lae'zel's favored foe. Her main buff increases as more of them spawn
restrictions.display:
莱埃泽尔初始位于阵型中，并已解锁她的“致命配合”、“蜕变”和“异怪猎人”技能。她无法被移动或移除。
只能使用莱埃泽尔和智力大于等于 13 的勇士。
每一波都会刷新一个夺心魔。它们不会掉落金币，也不计入任务进度。
了解莱埃泽尔：夺心魔这样的异怪是莱埃泽尔的偏好对手。偏好对手刷新得越多，她的主增益就越强。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "Reclaiming the Past (Lae'zel)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“重拾过去（莱埃泽尔）”

Astarion joins the formation. He can be moved, but not removed.
Only Champions in the top or bottom slot of each column can deal damage.
Getting to know Astarion: Astarion's specialization can increase the damage of Champions on the top or bottom edge of the formation. Make the best choice for your formation!
restrictions.display:
阿斯代伦加入阵型。他可以被移动，但不能被移除。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "Brightly into Darkness (Astarion)"

阿斯代伦加入阵型。他可以被移动，但不能被移除。
你只能使用年龄在 50 岁及以上的勇士。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "Brightly into Darkness (Astarion)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“光明踏入黑暗（阿斯代伦）”

restrictions.original:
Astarion joins the formation. He can be moved, but not removed.

restrictions.display:
阿斯代伦加入阵型。他可以被移动，但不能被移除。

了解阿斯代伦：当阿斯代伦得到自身压制技能的强化时，可以减少阵型内其他勇士的杀招冷却时间。

You may only use dwarf, goblin, halfling, or kobold champions.

All monsters are 50% smaller in size, but move +300% faster.

格里姆加入阵型，旨在寻找她的姐妹。她的帮助可以使相邻勇士的基本攻击速度冷却时间减少 1 秒，并使其伤害提高 1000%。
你只能使用最高属性值（包括等值）为敏捷的勇士。

只能使用感知不是其最低两个属性之一的勇士。
一棵古老而睿智的柳树树精加入阵型。它太大了，占据了你阵型中的三个栏位，但除此之外就没什么作用了。

敌人每次所受的伤害最多不超过其最大生命值的 25%。
勇士每次所受的伤害最少不低于其最大生命值的 10%。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Court of Storms"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“风暴庭院”

restrictions.original: No restrictions
restrictions.display: 无限制

restrictions.original: Must have completed "Beware the Jabberwock"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“小心炸脖龙”

restrictions.original:
Every second of real-time in an area reduces all Champion damage by 50%, stacking multiplicatively. Damage is reset to normal at the start of every area.
To mark each real-time second passing, a Fey Duck monster spawns. It drops no gold nor counts towards quest progress.
restrictions.display:
在一个区域内，现实中每一秒均使所有勇士的伤害降低 50%，以乘算方式堆叠。每个区域开始时，伤害重置为正常。
现实中每过一秒均会刷新一只鸭子精以做标记。它不会掉落金币，也不计入任务进度。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "Beware the Jabberwock" and 53 Completed Wild Beyond the Witchlight adventures or variants
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“小心炸脖龙”并已完成 53 次女巫之光的荒野之旅冒险或支线任务

restrictions.original:
You may only use Champions with a melee base attack.
Champions' critical hit chances get a +20% additive bonus and critical damage get a 1000% multiplicative bonus.
restrictions.display:
只能使用以近战为基本攻击方式的勇士。
勇士的暴击几率得到 +20% 加成（以加算方式堆叠），暴击伤害得到 1000% 加成（以乘算方式堆叠）。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "Beware the Jabberwock"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“小心炸脖龙”

restrictions.original:
You may only use Champions that are not a Standard Species. Standard species are Aasimar, Dragonborn, Dwarf, Elf, Gnome, Goliath, Halfling, Human, Orc, Tiefling, Half-Orc, and Half-Elf.
If a Thri-Kreen Champion is in the formation, click damage is disabled and Fire Breath potions have no effect.
restrictions.display:
只能使用属于非标准种族的勇士。标准种族是指神裔、龙裔、矮人、精灵、侏儒、巨人、半身人、人类、兽人、提夫林、半兽人和半精灵。
如果阵型中有螳螂人勇士，点击伤害将被禁用，火息药剂也会失效。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "Beware the Jabberwock"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“小心炸脖龙”

restrictions.original: No restrictions
restrictions.display: 无限制

restrictions.original: Must have completed "Legends and Lore"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“传说故事”

restrictions.original:
You may only use Champions with the Wizard, Sorcerer, Warlock, or Bard class.
A Lesser Earth Elemental with 4 armored health spawns with each wave. They drop no gold nor count toward quest progress.
restrictions.display:
你只能使用法师、术士、邪术师或吟游诗人职业的勇士。
每波都会刷新一个 4 点重甲生命值的小型土元素。它们不会掉落金币，也不计入任务进度。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "Legends and Lore"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“传说故事”

restrictions.original:
You may only use Drow, Githyanki, Githzerai, Aarakocra, and Tabaxi Champions.
A Flumph escort joins the formation. Only Champions next to the Flumph can deal damage.
1-2 Mezzoloths spawn with each wave. They don't drop gold nor count towards quest progress.
A Shadow Demon spawns at the start of each Boss area. It must also be defeated to progress.
restrictions.display:
只能使用卓尔精灵、吉斯洋基人、吉斯泽莱人、翼爪鸟人和斑猫人勇士。
一个呋噜护卫加入阵型。只有与该呋噜相邻的勇士可以造成伤害。
每波会刷新 1-2 个麦泽罗斯魔。它们不会掉落金币，也不计入任务进度。
每个首领区域开始时会刷新一个影魔。必须将它一并击败，游戏才能继续。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "Legends and Lore"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“传说故事”

restrictions.original:
You may only use Cleric and/or Paladin Champions. In addition, you may use Aasimar champions.
1-2 Shadar-kai Warriors spawn with each wave. They don't drop gold nor count towards quest progress.
restrictions.display:
只能使用牧师和/或圣武士勇士。此外，你可以使用神裔勇士。
每波会刷新 1-2 个影灵战士。它们不会掉落金币，也不计入任务进度。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "Legends and Lore"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“传说故事”

restrictions.original: No restrictions
restrictions.display: 无限制

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The End"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“谢幕”

restrictions.original:
You may only use Champions with an ability score total of 78 or less.
A bard joins the formation. They distract adjacent Champions by talking about a play, increasing their base attack cooldowns by 3 seconds.
restrictions.display:
只能使用总属性值小于等于 78 的勇士。
一名吟游诗人加入阵型。他们会通过谈论戏剧来吸引相邻勇士的注意力，使其基本攻击的冷却时间增加 3 秒。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The End"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“谢幕”

restrictions.original:
You may only use Chaotic Champions.
Each time an enemy is defeated, Champion damage is reduced by 90% until the area changes, stacking multiplicatively.
restrictions.display:
只能使用混乱阵营的勇士。
每当一个敌人被击败，勇士伤害降低 90%，持续到变换区域为止，以乘算方式堆叠。

name.display: 离别是如此甜蜜的忧伤

restrictions.original: Must have completed all other The Wild beyond the Witchlight adventures and variants.
restrictions.display: 必须已完成所有其他女巫之光的荒野之旅冒险和支线任务。

restrictions.original:
Champions with the DPS role can't be removed from the formation once they have been added.
Every 50 areas, all Champions with the DPS role are removed from the formation and can not be used again in the adventure.
Fire breath potions can't be used during the adventure, and click damage has no effect after area 100.
restrictions.display:
拥有伤害输出角色定位的勇士一旦被添加到阵型中，就不能移出。
每完成 50 个区域，所有拥有伤害输出角色定位的勇士会被移出阵型，并无法再在本次冒险中使用。
冒险过程中不能使用火息药剂，并且点击伤害在区域 100 之后无效。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The End"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“谢幕”

restrictions.original: No restrictions
restrictions.display: 无限制

restrictions.original: Must have completed "Rocky Reception"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“巨岩招待”

restrictions.original:
Three Wildspace Patrons join the formation. Starting with area 16, they leave and are replaced with Large Luigi, the bartender.
Every 5 seconds, Large Luigi uses his telekinesis eye ray to propel a tankard of ale at the enemy with the most health. This enrages the enemy, causing them to take +100% more damage, but they deal +100% more damage, both stacking multiplicatively.
restrictions.display:
三名蛮荒太空赞助者加入阵型。从区域 16 开始，他们将离开并替换为酒保大块头路易吉。
每隔 5 秒，大块头路易吉就会运用他的念动眼球射线向生命值最高的敌人发射一大杯麦酒。这会激怒敌人，使其受到的伤害 +100%，但他们造成的伤害也 +100%，均以乘算方式堆叠。

restrictions.original:
Must have completed "Rocky Reception"
Must have completed 22 Light of Xaryxis adventures or variants
restrictions.display:
必须已完成“巨岩招待”
必须已完成 22 次萨雷西斯之光冒险或支线任务

restrictions.original:
1-2 Emperor Vecna Cultists spawn with each wave. They don't drop gold nor count towards quest progress.
In non-boss areas, non-Vecna Cultist monsters are immune from damage until all Emperor Vecna Cultists are defeated.
You can only use Champions with a Constitution of 13 or lower.
restrictions.display:
每波刷新 1-2 个皇帝维克那信徒。它们不会掉落金币，也不计入任务进度。
在非首领区域，非维克那信徒怪物不会受到伤害，直到所有皇帝维克那信徒被击败。
只能使用体质小于等于 13 的勇士。

restrictions.original: Must have completed
restrictions.display: 必须已完成

restrictions.original:
The weather is snowing in all areas
You may only use Champions with a Constitution score of 15 or higher.
1-2 Hares spawn with each wave. They don't drop gold nor count towards quest progress.
Each time a Beast is defeated, all enemies for the rest of the area get a +100% boost in speed and damage, stacking additively and capping at 10.
restrictions.display:
所有区域的天气都为降雪
只能使用体质大于等于 15 的勇士。
每波会刷新 1-2 只野兔。它们不会掉落金币，也不计入任务进度。
每当一名兽类敌人被击败后，该区域剩余的所有敌人获得 +100% 速度和伤害加成，以加算方式堆叠，最多堆叠 10 层。

restrictions.original: Must have completed Rocky Reception
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“巨岩招待”

restrictions.original: No restrictions
restrictions.display: 无限制

restrictions.original: Must have completed "Rock and Roll"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“岩石摇滚”

restrictions.original:
Only Champions with a magic base attack can deal damage.
Every 5 seconds, a bolt of lightning strikes the Champion that dealt the most damage in the last 5 seconds. This bolt deals 20% of the champion's total health in damage and stuns them for 12 seconds. The stun duration is reduced by 1 second for each Bard in the formation.
restrictions.display:
只有以魔法为基本攻击方式的勇士才能造成伤害。
每隔 5 秒，一道闪电击中在之前 5 秒内造成最大伤害的勇士。这道闪电造成勇士总生命值 20% 的伤害，并使其眩晕 12 秒。阵型中的每位吟游诗人均使眩晕持续时间减少 1 秒。

restrictions.original:
Must have completed "Rock and Roll"
Must have completed 23 Light of Xaryxis adventures or variants
restrictions.display:
必须已完成“逃离巨岩”
必须已完成 23 次萨雷西斯之光冒险或支线任务

restrictions.original:
Only Champions with a ranged base attack can deal damage.
After area 25, you can't remove Champions from the formation.
After every 50 areas, a random non-Bard Champion is removed from the formation and can't be used for the rest of the adventure.
restrictions.display:
只有以远程为基本攻击方式的勇士可以造成伤害。
区域 25 之后，你无法将勇士从阵型中移除。
每经过 50 个区域后，就会有一名随机的非吟游诗人勇士从阵型中移除，并无法在剩下的冒险中使用。

restrictions.original: Must have completed
restrictions.display: 必须已完成

restrictions.original:
You may only use Core Champions and Champions released in the first 2 years.
1-2 Skeletal Horses spawn with every wave. They don't drop gold nor count towards quest progress.
restrictions.display:
只能使用核心勇士和头 2 年发布的勇士。
每波会刷新 1-2 匹骷髅马。它们不会掉落金币，也不计入任务进度。

restrictions.original: Must have completed Rock and Roll
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“逃离巨岩”

restrictions.original: No restrictions
restrictions.display: 无限制

restrictions.original: Must have completed Flight of the Kindori Pod
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“一群飞行的金多利”

restrictions.original:
An asteroid spawns with each wave. If it reaches a Champion, it explodes dealing 50% of the Champion's max health in damage to that Champion. The asteroid drops no gold nor counts toward quest progress.
Only Chaotic champions can deal damage.
restrictions.display:
每一波都会刷新一颗小行星。如果它接近勇士，它会爆炸并对该勇士造成相当于其最大生命值 50% 的伤害。小行星不会掉落金币，也不计入任务进度。
只有混乱阵营勇士才能造成伤害。

restrictions.original:
Must have completed Flight of the Kindori Pod
Must have completed 28 Light of Xaryxis adventures or variants
restrictions.display:
必须已完成“一群飞行的金多利”
必须已完成 28 次萨雷西斯之光冒险或支线任务

restrictions.original:
You may only use Champions in odd bench seats.
A Tin Soldier and a Modron Slot Machine join the formation.
restrictions.display:
只能使用奇数出战栏位中的勇士。
一名锡兵和一台魔冢角子机加入阵型。

restrictions.original: Must have completed Flight of the Kindori Pod
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“一群飞行的金多利”

restrictions.original:
You may only use Chaotic Champions.
The ground quakes every 30 seconds. The quakes cause a screenshake and debris to hit the Champions, subjecting each Champion to a DEX save. On a failure, they take damage equal to 75% of their max health and are Stunned for 15 seconds
restrictions.display:
只能使用混乱阵营的勇士。
每 30 秒会发生一次地震。地震会导致屏幕抖动，并且会有碎片砸向勇士们，每名勇士都要进行一次敏捷豁免检定。没有通过豁免检定的勇士会受到等同于其最大生命值 75% 的伤害，并被眩晕 15 秒

restrictions.original: Must have completed Flight of the Kindori Pod
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“一群飞行的金多利”

restrictions.original: No restrictions
restrictions.display: 无限制

restrictions.original: Must have completed Topolah's Tower
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“托波拉的塔”

restrictions.original:
Commodore Krux joins the formation.
Every 240 seconds of real time play, a random Champion is transported away, removing them from the formation. They are unavailable for the rest of the adventure.
Champions can't be removed from the formation once they've been added.
restrictions.display:
克鲁克斯准将加入阵型。
在实时游戏中，每隔 240 秒就会传送走一名随机勇士，将他们移出阵型。他们在接下来的冒险中将无法使用。
加入阵型的勇士不能被移除。

restrictions.original: Must have completed Krux's Speed Run
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“克鲁克斯的速通”

restrictions.original:
Commodore Krux joins the formation.
Every 120 seconds of real time play, a random Champion is transported away, removing them from the formation. They are unavailable for the rest of the adventure.
Champions can't be removed from the formation once they've been added.
Fire breath potions can't be used during the adventure, and click damage has no effect after area 100.
restrictions.display:
克鲁克斯准将加入阵型。
在实时游戏中，每隔 120 秒就会传送走一名随机勇士，将他们移出阵型。他们在接下来的冒险中将无法使用。
加入阵型的勇士不能被移除。
冒险过程中不能使用火息药剂，并且区域 100 之后，点击伤害无效。

restrictions.original: Must have completed Topolah's Tower
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“托波拉的塔”

restrictions.original:
Krux starts in the formation. He can be moved, but not removed.
Each wave, 1-2 additional enemies with a random monster type spawns. They drop no gold nor count towards quest progress.
Each time an enemy that is NOT any Champion's favored foe is defeated, the enemies gain an Unfavored stack. Enemy speed and damage is increased by 100% for each Unfavored stack, stacking additively. Unfavored stacks cap at 10 and are reset when changing areas.
restrictions.display:
克鲁克斯初始位于阵型中。他可以被移动，但不能被移除。
每波会额外刷新 1-2 只随机类型的怪物。它们不会掉落金币，也不计入任务进度。
每当有一名不属于任何阵型中勇士偏好对手的敌人被击败后，所有敌人获得一层“非偏好”堆叠层数。敌人每拥有一层“非偏好”堆叠层数，其速度和伤害提高 100%，以加算方式堆叠。“非偏好”堆叠层数的上限为 10，并会在变更区域时重置。

restrictions.original: Must have completed Topolah's Tower
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“托波拉的塔”

restrictions.original: No restrictions
restrictions.display: 无限制

name.original: The Chaotic Hunt for The Last Breath

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Hunt for The Last Breath"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“寻找残息号”

restrictions.original: You may only use Chaotic champions.
restrictions.display: 你只能使用混乱阵营的勇士。

name.original: The Arcane Hunt for the Last Breath
name.display: 寻找“残息号”的奥术之旅

restrictions.original:
Must have completed "The Hunt for The Last Breath"
Must have completed 34 Light of Xaryxis adventures or variants
restrictions.display:
必须已完成“寻找残息号”
必须已完成 34 次萨雷西斯之光冒险或支线任务

restrictions.original:
You may only use Champions with a magical base attack.
1-2 Harmonium Peacekeepers spawn with each wave. They don't drop gold or count towards quest progress.
restrictions.display:
只能使用用有魔法基本攻击的勇士。
每波攻势都会刷新 1-2 个和谐会维和者。它们不会掉落金币，也不计入任务进度。

name.original: The Devilish Hunt for the Last Breath
name.display: 寻找“残息号”的魔鬼之旅

restrictions.original: Must have completed
restrictions.display: 必须已完成

restrictions.original: You may only use Tiefling Champions
restrictions.display: 只能使用提夫林勇士。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Hunt for The Last Breath"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“寻找残息号”

restrictions.original: No restrictions
restrictions.display: 无限制

name.original: There's a Flying Snake in my Boot!
name.display: 我的靴子里有一条飞蛇！

restrictions.original: Must have completed "To Infinity's and Beyond"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“不朽的尽头”

restrictions.original:
Each wave spawns 1-2 flying snakes. They don't drop gold nor count towards quest progress.
You may only use Champions with an INT of 13+.
restrictions.display:
每一波都会刷新 1-2 条飞蛇。它们不会掉落金币，也不计入任务进度。
你只能使用智力大于等于 13 的勇士。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "To Infinity's and Beyond" and 35 Light of Xaryxis adventures or variants
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“不朽的尽头”并已完成 35 次萨雷西斯之光冒险或支线任务

restrictions.original:
You may only use Fighter Champions.
1-2 constructs that are confused as Toys attack with each wave. They don't drop gold nor count towards quest progress.
restrictions.display:
只能使用战士型勇士。
每一波会有 1-2 个被误认为是玩具的构装生物发动攻击。它们不会掉落金币，也不计入任务进度。

restrictions.original: Must have completed
restrictions.display: 必须已完成

restrictions.original:
All the Champions are poisoned. Every second, Champions take damage equal to 2.5% of their max health.
Champions don't recover health when moving to a new area. 
Champions resurrect at half health when changing areas instead of full health.
1-2 watery elementals spawn with each wave. They don't drop gold nor count towards quest progress.
restrictions.display:
所有勇士都中毒了。每秒钟，勇士们会受到等同于他们最大生命值 2.5% 的伤害。
勇士在移动到新区域时不会恢复生命值。
改变区域时，复活的勇士只会恢复一半生命值而非全部。
每波会刷新 1-2 个水元素。它们不会掉落金币，也不计入任务进度。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "To Infinity's and Beyond"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“不朽的尽头”

restrictions.original: No restrictions
restrictions.display: 无限制

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Jungles of Doomspace"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“毁灭太空的丛林”

restrictions.original:
You may only use Champions with a CHA of 14+.
Whenever a Champion defeats an enemy, their base attack cooldown is increased by 1 second, up to a total of 10 seconds. This increase lasts until the area is changed.
restrictions.display:
只能使用魅力为 14+ 的勇士。
每当勇士击败一名敌人时，其基本攻击冷却时间增加 1 秒，总计最多增加 10 秒。增加的时间持续到变更区域为止。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Jungles of Doomspace" and 40 Light of Xaryxis adventures or variants
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“毁灭太空的丛林”并已完成 40 次萨雷西斯之光冒险或支线任务

restrictions.original:
You may only use Tanking Champions.
1-2 Vampires spawn with each wave. They don't drop gold, nor count towards quest progress.
restrictions.display:
只能使用坦克型勇士。
每波会刷新 1-2 个吸血鬼。它们不会掉落金币，也不计入任务进度。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Jungles of Doomspace"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“毁灭太空的丛林”

restrictions.original: Every 6 seconds, a random Champion falls asleep for 30 seconds. While asleep, they are stunned. Elves, Half-Elves, and Warforged are immune to this.
restrictions.display: 每隔 6 秒，一名随机勇士会睡着，持续 30 秒。他们在睡着期间会被眩晕。精灵、半精灵和机关人对此免疫。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Jungles of Doomspace"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“毁灭太空的丛林”

restrictions.original: No restrictions
restrictions.display: 无限制

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Arena of Blood"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“血之竞技场”

restrictions.original:
You may only use Champions with a WIS of 13 or less.
1 Space Clown spawns at the start of each (non-boss) area. The number of clowns increases by 1 for every 50 areas completed. They don't drop gold nor do they count towards quest progress.
restrictions.display:
只能使用感知小于等于 13 的勇士。
每个非首领区域开始时，刷新 1 个太空小丑。每完成 50 个区域，小丑的数量增加 1。它们不会掉落金币，也不计入任务进度。

现实时间每 10 秒，勇士因堡垒的魔法防御受到自身总生命值 25% 的伤害。该速度每过 100 区域加快 0.5 秒（极限 1/秒）
只能使用没有速度标签的三名勇士。

restrictions.original:
Every 50 areas starting at area 1, a 15 minute countdown starts. If the countdown hits zero before getting through the 50 areas, every Champion in the formation is removed and can't be used for the rest of the adventure.
Anytime there are less than 10 minutes left in the countdown you can't remove Champions from the formation.
restrictions.display:
从区域 1 开始，每 50 个区域开始一个 15 分钟的倒数计时。若在穿越 50 个区域之前倒计时归零，则阵型中的所有勇士均被移除，并无法在剩下的冒险中使用。
无论何时，若倒计时剩余时间少于 10 分钟，则无法从阵型中移除勇士。

restrictions.original:
Every 50 areas starting at area 1, a 10 minute countdown starts. If the countdown hits zero before getting through the 50 areas, every Champion in the formation is removed and can't be used for the rest of the adventure.
Anytime there are less than 7 minutes left in the countdown you can't remove Champions from the formation. This restriction is removed when the countdown timer reaches 0 until the countdown starts again.
restrictions.display:
从区域 1 开始，每 50 个区域开始一个 10 分钟的倒数计时。若在穿越 50 个区域之前倒计时归零，则阵型中的所有勇士均被移除，并无法在剩下的冒险中使用。
无论何时，若倒计时剩余时间少于 7 分钟，则无法从阵型中移除勇士。倒计时到零后，此项限制会被移除，直到重新开始倒计时。

restrictions.original:
Certainty Dran joins the formation. She can't be moved or removed.
Only Certainty and Champions in the row in front of her can deal damage.
Getting to Know Certainty: Certainty increases the damage of Champions in the column in front of her. Place your damage dealers in front of her to make the most of her abilities!
restrictions.display:
瑟登缇·德兰加入阵型。她无法被移动或移除。
只有瑟登缇和处于她前列的勇士能造成伤害。
了解瑟登缇：瑟登缇会提高她前列勇士的伤害。将你的伤害输出者放置在她的前面，从而充分利用她的技能！

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Bandit's Harvest (Certainty)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“强盗的收割（瑟登缇）”

restrictions.original:
Certainty Dran joins the formation. She can be moved, but not removed.
Quest requirements are doubled.
Enemies defeated by Acquisition Incorporated and "C"-Team affiliation members drop double quest items and count for double quest progress.
Getting to Know Certainty: Certainty's damage buff and gold find increases as you level members of Acq Inc and the "C"-Team.
restrictions.display:
瑟登缇·德兰加入阵型。她可以被移动，但不能被移除。
任务要求翻倍。
被艾奎兹玄有限责任公司和“C”小队成员击败的敌人会掉落双倍任务物品，并计算双倍任务进度。
了解瑟登缇：随着你升级艾奎兹玄有限责任公司和“C”小队的成员，瑟登缇的伤害增益和金币寻获量会增加。

Getting to Know Certainty: Certainty's specialization choice makes her work better with Champions with a high Intelligence or Charisma. Which stat will you focus on?
restrictions.display:
瑟登缇·德兰加入阵型。她可以被移动，但不能被移除。
只能使用智力和/或魅力大于等于 14 的勇士。

You may only use Champions with a STR of 12 or less, Female/Non-Binary Champions, or Speed champions.
Getting to know Thellora: Thellora's specialization gives a secondary boost to certain types of Champions. Choose the best option for your formation!
restrictions.display:
德萝拉初始位于阵型中。她无法被移动或移除。
只能使用力量小于等于 12 的勇士，或女性/无性别勇士，或速度型勇士。
了解德萝拉：德萝拉的专精对某些类型的勇士有二次加成。选择最适合你的阵型吧！

Thellora starts in the formation. She can't be moved or removed.
For the first ten areas, non-boss quest requirements are multiplied by 10!
With every non-boss enemy wave, a Fire Elemental spawns with 10 armored hit points. This enemy does not drop gold or count toward quest progress.
Getting to know Thellora: Thellora has the ability to rush through early areas if you've charged her up in previous runs. Get her Rush stacks to 10 and your favor for the event above 10 billion (1e10) and leap through these difficult areas!
restrictions.display:
德萝拉初始位于阵型中。她无法被移动或移除。
前十个区域的非首领任务要求变为 10 倍！
每一个非首领波次会生成一个有着 10 点重甲生命值的火元素。此敌人不会掉落金币，也不计入任务进度。
了解德萝拉：如果你在之前的冒险中让德萝拉充满了能量，那她将可以冲过早期的区域。让她的猛冲堆叠到 10 层，并积累到超过 100 亿（1e10）的活动恩赐，然后跳过这些困难的区域吧！

Jang Sao joins the formation. She can't be moved or removed.
Only Champions in formation slots with 2 or fewer adjacent slots can deal damage.
Getting to Know Jang Sao: Jang Sao increases the damage of Champions in formation slots with 2 or fewer neighboring slots. Place your Champions to take advantage of this!
restrictions.display:
江魈加入阵型。她无法被移动或移除。
只有阵型栏位中相邻栏位为 2 个或以下的勇士才能造成伤害。
了解江魈：江魈使阵型栏位中相邻栏位为 2 个或以下的勇士造成的伤害提高。放置勇士使务必充分利用此特性！

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Crypt of Legends (Jang Sao)".
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“传说的墓穴（江魈）”。

restrictions.original:
Jang Sao joins the formation. She can be moved, but not removed.
You may only use Champions with a DEX of 15+ or a WIS of 13+.
Getting to Know Jang Sao: Jang Sao's specialization choice encourages you to build a formation with high DEX or high WIS. Build your best formation with these restrictions!
restrictions.display:
江魈加入阵型。她可以被移动，但不能被移除。
只能使用敏捷为 15+ 或感知为 13+ 的勇士。
了解江魈：江魈的专精选择鼓励你构建高敏捷或高感知的阵型。利用这些限制构建最佳阵型！

restrictions.display: 必须已完成“传说的墓穴（江魈）”。

Jang Sao joins the formation. She can be moved, but not removed.
2-3 Astral Elves spawn with each wave. They don't drop gold, nor do they count towards quest progress.
A Star and Moon each fill a slot in the formation.
Getting to Know Jang Sao: Jang Sao travels the cosmos collecting stars. Her star collection persists between adventures, strengthening her powers the more she journeys!
restrictions.display:
江魈加入阵型。她可以被移动，但不能被移除。
每波刷新 2-3 个星界精灵。他们不会掉落金币，也不计入任务进度。
一颗星星和一颗月亮分别填满阵型中的一个栏位。
了解江魈：江魈周游宇宙，收集星星。她的星星收藏可在不同冒险之间维持，旅途越长力量越强！

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Crypt of Legends (Jang Sao)".

restrictions.original:
Shadowheart joins the formation. She can't be moved or removed.
Only Shadowheart and Champions within two slots of her can deal damage (following the shortest path).
Getting to Know Shadowheart: Shadowheart increases the damage of all Champions within two slots of her. Place your damage dealing Champions to take advantage of this!
restrictions.display:
影心加入阵型。她无法被移动或移除。
只有影心与距离她两个栏位以内的勇士可以造成伤害（按最短路径计算）。
了解影心：影心使距离她两个栏位以内的所有勇士伤害提高。放置你的伤害输出勇士，以充分利用这一点！

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Simril Spoilsport (Shadowheart)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“观星节扫兴者（影心）”

restrictions.original:
Shadowheart joins the formation. She can be moved, but not removed.
A wolf also joins the formation. It's so scary that Champions next to it deal no damage with their normal attacks.
Every 5 seconds, the wolf bites a Champion directly in front of it, dealing damage equal to 20% of the Champion's total health.
Getting to know Shadowheart: Shadowheart heals Champions in the two columns ahead of her. Place her to protect your tanks and anyone else that might be getting hurt!
restrictions.display:
影心加入阵型。她可以被移动，但不能被移除。
一头狼加入阵型。它太过可怕，与其相邻的勇士使用普通攻击时无法造成伤害。
每 5 秒，狼会咬一口正前方的一名勇士，造成相当于勇士总生命值 20% 的伤害。
了解影心：影心会治疗位于其前方两列的勇士。让她保护你的坦克和其他可能受伤的同伴！

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Simril Spoilsport (Shadowheart)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“观星节扫兴者（影心）”

restrictions.original:
Shadowheart joins the formation. She can be moved, but not removed.
Each Champion in the formation must have a unique DEX score.
Getting to know Shadowheart: Shadowheart summons an Illusionary Duplicate in the same slot as the Champion with the highest DEX. The Duplicate buffs and heals nearby Champions similar to Shadowheart herself.
restrictions.display:
影心加入阵型。她可以被移动，但不能被移除。
阵型中每位勇士的敏捷属性值必须各不相同。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Simril Spoilsport (Shadowheart)"
