Wyll joins the formation. He can be moved, but not removed.
Only Champions from the most represented species, classes, and affiliations in the formation may deal damage.
Getting to Know Wyll: Wyll's support abilities target the most represented race, class, or affiliation in the formation. Which trait are you going to build around?
restrictions.display:
威尔加入阵型。他可以被移动，但不能被移除。
只有阵型中最具代表性的种族、职业和从属组织的勇士可以造成伤害。
了解威尔：威尔的支援技能以阵型中具有最具代表性的种族、职业或从属组织的勇士为目标。准备围绕哪个特性进行构建？

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Merry Map Misadventure (Wyll)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“快乐地图灾祸（瓦尔）”

restrictions.original:
Wyll joins the formation. He can be moved, but not removed.
Squiddly also joins the formation to be taught how to fight by the Blade of Frontiers!
Each wave spawns an additional fiend. These foes don't drop gold nor count towards quest progress.
Getting to Know Wyll: Wyll's favored foes are Fiends, so the formation deals more damage against them when Wyll is in the formation.
restrictions.display:
威尔加入阵型。他可以被移动，但不能被移除。
斯奎迪同时加入阵型，成为被教导如何随“前线之刃”进行战斗的学徒！
每波额外刷新一只炼狱生物。这些敌人不会掉落金币，也不计入任务进度。
了解威尔：威尔偏好的敌人是炼狱生物，所以威尔在阵型中时，阵型可对炼狱生物造成更多伤害。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Merry Map Misadventure (Wyll)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“快乐地图灾祸（瓦尔）”

restrictions.original:
Wyll joins the formation. He can be moved, but not removed.
You may only use Champions with a melee or magic attack. And Astarion, 'cause he's special.
Only Wyll and Champions with a familiar assigned to level them up can deal damage.
Getting to Know Wyll: Wyll's Pact specializations allow you to choose between buffs for melee attackers, magic attacks, or familiars. Pick whichever makes the most sense for your formation.
restrictions.display:
威尔加入阵型。他可以被移动，但不能被移除。
你只能使用使用近战或魔法攻击的勇士。还有阿斯代伦 - 他是特别的。
仅限威尔和配备有魔宠，从而提升等级的勇士可造成伤害。
了解威尔：威尔的契约专精可让你在针对近战攻击者、魔法攻击或魔宠的增益间进行选择。选择最适合你阵型的专精吧。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Merry Map Misadventure (Wyll)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“快乐地图灾祸（瓦尔）”

restrictions.original: No restrictions
restrictions.display: 无限制

restrictions.original: Must have completed "Deadwinter Day (Karlach)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“仲冬节（卡菈克）”

restrictions.original:
Karlach joins the formation. She can't be moved or removed.
Only Champions in the front two columns can deal damage.
Getting to Know Karlach: As a tank, Karlach is best in the front of the formation. Will you use her as a support or as your main DPS?
restrictions.display:
卡菈克将加入阵型。她无法被移动或移除。
只有处于阵型最前两列的勇士能造成伤害。
了解卡菈克：作为坦克，卡菈克在阵型前方发挥最佳。你会用她作为支援，还是当作主要伤害输出？

restrictions.original: Must have completed "Deadwinter Day (Karlach)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“仲冬节（卡菈克）”

restrictions.original:
Karlach joins the formation. She can't be moved or removed.
Karlach starts with The Fury of Avernus and Rage abilities unlocked.
An animated Clive also joins the formation.
All damage against enemies is reduced to 1 until Karlach has at least 20 Rage stacks. (This includes click damage!)
Karlach gains an additional Rage stack whenever any other Champion in the formation attacks.
Getting to Know Karlach: Karlach's Rage kicks in after lots of attacks happen. If she's tanking a lot of enemies, her Rage will grow more quickly.
restrictions.display:
卡菈克将加入阵型。她无法被移动或移除。
卡菈克初始解锁阿弗纳斯之怒和激怒技能。
活过来的克莱夫一同加入阵型。
在卡菈克拥有至少 20 层“激怒”叠加前，对敌人造成的所有伤害均降低为 1。（包括点击伤害！）
阵型中所有其他勇士攻击时，卡菈克获得额外一层“激怒”叠加。
了解卡菈克：卡菈克的“激怒”会在发生许多次攻击后生效。如果她承担下许多敌人的攻击，“激怒”会增长得更快。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "Deadwinter Day (Karlach)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“仲冬节（卡菈克）”

restrictions.original:
Karlach joins the formation. She can't be moved or removed.
Other than Karlach, you may only use Champions with a STR of 10+ and a CHA of 13+.
Getting to Know Karlach: As Zariel's Champion, Karlach can always be used in Zariel Patron challenges. Which Champions will you use with her?
restrictions.display:
卡菈克将加入阵型（栏位 0）。她无法被移动或移除。
除卡菈克外，只能使用力量为 10+ 且魅力为 13+ 的勇士。
了解卡菈克：作为扎瑞尔的勇士，卡菈克随时都能在扎瑞尔赞助者挑战中使用。你会用哪些勇士和她搭配呢？

restrictions.original: Must have completed "Deadwinter Day (Karlach)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“仲冬节（卡菈克）”

restrictions.original: No restrictions
restrictions.display: 无限制

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Missing Merchants (Presto)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“失踪的商人（普雷斯托）”

restrictions.original:
Presto joins the formation. He can't be moved or removed.
Only Champions in the two columns in front of Presto can deal damage.
Getting to Know Presto: Presto increases the damage of Champions in the two columns in front of him. Place your damage dealers to take advantage of this!
restrictions.display:
普雷斯托加入阵型。他无法被移动或移除。
只有普雷斯托前方两列的勇士可以造成伤害。
了解普雷斯托：普雷斯托可以提高自身前方两列勇士的伤害。合理放置你的伤害输出勇士以利用这一点！

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Missing Merchants (Presto)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“失踪的商人（普雷斯托）”

restrictions.original:
Presto joins the formation. He can be moved, but not removed.
Varla also joins the formation. Champions next to her attack faster as their base attack cooldowns are reduced by 2 seconds.
Only monsters that have a debuff can take damage.
Getting to Know Presto: Presto's attacks debuff monsters, making them take additional damage and suffer other effects. Use him and other debuffing Champions to make it so you can damage these monsters!
restrictions.display:
普雷斯托加入阵型。他可以被移动，但不能被移除。
瓦拉也会加入阵型。与她相邻的勇士攻击速度提升，他们的基本攻击冷却时间会减少 2 秒。
只有拥有一项减益的怪物可以收到伤害。
了解普雷斯托：普雷斯托的攻击会对怪物造成减益，令这些怪物受到额外的伤害，同时承受其他效果。利用好他和其他减益性勇士，好让你能对这些怪物造成伤害！

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Missing Merchants (Presto)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“失踪的商人（普雷斯托）”

restrictions.original:
Presto joins the formation. He can be moved, but not removed.
At the start of each Boss area, Venger arrives on his nightmare as an additional boss that must be defeated.
You may only use Champions that have a Magic base attack, an age of 20 or younger, or have a total ability score of 78 or lower.
Getting to Know Presto: Presto's specialization bonuses depend on the other Champions in the formation. Pick a specialization and build your formation around it to maximize your damage!
restrictions.display:
普雷斯托加入阵型。他可以被移动，但不能被移除。
在每个首领区域的开始，温格带着他的噩梦，作为必须击败的追加首领袭来。
你只能使用拥有魔法基本攻击、年龄小于等于 20 岁，或者总属性值小于等于 78 的勇士。
了解普雷斯托：普雷斯托的专精奖励根据阵型中的其他勇士而定。选择一项专精并围绕其打造阵型，从而最大限度提升伤害吧！

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Missing Merchants (Presto)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“失踪的商人（普雷斯托）”

restrictions.original: No restrictions
restrictions.display: 无限制

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Unfair Sea (Dynaheir)" Costs 1000 Fresh Fishes to start
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“不公平的海（戴娜黑）” 花费 1000 条鲜鱼开启

restrictions.original:
Dynaheir joins the formation. She can be moved, but not removed.
You may only use Champions with a CON of 15 or higher.
Getting to Know Dynaheir: Dynaheir increases the damage of resilient heroes. Use as many as you can to get the most from her abilities!
restrictions.display:
戴娜黑加入阵型。她可被移动，但无法被移除。
只能使用体质大于等于 15 的勇士。
了解戴娜黑：戴娜黑可提升强韧英雄的伤害。尽可能多地使用这类英雄以发掘她能力的潜力！

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Unfair Sea (Dynaheir)" Costs 2500 Fresh Fishes to start
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“不公平的海（戴娜黑）” 花费 2500 条鲜鱼开启

restrictions.original:
Dynaheir joins the formation. She can be moved, but not removed.
Quest requirements are increased by 25% in non-boss areas.
A Red Wizard spawns with every wave in non-boss areas.
Getting to Know Dynaheir: Humanoids (and therefore Red Wizards) are Dynaheir's favored foe, and her favored foes have a chance to drop double quest progress when defeated!
restrictions.display:
戴娜黑加入阵型。她可以移动，但无法被移除。
非首领区域的任务要求提升 25%。
非首领区域中每一波追加刷新一名红袍法师。
了解戴娜黑：类人生物（因此包含红袍法师）是戴娜黑的偏好对手，在击败后有机会掉落双倍任务进展！

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Unfair Sea (Dynaheir)" Costs 5000 Fresh Fishes to start
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“不公平的海（戴娜黑）” 花费 5000 条鲜鱼开启

restrictions.original:
Dynaheir and Minsc join the formation. They can be moved, but not removed.
You may not use Tanking Champions.
Getting to Know Dynaheir: Minsc is Dynaheir's bodyguard. Use Dynaheir's specialization choice to turn him into a durable defender!
restrictions.display:
戴娜黑和明斯克加入阵型。他们可以移动，但不能被移除。
不可使用坦克勇士。
了解戴娜黑：明斯克是戴娜黑的护卫。使用戴娜黑的专精选择可将他变为一名持久善战的防御者！

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Unfair Sea (Dynaheir)" Costs up to 2500 Fresh Fishes to start
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“不公平的海（戴娜黑）” 花费最多 2500 条鲜鱼开启

restrictions.original: No restrictions
restrictions.display: 无限制

restrictions.original: Must have completed "A Fool's Errand (The Dark Urge)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“愚人的差事（邪念）”

restrictions.original:
The Dark Urge starts in the formation. He can be moved, but not removed.
Only Champions with the DPS role can deal damage.
Each wave spawns an Intellect Devourer. They don't drop gold or count towards quest progress.
Getting to Know the Dark Urge: The Dark Urge's damage is boosted by the number of enemies he has defeated, and this persists after you complete adventures.
restrictions.display:
邪念初始位于阵型中。他可以被移动，但不能被移除。
只有担任伤害输出角色的勇士可以造成伤害。
每波额外刷新一只噬脑怪。它们不会掉落金币，也不计入任务进度。
了解邪念：邪念的伤害根据自身击败的敌人数量提升，且会在完成冒险后持续存在。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "A Fool's Errand (The Dark Urge))"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“愚人的差事（邪念）”

restrictions.original:
The Dark Urge starts in the formation. He can be moved, but not removed.
You may only use Champions with the DPS role and/or members of the Absolute Adversaries or Heroes of Baldur's Gate affiliation.
Getting to Know The Dark Urge: The Dark Urge deals more damage when he is near the edge of the formation or next to DPS Champions. How will you maximize his damage?
restrictions.display:
邪念初始位于阵型中。他可以被移动，但不能被移除。
你只能使用具有伤害输出角色和/或“绝对敌手”或“博德之门的英雄们”从属组织成员的勇士。
了解邪念：邪念在阵型边缘或紧邻勇士伤害输出时可造成更大伤害。你要怎样去最大限度发挥他的伤害呢？

restrictions.original: Must have completed "A Fool's Errand (The Dark Urge)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“愚人的差事（邪念）”

restrictions.original:
The Dark Urge starts in the formation. He can be moved, but not removed.
You may not use Neutral (Good/Evil axis) Champions unless they are members of the Absolute Adversaries affiliation.
Each wave spawns an armored Mind Flayer. They don't drop gold or count towards quest progress.
Getting to Know The Dark Urge: The type of Champions that associate with The Dark Urge depends on if he embraces or fights against his urges. Which one will you choose?
restrictions.display:
邪念初始位于阵型中。他可以被移动，但不能被移除。
你不能使用中立（以善良/邪恶划分时）勇士，除非他们是绝对敌手从属组织的成员。
每波刷新一只装甲夺心魔。它们不会掉落金币，也不计入任务进度。
了解邪念：与邪念共鸣的勇士类型取决于其接受还是反抗自己的冲动。你会怎么选择？

restrictions.original: Must have completed "A Fool's Errand (The Dark Urge)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“愚人的差事（邪念）”

restrictions.original: No restrictions
restrictions.display: 无限制

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Endless War (Gale)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“无止境的战争（盖尔）”

restrictions.original:
Gale starts in the formation. He can't be moved or removed.
Only Gale and Champions buffed by Gale's Archmage's Insight can deal damage.
Getting to know Gale: Gale increases the damage of Champions in the two columns in front of him. You can customize how this works with a specialization choice!
restrictions.display:
盖尔初始位于阵型中。他无法被移动或移除。
只有盖尔和受到盖尔的“大法师的洞察”技能增益的勇士能造成伤害。
了解盖尔：盖尔会提高他前面两列勇士的伤害。你可以通过专精选择来自定义生效方式！

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Endless War (Gale)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“无止境的战争（盖尔）”

restrictions.original:
Gale starts in the formation. He can be moved, but not removed.
You may only use Champions with an Intelligence of 13 or higher, Heroes of Baldur's Gate affiliation members, and/or Absolute Adversaries affiliation members.
Getting to know Gale: Gale's second specialization choice determines which heroes are best to solve the problem at hand.
restrictions.display:
盖尔初始位于阵型中。他可以被移动，但不能被移除。
只能使用智力大于等于 13 的勇士、博德之门的英雄们从属组织的成员，和/或绝对敌手从属组织的成员。
了解盖尔：盖尔的第二个专精选择决定哪些英雄最适合解决手头的问题。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Endless War (Gale)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“无止境的战争（盖尔）”

restrictions.original:
Gale starts in the formation. He can be moved, but not removed.
Elminster joins the formation. He distracts adjacent Champions with his stories, increasing their normal attack cooldowns by 3 seconds.
You may only use the base 12 Core Champions and/or Champions that have been released in the last 3 years.
Getting to know Gale: Gale is always available for any of his Mentor's patron challenges, even if the restrictions would say otherwise. Gale's buffs further increase as you complete Elminster Patron variants!
restrictions.display:
盖尔初始位于阵型中。他可以被移动，但不能被移除。
艾尔明斯特加入阵型。他会通过讲故事来吸引相邻勇士的注意力，使其基本攻击的冷却时间增加 3 秒。
你只能使用基础的 12 位核心勇士，和/或过去 3 年内发布的勇士。
了解盖尔：盖尔随时准备应对导师的任何赞助者挑战，即使限制条件不允许也没关系。完成艾尔明斯特赞助者支线任务时，盖尔的增益会进一步强化！

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Endless War (Gale)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“无止境的战争（盖尔）”

restrictions.original: No restrictions
restrictions.display: 无限制

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Crypt of Legends (Minthara)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“传说的墓穴（明萨拉）”。

restrictions.original:
Minthara starts in the formation. She can be moved, but not removed.
You may only use Evil and/or Neutral Champions.
Getting to Know Minthara: Minthara works well with Evil Champions, and a specialization choice extends that to include Neutral Champions.
restrictions.display:
明萨拉初始位于阵型中。她可以被移动，但不能被移除。
只能使用邪恶和/或中立阵营的勇士。
了解明萨拉：明萨拉与邪恶勇士配合无间，并且一个专精选择可让这种默契关系也包括中立勇士。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Crypt of Legends (Minthara)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“传说的墓穴（明萨拉）”。

restrictions.original:
Minthara starts in the formation. She can be moved, but not removed.
You may not use tanking Champions other than Minthara.
One Zealot of the Absolute with 8 armored health spawns with each wave. They don't drop gold nor count towards quest progress.
Getting to Know Minthara: Minthara is a Tanking Champion that can help cut through enemies with armored or segmented health. Increase her Strife stacks to 5 or more to make it even easier!
restrictions.display:
明萨拉初始位于阵型中。她可以被移动，但不能被移除。
不能使用除明萨拉以外的坦克型勇士。
每波都会刷新一个 8 点重甲生命值的“真神狂热者”。它们不会掉落金币，也不计入任务进度。
了解明萨拉：明萨拉是一名坦克型勇士，并可以帮助削弱拥有装甲或分段生命值的敌人。将她的冲突层数叠加至 5 层及以上可以使战斗更加轻松！

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Crypt of Legends (Minthara)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“传说的墓穴（明萨拉）”。

restrictions.original:
Minthara starts in the formation with her Soul Branding ability unlocked. She can be moved, but not removed.
Enemies that don't have an active debuff reduce all normal attack damage to just 1 point of damage.
Getting to Know Minthara: Minthara debuffs enemies with each attack. Use her and other debuffing Champions to cut through these pesky foes!
restrictions.display:
明萨拉初始位于阵型中并解锁其灵魂烙印技能。她可以被移动，但不能被移除。
身上没有已激活负面效果的敌人可以将所有普通攻击伤害减少到 1 点。
了解明萨拉：明萨拉的每一次攻击都会赋予敌人减益效果。使用她和其他减益效果勇士削弱这些讨厌的敌人！

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Crypt of Legends (Minthara)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“传说的墓穴（明萨拉）”。

restrictions.original: No restrictions
restrictions.display: 无限制

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Mechanical Menace (Diana)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“机械威胁（戴安娜）”

restrictions.original:
Diana starts in the formation. She can be moved but not removed.
You may only use Champions that have a Dexterity of 15 or higher, an age of 20 or less, or total ability scores of 78 or less.
Getting to Know Diana: Diana's first specialization selects the types of Champions she buffs. Choose the buff that is best for your formation!
restrictions.display:
戴安娜初始位于阵型中。她可以被移动，但不能被移除。
你只能使用敏捷为 15 或以上、年龄为 20 或以下、总属性值为 78 或以下的勇士。
了解戴安娜：戴安娜的第一个专精会选择她要增益的勇士类型。选择最适合你的阵型的增益！

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Mechanical Menace (Diana)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“机械威胁（戴安娜）”

restrictions.original:
Diana starts in the formation. She can be moved but not removed.
Kosar joins the formation. If Kosar is defeated, you automatically fail the area.
Kosar cheers on Diana, reducing her base attack cooldown by 50%.
Getting to Know Diana: Diana can use her Javelin staff to push monsters around. Can you figure out how to best protect Kosar?
restrictions.display:
戴安娜初始位于阵型中。她可以被移动，但不能被移除。
科萨尔加入阵型。如果科萨尔被击败，此区域自动失败。
科萨尔为戴安娜欢呼，使她的基本攻击冷却时间减少 50%。
了解戴安娜：戴安娜可以使用标枪法杖来推动怪物。你能想出保护科萨尔的最佳方法吗？

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Mechanical Menace (Diana)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“机械威胁（戴安娜）”

restrictions.original:
Diana starts in the formation. She can be moved but not removed.
Excluding Diana, only the youngest Champion, the most Dexterous Champion, and the Champion with the lowest total stats can deal damage. Diana can also deal damage.
At the start of each Boss area, Venger arrives on his nightmare as an additional boss that must be defeated.
Getting to Know Diana: Depending on the supporting Champions in your formation, pick either Ensemble Cast or Spotlight Episode to really boost Diana's buffing power.
restrictions.display:
戴安娜初始位于阵型中。她可以被移动，但不能被移除。
除戴安娜外，只有最年轻的勇士、最灵巧的勇士和总属性值最低的勇士才能造成伤害。戴安娜也能造成伤害。
在每个首领区域开始时，复仇者骑着他的梦魇出现，玩家必须打败他才能继续前进。
了解戴安娜：根据阵型中的支援型勇士，选择“团队阵容”或“聚光灯片段”来大幅强化戴安娜的增益能力。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Mechanical Menace (Diana)"

restrictions.original:
Duke Ravengard starts in the formation. He can be moved, but not removed.
You may only use Champions with a melee base attack.
Getting to Know Duke Ravengard: As an experienced Soldier, Duke Ravengard understands melee combat. Use Champions with Melee attacks to make the most of his buffs!
restrictions.display:
瑞文嘉德公爵初始位于阵型中，他可以被移动，但不能从阵型中移除。
只能使用拥有近战基本攻击的勇士。
了解瑞文嘉德公爵：作为一名经验丰富的战士，瑞文嘉德公爵深谙近战之道。使用近战攻击勇士来充分利用他的增益吧！

restrictions.original: Must have completed "Let Sleeping Dragons Lie (Duke Ravengard)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“放倒沉睡巨龙（瑞文嘉德公爵）”

restrictions.original:
Duke Ravengard starts in the formation. He can be moved, but not removed.
You may only use Champions with a melee base attack.
At the start of each area, all Champions have their damage reduced to 1 until someone in the formation scores a critical hit. Every 200 areas, the number of critical hits required to remove this damage reduction debuff is increased by 1.
Getting to Know Duke Ravengard: Duke Ravengard's buffs grow more potent as your Champions score critical hits. Use Champions with improved critical hit chances to make the most of this!
restrictions.display:
瑞文嘉德公爵初始位于阵型中，他可以被移动，但不能从阵型中移除。
只能使用拥有近战基本攻击的勇士。
在每个区域开始时，所有勇士的伤害都会降低为 1，直到阵型中有人打出暴击。每经过 200 个区域，移除该降低伤害减益所需的暴击次数就会增加 1。
了解瑞文嘉德公爵：他的增益会随着你的勇士打出的暴击而变得更加强力。使用有更高暴击几率的勇士来充分利用这一点吧！

name.original: That's a Whole Lot of Goblins

restrictions.original: Must have completed "Let Sleeping Dragons Lie (Duke Ravengard)"

restrictions.original:
Duke Ravengard starts in the formation. He can be moved, but not removed.
Duke Ravengard's Ultimate starts unlocked and the cooldown is reduced by 75%.
You may only use Champions with a melee base attack.
In the first wave of each non-boss area, there is a 20% chance that 30 goblins immediately spawn. These goblins do not drop gold or count toward quest progress.
Getting to Know Duke Ravengard: When facing a lot of enemies at one time, Duke Ravengard's Fire Shield ultimate can help even the score!
restrictions.display:
瑞文嘉德公爵初始位于阵型中，他可以被移动，但不能从阵型中移除。
瑞文嘉德公爵的杀招始默认解锁，冷却时间减少 75%。
只能使用拥有近战基本攻击的勇士。
在每个非首领区域的第一波攻势中，有 20% 的几率立即刷新 30 个地精。这些地精不会掉落金币，也不会计入任务进度。
了解瑞文嘉德公爵：当一口气面对大量敌人时，他的火焰护盾杀招可以帮你扳回一局。

Umberto starts in the formation. He can't be moved or removed.
Only Umberto and Champions in the two columns behind him can deal damage.

翁贝托初始位于阵型中。他无法被移动或移除。
只有翁贝托和后方两列的勇士可以造成伤害。

restrictions.original:
Umberto starts in the formation. He can't be moved or removed.
His assistant bees, Sherlock Combs and Dr. Buzz Watson, take up two slots in the formation, and assist Umberto with his investigations.
Once unlocked, Umberto's Ongoing Investigation durations are decreased by 75%.
Getting to Know Umberto: The choice you make on Umberto's Ongoing Investigation dialog determines how fast he'll find clues and how long it will be until you choose again.
restrictions.display:
翁贝托初始位于阵型中。他无法被移动或移除。
他的助手蜜蜂夏洛·蜂巢和嗡嗡·华生博士在阵型中占据两个位置，协助翁贝托进行调查。
一旦解锁，翁贝托的“持续调查”用时将减少 75%。
了解翁贝托：在翁贝托的“持续调查”对话框中所做的选择决定了他找到线索的速度，以及在再次选择之前所需的时间。

restrictions.display:
翁贝托初始位于阵型中。他无法被移动或移除。
只能使用守序阵营、无从属组织、德鲁伊和/或巡林客勇士。
了解翁贝托：翁贝托的第一个专精选择决定了他最适合加入哪种勇士队伍。请选择最适合你阵型的选项吧！

Getting to Know Kas: As a Vampire Lord, Kas can transform other Champions into vampires, allowing them to heal when they attack enemies.

每波会刷新 1-2 个维克那僵尸。它们不会掉落金币，也不计入任务进度。
了解凯斯：吸血鬼领主凯斯可以把其他勇士变成吸血鬼，让他们在攻击敌人时获得治疗。

restrictions.original:
You may only use Neutral Champions and Champions of the alignment(s) specified below.
For the first 100 areas, you may use Lawful or Good champions. Every 100 areas, this restriction changes: 
1-100: Lawful or Good. 101-200: Neutral or Good. 201-300: Chaotic or Good.  301-400: Chaotic or Neutral. 401-500: Chaotic or Evil. 501-600: Neutral or Evil. 601-700: Lawful or Evil. 701-800: Lawful or Neutral. Then back to 801-900: Lawful or Good.
This restriction is linked to your highest area completed, not your current area.
When changing areas, Champions that are not eligible in the new area are automatically removed from the formation, but can be placed back in once they're eligible again.
restrictions.display:
只能使用中立勇士和以下指定阵营的勇士。
在最初的 100 个区域中，你可以使用守序或善良阵营的勇士。每经过 100 个区域，限制都会改变：
1-100：守序或善良。101-200：中立或善良。201-300：混乱或善良。301-400：混乱或中立。401-500：混乱或邪恶。501-600：中立或邪恶。601-700：守序或邪恶。701-800：守序或中立。抵达 801-900 时再回到：守序或善良。
该限制与你完成的最高区域有关，与当前所在区域无关。
更换区域时，不符合新区域条件的勇士自动从阵型中被移除，一旦他们再次符合条件，就可以重新加入。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "Clockwise Through the Great Wheel"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“顺时针穿越大转轮”

restrictions.original:
You may only use Neutral Champions and Champions of the alignment(s) specified below.
For the first 100 areas, you may use Lawful Good champions. Every 100 areas, this restriction changes: Neutral Good for area 101-200, Chaotic Good for area 201-300, and so forth. This restriction is linked to your highest area completed, not your current area.
Every 100 areas, all Champions in the formation are removed and can't be used for the rest of the adventure.
Champions can't otherwise be removed from the formation once they've been added.
Click damage only deals damage for the first 5 areas after every alignment switch.
Fire breath potions can't be used during the adventure.
restrictions.display:
只能使用中立勇士和以下指定阵营的勇士。
在最初的 100 个区域中，你可以使用守序善良阵营的勇士。每经过 100 个区域，限制都会改变：101-200 为中立善良，201-300 为混乱善良，以此类推。该限制与你完成的最高区域有关，与当前所在区域无关。
每经过 100 个区域，阵型中的所有勇士都会被移除，并无法在剩下的冒险中使用。
除这种情况外，加入阵型的勇士不能被移除。
点击伤害只会在每次更换阵营要求后的前 5 个区域造成伤害。
冒险过程中不能使用火息药剂。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "Heroes of the Day"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“今日英雄”

restrictions.original: No restrictions
restrictions.display: 无限制

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Simril Spoilsport (Halsin)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“观星节扫兴者（哈尔辛）”

restrictions.original:
Halsin starts in the formation. He can be moved, but not removed.
1-2 Goblins spawn with each wave. They don't drop gold nor count towards quest progress.
You may only use Good and/or Neutral (on the Good/Evil axis) Champions.
Getting to Know Halsin: Halsin works well with Good Champions, and a specialization choice extends that to include Neutral Champions.
restrictions.display:
哈尔辛初始位于阵型中。他可以被移动，但不能被移除。
每波会刷新 1-2 个地精。它们不会掉落金币，也不计入任务进度。
只能使用善良和/或中立阵营（以善良/邪恶划分时）的勇士。
了解哈尔辛：哈尔辛与善良勇士配合无间，并且一个专精选择可让这种默契关系也包括中立勇士。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Simril Spoilsport (Halsin)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“观星节扫兴者（哈尔辛）”

restrictions.original:
Due to the Shadow Curse, the weather is Foggy.
In non-boss areas, quest requirements are halved, but there is a 50% chance that a defeated enemy doesn't drop quest items nor count towards quest progress.
Halsin starts in the formation. He can be moved, but not removed.
Getting to Know Halsin: Halsin provides a chance to advance to the next area before all the quest requirements are completed.
restrictions.display:
由于暗影诅咒，天气雾蒙蒙的。
在非首领区域，任务需求减半，但被击败的敌人有 50% 的几率不会掉落任务物品，也不会计入任务进度。
哈尔辛初始位于阵型中。他可以被移动，但不能被移除。
了解哈尔辛：哈尔辛有一定几率在所有所需任务完成之前，即可前进到下一个区域。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Simril Spoilsport (Halsin)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“观星节扫兴者（哈尔辛）”

restrictions.original:
Halsin starts in the formation with his Archdruid of Emerald Grove and Nature's Revival abilities unlocked. He can be moved, but not removed.
Champions don't recover health when moving to a new area. 
Champions resurrect at half health when changing areas instead of full health.
Getting to Know Halsin: Halsin heals good Champions in the formation, and this can be extended to include Neutral Champions with his specialization choice.
restrictions.display:
哈尔辛初始位于阵型中，并解锁其“翠绿林地的大德鲁伊”和“大自然的复兴”技能。他可以被移动，但不能被移除。
勇士在移动到新区域时不会恢复生命值。
改变区域时，复活的勇士只会恢复一半生命值而非全部。
了解哈尔辛：哈尔辛可以治疗阵型中的善良勇士，而一个专精选择使其也能治疗中立勇士。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Simril Spoilsport (Halsin)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“观星节扫兴者（哈尔辛）”

restrictions.original: No restrictions
restrictions.display: 无限制

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Merry Map Misadventure (Eric)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“快乐地图灾祸（埃里克）”

restrictions.original:
Eric starts in the formation. He can be moved but not removed.
Only Champions in the front two columns and the back column can deal damage.
1-2 Bullywug Spear Throwers spawn with each wave. They don't drop gold, nor count towards quest progress.
Getting to Know Eric: Eric's first specialization choice determines how he buffs the formation. Does he lead from the front or cower in the back?
restrictions.display:
埃里克初始位于阵型中。他可以被移动，但不能被移除。
只有处于阵型最前两列和最后列的勇士能造成伤害。
每波会刷新 1-2 个狂蛙人投矛手。它们不会掉落金币，也不计入任务进度。
了解埃里克：埃里克的第一个专精选择决定了他会如何为阵型带来增益。他是在前面领导还是躲在后面？

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Merry Map Misadventure (Eric)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“快乐地图灾祸（埃里克）”

restrictions.original:
Eric starts in the formation. He can't be moved or removed.
In area 126 or higher, no Tanking Champions other than Eric can be added to the formation, and any other Tanking Champions are automatically removed.
A transformed Lukyon joins the formation. He doesn't do much in his cursed form.
Getting to Know Eric: Knock back abilities are stronger when Eric is in the formation. Take advantage of that to protect your non-tanking Champions at the front!
restrictions.display:
埃里克初始位于阵型中。他无法被移动或移除。
在区域 126 或更靠后的区域，除埃里克之外，其他坦克型勇士不可加入阵型，任何其他坦克型勇士会被自动移除。
变身后的卢基恩加入阵型。处于被诅咒形态的他做不了什么。
了解埃里克：埃里克身处阵型中时，击退技能会变得更强。利用这点来保护你位于前列的非坦克型勇士！

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Merry Map Misadventure (Eric)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“快乐地图灾祸（埃里克）”

restrictions.original:
Eric starts in the formation. He can be moved but not removed.
At the start of each Boss area, Venger arrives on his nightmare as an additional boss that must be defeated.
You may only use Champions with an age of 20 or younger, have a total ability score of 78 or lower, or have the Gold Find role.
Getting to Know Eric: Eric's second set of specializations determines which Champions he works best with. Which formation will you build?
restrictions.display:
埃里克初始位于阵型中。他可以被移动，但不能被移除。
在每个首领区域开始时，复仇者骑着他的梦魇出现，玩家必须打败他才能继续前进。
你只能使用年龄为 20 岁或以下、总属性值为 78 或以下或担任金币寻获角色的勇士。
了解埃里克：埃里克的第二套专精决定了他将适合与那些勇士配合。你会打造何种阵型？

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Merry Map Misadventure (Eric)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“快乐地图灾祸（埃里克）”

restrictions.original: No restrictions
restrictions.display: 无限制

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Missing Merchants (Kalix)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“失踪的商人（卡利克斯）”

restrictions.original:
Kalix starts in the formation. He can be moved, but not removed.
Only Kalix and Champions not adjacent to him can deal damage.
1-2 Drow Rangers spawn with each wave. They don't drop gold nor count towards quest progress.
Getting to Know Kalix: This Thri-kreen Ranger uses his natural telepathic abilities to buff Champions that are NOT next to him. Build your formation to take the best advantage of this!
restrictions.display:
卡利克斯初始位于阵型中。他可以被移动，但不能被移除。
只有卡利克斯和不与他相邻的勇士可以造成伤害。
每波会刷新 1-2 个卓尔精灵巡林客。它们不会掉落金币，也不计入任务进度。
了解卡利克斯：这位螳螂人巡林客会用他天生的心灵感应技能来为不与他相邻的勇士提供增益。建立你的阵型，以充分利用这一点！

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Missing Merchants (Kalix)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“失踪的商人（卡利克斯）”

restrictions.original:
Kalix starts in the formation. He can be moved, but not removed.
You may only use Core Champions and/or Champions that are not a Standard Species. Standard species are Aasimar, Dragonborn, Dwarf, Elf, Gnome, Goliath, Halfling, Human, Orc, Tiefling, Half-Orc, and Half-Elf.
Getting to Know Kalix: Kalix thrives alongside Champions of exceptional origin. Which unorthodox team of heroes will you use?
restrictions.display:
卡利克斯初始位于阵型中。他可以被移动，但不能被移除。
你只能使用核心勇士和/或不是标准种族的勇士。标准种族是指神裔、龙裔、矮人、精灵、侏儒、巨人、半身人、人类、兽人、提夫林、半兽人和半精灵。
了解卡利克斯：卡利克斯与有着不寻常出身的勇士在一起时会表现优异。你会使用什么样的异端英雄团队呢？

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Missing Merchants (Kalix)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“失踪的商人（卡利克斯）”

restrictions.original:
Kalix starts in the formation. He can't be moved or removed.
Only Kalix and Champions from the most represented species in the formation may deal damage.
1-2 ranged Astral Elf Warriors spawn with each wave and attack twice as fast as normal enemies. They don't drop gold nor count towards quest progress. 
Getting to Know Kalix: Kalix buffs your active adventuring party whenever he's in the front column, even when he's hanging out in a background party. His chameleon carapace will protect him as long as he is sharing the front column with a tanking Champion!
restrictions.display:
卡利克斯初始位于阵型中。他无法被移动或移除。
只有卡利克斯和阵型中最具代表性种族的勇士可以造成伤害。
每波会刷新 1-2 个远程攻击的星界精灵，其攻击速度是普通敌人的两倍。它们不会掉落金币，也不计入任务进度。
了解卡利克斯：只要卡利克斯位于最前列，他就会为你已激活的探险队提供增益，即使他在后台探险队中也能触发此效果。只要他和一位坦克型勇士一起位于最前列，他的变色龙甲壳就会保护他！

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Missing Merchants (Kalix)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“失踪的商人（卡利克斯）”

restrictions.original: No restrictions
restrictions.display: 无限制

name.display: 瓦罗的不公平的海指南

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Unfair Sea (Volo)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“不公平的海（瓦罗）”

restrictions.original:
Volo starts in the formation. He can't be moved or removed.
Only Volo and Champions in the two columns in front of him can deal damage.
Getting to know Volo: Volo increases the damage of Champions in the two columns in front of him.
restrictions.display:
瓦罗初始位于阵型中。他无法被移动或移除。
只有瓦罗和处于他前方两列的勇士可造成伤害。
了解瓦罗：瓦罗会提高他前面两列勇士的伤害。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Unfair Sea (Volo)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“不公平的海（瓦罗）”

restrictions.original:
Volo starts in the formation. He can be moved, but not removed.
Elminster joins the formation. Champions next to Elminster deal no damage as he distracts them by critiquing Volo.
1-2 random enemies spawn with each wave. They don't drop gold, nor count towards quest progress. The type of enemy is determined by the area you're in, with the type changing every 10 areas.
Getting to know Volo: Volo's buff gets stronger the more enemy types you encounter in an adventure. Pair him with certain Hunter Champions to spawn more enemy types.
restrictions.display:
瓦罗初始位于阵型中。他可以被移动，但不能被移除。
艾尔明斯特加入阵型。艾尔明斯特身边的勇士们无法造成伤害，因为他那张批评瓦罗的嘴分散了他们的注意力。
每波会刷新 1-2 个随机敌人。它们不会掉落金币，也不计入任务进度。敌人的类型取决于你所在的区域，且每经过 10 个区域，敌人类型都会发生变化。
了解瓦罗：瓦罗的增益效果会随着你在冒险中遇到的敌人类型增多而变得更加强大。将他与特定的猎人勇士搭配，可以生成更多类型的敌人。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Unfair Sea (Volo)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“不公平的海（瓦罗）”

restrictions.original:
Volo starts in the formation. He can be moved, but not removed.
1-2 Relentless Undead spawn with each wave. When defeated, they get back up after 5 seconds. They don't drop gold, nor count towards quest progress. 
You may only use Hunter Champions, Absolute Adversaries affiliation members, and/or Champions with a Magic base attack.
Getting to know Volo: Volo's first specialization choice determines which Champions he works best with. Which set will you choose?
restrictions.display:
瓦罗初始位于阵型中。他可以被移动，但不能被移除。
每波会额外刷新 1-2 名无情的亡灵。被击败 5 秒后，它们会卷土重来。它们不会掉落金币，也不计入任务进度。
只能使用猎人勇士、绝对敌手从属组织成员和/或拥有魔法基本攻击的勇士。
了解瓦罗：瓦罗的第一套专精选择决定了他将适合与哪些勇士配合。你会怎么选择？

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Unfair Sea (Volo)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“不公平的海（瓦罗）”

restrictions.original: No restrictions
restrictions.display: 无限制

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Unfair Sea (Sheila)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“不公平的海（希拉）”

restrictions.original:
Sheila starts in the formation. She can be moved, but not removed.
You may only use Good champions.
Getting to know Sheila: Sheila's kind heart supports the abilities of the good Champions in your formation. Build the best formation to take advantage of this!
restrictions.display:
希拉初始位于阵型中。她可以被移动，但不能被移除。
只能使用善良勇士。
了解希拉：希拉的善良之心为你阵型中善良勇士们的技能提供支援。建立最佳阵型，以充分利用这一点！

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Unfair Sea (Sheila)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“不公平的海（希拉）”

restrictions.original:
Sheila starts in the formation. She can be moved, but not removed.
Karena joins the formation. Good Champions next to Karena deal no damage.
You may only use Champions that have an age of 20 or younger, a total ability score of 78 or lower, or Female and/or non-binary Champions.
Getting to know Sheila: Sheila's first specialization choice further refines which allies she works best with. Make sure you still use a Good aligned DPS to make the most of her buff!
restrictions.display:
希拉初始位于阵型中。她可以被移动，但不能被移除。
卡瑞娜加入阵型。卡瑞娜身边的善良勇士不会造成任何伤害。
你只能使用年龄为 20 岁或以下、总属性值为 78 或以下、或女性和/或非二元勇士。
了解希拉：希拉的第一个专精选择进一步细化了哪些盟友最适合与她并肩战斗。确保使用一个善良连携伤害输出来充分利用她的增益效果！

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Unfair Sea (Sheila)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“不公平的海（希拉）”

restrictions.original:
Sheila starts in the formation. She can be moved, but not removed.
At the start of each Boss area, Venger arrives on his nightmare as an additional boss that must be defeated.
Starting in area 51, enemies that don't have an active debuff reduce all normal attack damage to just 1 point of damage.
Getting to know Sheila: Sheila's second specialization choice lets you pick a different way to debuff your enemies. Use her and other debuffing Champions to defeat these enemies!
restrictions.display:
希拉初始位于阵型中。她可以被移动，但不能被移除。
在每个首领区域开始时，复仇者骑着他的梦魇出现，玩家必须打败他才能继续前进。
从区域 51 开始，身上没有已激活负面效果的敌人可以将所有普通攻击伤害减少到 1 点。
了解希拉：希拉的第二个专精选择使你可以选择一个不同的方式来削弱你的敌人。使用她和其他减益效果勇士击败这些敌人！

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Unfair Sea (Sheila)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“不公平的海（希拉）”

restrictions.original: No restrictions
restrictions.display: 无限制

restrictions.original: Must have completed "A Fool's Errand (Grimm)"
restrictions.display: 必须完成 "A Fool's Errand（格林）"

restrictions.original:
Grimm starts in the formation with his Get Buff and Moving Right Along abilities unlocked. He can be moved, but not removed.
All Champions' base attack cooldowns are increased by 2 seconds, but Grimm's Get Buff stack limit is increased by 15.
Getting to Know Grimm: Grimm's Get Buff ability will let him attack faster. Use ways to complete areas in less than 15 seconds to have him maintain these fast attack stacks!
restrictions.display:
格林在阵型中开始时已解锁获得增益和顺势移动能力。 插槽 0）他可以被移动，但不能被移除。
所有勇士的基础攻击冷却时间都会增加 2 秒，但格林的获得增益叠加上限会增加 15。
了解格林：格林的获得增益能力会让他的攻击速度更快。使用在 15 秒内完成区域任务的方法可以让他保持这些快速攻击叠加！

restrictions.original: Must have completed "A Fool's Errand (Grimm)"
restrictions.display: 必须完成 "A Fool's Errand（格林）"

restrictions.original:
Grimm starts in the formation. He can be moved, but not removed. 
You may only use Champions with a Strength of 14 or higher.
Getting to Know Grimm (& Beadle!): While Beadle wouldn't normally be eligible for this adventure due to his low Strength, he can still be added to the formation due to the two of them being Inseparable.
restrictions.display:
格林从阵型中开始。(槽位 0）他可以移动，但不能移除。
您只能使用勇士的高强度为 14 或更高。
认识格林（和比德尔！）：由于比德尔的低强度，他通常不能参加这次冒险，但由于他们两人密不可分，他仍然可以加入阵型。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "A Fool's Errand (Grimm)"
restrictions.display: 必须完成 "A Fool's Errand（格林）"

restrictions.original:
Grimm starts in the formation with his Break Their Will ability unlocked. He can be moved, but not removed.
A Frost Giant spawns with each wave. They don't drop gold nor count towards quest progress. No other enemies can be damaged until all the Frost Giants are defeated.
All Boss monsters have at least 25 armored health.
Getting to know Grimm: Grimm can quickly defeat foes with armored or segmented health. Use him and other breakers to cut through these enemies!
restrictions.display:
格林在阵型中开始时已解锁 "摧毁他们的意志 "能力（槽位 0），他可以被移动，但不能被移除。
每个波次都会产生一个冰霜巨人。它们不会掉落金币，也不会计入任务进度。在打败所有冰霜巨人之前，不能伤害其他敌人。
所有 Boss 怪物都至少有 25 个装甲生命值。
了解格林：格林可以快速击败拥有装甲或分段健康的敌人。利用他和其他破坏者来消灭这些敌人！

restrictions.original: Must have completed "A Fool's Errand (Grimm)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“愚人的差事（格林）”

restrictions.original: No restrictions
restrictions.display: 无限制

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Mechanical Menace (???)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“机械威胁（？？？）”

restrictions.original:
Vlithryn starts in the formation. She can't be moved or removed.
Only Vlithryn and Champions in the columns in front of her can deal damage.
Getting to Know Vlithryn: Vlithryn increases the damage of Champions in the columns in front of her. Place your damage-dealing Champions to take advantage of this!
restrictions.display:
维列瑟琳初始位于阵型中。她无法被移动或移除。
只有维列瑟琳和处于她前列的勇士能造成伤害。
了解维列瑟琳：维列瑟琳会提高她前列勇士的伤害。放置你的伤害输出勇士，以充分利用这一点！

name.display: 少点夸夸其谈，多点实际救助。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Mechanical Menace (???)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“机械威胁（？？？）”

restrictions.original:
Vlithryn starts in the formation with her Cleric Clinic ability unlocked. She can be moved, but not removed.
After area 10, a random Champion is engulfed in flames every 5 seconds, dealing 60% of their maximum health in damage. This damage is reduced by 10% for each potion of Heroism that is active on the party.
Getting to Know Vlithryn: Vlithryn heals the most damaged member in the formation every second. Use her and other healers to get through the fire!
restrictions.display:
维列瑟琳初始位于阵型中，并已解锁牧师诊所技能。她可以被移动，但不能被移除。
在区域 10 之后，每隔 5 秒就会有一名随机的勇士被火焰吞噬，受到其最大生命值 60% 的伤害。队伍中每有一瓶生效的“英勇药剂”，该伤害就会降低 10%。
了解维列瑟琳：维列瑟琳每秒会治疗阵型中生命值最低的成员。利用她和其他治疗师来挺过火焰的考验！

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Mechanical Menace (???)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“机械威胁（？？？）”

restrictions.original:
Vlithryn starts in the formation with her Spreading the Word specialization choice unlocked and selected. She can be moved, but not removed.
You can't use a Potion of Specialization on Vlithryn.
Only one Champion of each species can be included in the formation at any time. Champions with multiple species count for all of their species.
Getting to Know Vlithryn: Vlithryn wants to spread the word of Persana to all the surface dwellers. How many different species can you feature in your formation?
restrictions.display:
维列瑟琳初始位于阵型中，并已解锁与选中“传播教义”专精。她可以被移动，但不能被移除。
无法对维列瑟琳使用专精药剂。
在任何时候，每个种族只有一名勇士可以加入阵型。如选择的是多种族勇士，则其拥有的所有种族都将计算在内。
了解维列瑟琳：维列瑟琳想把佩塞纳的教义传播给所有地表居民。你的阵型中能有多少不同种族的勇士呢？

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Mechanical Menace (???)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“机械威胁（？？？）”

restrictions.original: No restrictions
restrictions.display: 无限制

restrictions.original: Must have completed "Let Sleeping Dragons Lie (Hank)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“放倒沉睡巨龙（汉克）”

restrictions.original:
Hank starts in the formation. He can be moved, but not removed.
Only Hank and Champions next to him can deal damage.
1-2 Chromatic Wyrmlings spawn with each wave. They don't drop gold, nor count towards quest progress.
Getting to Know Hank: Hank's main support ability increases the damage of Champions next to him. Place your damage dealers to take advantage of this!
restrictions.display:
汉克初始位于阵型中。他可以被移动，但不能被移除。
只有汉克和与他相邻的勇士可以造成伤害。
每波会刷新 1-2 条彩色雏龙。它们不会掉落金币，也不计入任务进度。
了解汉克：汉克的主要辅助技能可以增加与他相邻的勇士的伤害。合理放置你的输出勇士来利用这一点！

restrictions.original: Must have completed "Let Sleeping Dragons Lie (Hank)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“放倒沉睡巨龙（汉克）”

restrictions.original:
Hank starts in the formation. He can be moved, but not removed.
Dekkion joins the formation as an escort. Champions next to him attack slower due to his unsettling appearance.
You may only use Champions from the Saturday Morning Squad affiliation, Champions with a total ability score of 78 or lower, and/or Champions with a ranged attack.
Getting to Know Hank: Hank's first set of specializations determines which Champions he works best with. Make the best choice for your formation!
restrictions.display:
汉克初始位于阵型中。他可以被移动，但不能被移除。
德金作为护卫加入阵型。由于他可怖的外貌，与他相邻的勇士攻击速度会变慢。
只能使用总技能评分不高于 78 的“星期六早晨的小队”勇士，和/或拥有远程攻击的勇士。
了解汉克：汉克的第一套专精决定了他将适合与那些勇士配合。为阵型做出最佳选择！

name.display: 拾荒者的复仇之焰永不熄灭

restrictions.original: Must have completed "Let Sleeping Dragons Lie (Hank)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“放倒沉睡巨龙（汉克）”

restrictions.original:
Hank starts in the formation. He can be moved, but not removed. 
You may only use Core Champions, Champions with the Speed role, or Champions from the Saturday Morning Squad affiliation (and Strongheart!)
At the start of each Boss area, Venger arrives on his nightmare as an additional boss that must be defeated.
Bosses immediately start to enrage upon spawning.
Getting to Know Hank: Hank and the other Saturday Morning Squad Champions can all scavenge useful loot when completing boss areas. You might collect them faster with a few Speed Champions!
restrictions.display:
汉克初始位于阵型中。他可以被移动，但不能被移除。
只能使用核心勇士、拥有“速度”定位的勇士，或“星期六早晨的小队”（以及“强心”）的勇士。
在每个首领区域开始时，复仇者骑着他的梦魇出现，玩家必须打败他才能继续前进。
首领一出现就会立即开始狂暴。
了解汉克：汉克和其他“星期六早晨的小队”的勇士在完成首领区域时都可以搜寻到有用的战利品。带上几个“速度”型勇士可能会让你收集得更快！

restrictions.original: Must have completed "Let Sleeping Dragons Lie (Hank)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“放倒沉睡巨龙（汉克）”

restrictions.original: No restrictions
restrictions.display: 无限制

name.original: The Deck of Many Intellect Devourers

restrictions.original: Must have completed "Party Crashers (Tess)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“不速之客（苔丝）”

restrictions.original:
Tess starts in the formation. She can't be moved or removed.
Only Tess and Champions buffed by both her and Uggie can deal damage.
1-2 Intellect Devourers spawn with each wave. They don't drop gold nor count towards quest progress.
Getting to Know Tess and Uggie: Tess increases the damage of Champions in the columns behind her, while Uggie increases the damage of Champions not next to Uggie. Place your damage dealers to take advantage of both buffs!
restrictions.display:
苔丝初始位于阵型中。她无法被移动或移除。
只有苔丝和受到她和乌吉的技能增益的勇士能造成伤害。
每波会刷新 1-2 个噬脑怪。它们不会掉落金币，也不计入任务进度。
了解苔丝和乌吉：苔丝会使处于她身后各列的勇士伤害提高，而乌吉会使不与乌吉相邻的勇士伤害提高。合理放置你的输出勇士来利用这两项增益！

restrictions.original: Must have completed "Party Crashers (Tess)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“不速之客（苔丝）”

restrictions.original:
Tess starts in the formation. She can be moved but not removed.
After area 10, Gold Find is reduced by 50% for each Champion role NOT present in the formation, stacking multiplicatively. At area 400, this increases to 99% for each missing role.
Getting to Know Tess: Tess has a plan for every contingency, and she prefers to work with a well-rounded team that features different roles, such as Support, Healing, and Gold Find. Build a formation with the most diverse roles for the best results!
restrictions.display:
苔丝初始位于阵型中。她可以被移动，但不能被移除。
在区域 10 之后，阵型中每缺少一种勇士角色定位，金币寻获量减少 50%，以乘算方式堆叠。在区域 400，每缺少一种角色定位，此减少量增加至 99%。
了解苔丝：苔丝对各种突发情况都有应对的方案，而且她更喜欢与结构均衡，包含支援、治疗和金币寻获等不同角色定位的队伍合作。组建一个角色定位最多元化的阵型来发挥出最佳的效果！

name.display: 有资格领导他们的首领

restrictions.original: Must have completed "Party Crashers (Tess)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“不速之客（苔丝）”

restrictions.original:
Tess starts in the formation. She can be moved, but not removed.
You may only use Champions that are Rogues, have ranged attacks, are Unaffiliated, or belong to The Fallbacks affiliation.
The Zhentarim and Purple Wormlings are fighting each other! One of each spawn with each wave, their speed is increased by 200%, and they don't drop gold nor count towards quest progress.
Whenever you kill Zhentarim or Purple Wormlings, that side gets weaker while the other side gets stronger.
Getting to know Tess: Build a formation that makes the best use of your specialization choice for Tess!
restrictions.display:
苔丝初始位于阵型中。她可以被移动，但不能被移除。
你只能使用符合以下任一条件的勇士：身为游荡者、可远程攻击、无从属组织或属于“后备队”从属组织。
散塔林会成员和紫色蠕虫正在相互攻击！这两方每个波次刷新一个，它们的速度提高 200%，不会掉落金币，也不计入任务进度。
每当你击杀一个散塔林会成员或一条紫色蠕虫，则损失兵力的一方会变弱，而另一方则会变强。
了解苔丝：组建一种阵型来最大程度利用你选择的苔丝专精！

restrictions.original: Must have completed "Party Crashers (Tess)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“不速之客（苔丝）”

restrictions.original: No restrictions
restrictions.display: 无限制

restrictions.original: Must have completed "Reclaiming the Past (Baldric)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“重拾过去（巴尔德里克）”

restrictions.original:
Baldric starts in the formation. He can be moved, but not removed.
Only Champions who have a Charisma of 15 or higher and are not next to Uggie can deal damage
Fallbacks Champions can always deal damage, regardless of their position or Charisma
Getting to know Baldric and Uggie: Baldric's main buff primarily targets Champions with a high Charisma, and Uggie's buff targets Champions that aren't next to her. Choose and place your primary damage dealer carefully!
restrictions.display:
巴尔德里克初始位于阵型中。他可以被移动，但不能被移除。
只有魅力大于等于 15 且不与乌吉相邻的勇士才能造成伤害
后备队勇士无论站位或魅力如何，始终能够造成伤害
了解巴尔德里克和乌吉：巴尔德里克的主要增益主要针对魅力较高的勇士，而乌吉的增益则作用于不与她相邻的勇士。请谨慎选择并放置你的主要伤害输出者！

restrictions.original: Must have completed "Reclaiming the Past (Baldric)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“重拾过去（巴尔德里克）”

restrictions.original:
Baldric starts in the formation with his Healing Word ability unlocked. He can be moved, but not removed.
A thrown mug hits a random Champion every second, dealing 5% of their max health in damage. After area 125, this increases to 10%. After area 350, this increases to 25%; and after area 800, this increases to 50%.
Getting to know Baldric: Baldric heals Champions that are in front of him in the formation, and his lantern boosts all healing abilities when a Champion is heavily wounded. Use him and other healing Champions to get through this variant!
restrictions.display:
巴尔德里克初始位于阵型中并解锁他的治愈真言技能。他可以被移动，但不能被移除。
每秒有一个被扔出的酒杯随机击中一位勇士，对其造成相当于其最大生命值 5% 的伤害。区域 125 后，伤害提升至 10%。区域 350 后，伤害提升至 25%；区域 800 后，伤害提升至 50%。
了解巴尔德里克：巴尔德里克会治疗阵型中站位在他前方的勇士，并且当有任何勇士受重伤时，他的提灯会强化所有治疗技能。善用他和其他治疗型勇士来完成此支线任务吧！

restrictions.original: Must have completed "Reclaiming the Past (Baldric)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“重拾过去（巴尔德里克）”

restrictions.original:
Baldric starts in the formation with his Bargaining Power ability unlocked. He can be moved, but not removed.
You may only use Champions that count as one of Baldric's bargaining partners.
Getting to know Baldric: Baldric doesn't follow a single deity, but instead bargains with multiple deities for spells and favors. You can use his specializations to access additional Champions for this variant!
restrictions.display:
巴尔德里克初始位于阵型中并解锁他的交涉之力技能。他可以被移动，但不能被移除。
你只能使用被认定为巴尔德里克交涉伙伴的勇士。
了解巴尔德里克：巴尔德里克并不信奉某一位神祇，而是通过与多位神祇交涉来获得法术和恩赐。你可以通过他的专精来解锁额外勇士以用于此支线任务！

restrictions.original: Must have completed "Reclaiming the Past (Baldric)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“重拾过去（巴尔德里克）”

restrictions.original: No restrictions
restrictions.display: 无限制

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Bandit's Harvest (Cazrin)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“强盗的收割（卡兹琳）”

restrictions.original:
Cazrin starts in the formation with her Sunny Disposition ability unlocked. She can't be moved or removed.
Only Cazrin and Champions buffed by both her and Uggie can deal damage.
1-2 Animated Tea Set constructs spawn with each wave. They don't drop gold nor count towards quest progress.
Getting to Know Cazrin and Uggie: Cazrin increases the damage of Champions in her column and the columns ahead of her, while Uggie increases the damage of Champions not next to Uggie. Will you focus on Cazrin being your damage dealer, or another Champion?
restrictions.display:
卡兹琳初始位于阵型中，并已解锁她的阳光心态技能。她无法被移动或移除。
只有卡兹琳和受到她和乌吉的技能增益的勇士能造成伤害。
每波会刷新 1-2 个活化茶具构装生物。它们不会掉落金币，也不计入任务进度。
了解卡兹琳和乌吉：卡兹琳会使她所在纵队和她之前的纵队中的勇士伤害提高，而乌吉会使不与乌吉相邻的勇士伤害提高。你会选择让卡兹琳担任你的主力输出，还是选用其他勇士？

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Bandit's Harvest (Cazrin)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“强盗的收割（卡兹琳）”

restrictions.original:
Cazrin starts in the formation. She can be moved but not removed.
Starting in area 11, a thrown mug hits a random Champion every second, dealing 25% of their max health in damage. This does not happen for the first 5 seconds of every area.
Two revelers join the formation. They are so distracting that Champions next to them deal no damage with their base attacks.
Getting to Know Cazrin: Cazrin protects herself with Mage Armor when the formation is under attack. She extends her protection to the whole formation after she recovers enough books.
restrictions.display:
卡兹琳初始位于阵型中。她可以被移动，但不能被移除。
从区域 11 开始，每秒有一个被扔出的酒杯随机击中一位勇士，对其造成相当于其最大生命值 25% 的伤害。每个区域的前 5 秒不会发生此事件。
两名狂欢者加入阵型。他们太过喧闹，以至于与他们相邻的勇士无法使用基本攻击造成伤害。
了解卡兹琳：当阵型受到攻击时，卡兹琳会施放法师护甲保护自己。收集到足够的书籍后，她会将这层保护扩展至整个阵型。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Bandit's Harvest (Cazrin)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“强盗的收割（卡兹琳）”

restrictions.original:
Cazrin starts in the formation. She can be moved but not removed.
You may only use Good Champions, Champions with a Melee or Ranged attack, or Fallbacks Champions.
Starting in area 11, a thrown rock hits a random Champion every second, dealing 25% of their max health in damage and stunning them for 3 seconds. This does not happen for the first 5 seconds of every area.
At the start of each boss area, a Shambling Mound spawns as an additional boss. It must also be defeated to progress.
Getting to Know Cazrin: Cazrin's first specialization choice determines which Champions she works best with, and her second choice determines if her Support or Damage Dealing capabilities are buffed when Uggie is assigned to her.
restrictions.display:
卡兹琳初始位于阵型中。她可以被移动，但不能被移除。
你只能使用善良勇士、拥有近战或远程攻击的勇士，或后备队勇士。
从区域 11 开始，每秒有一个被扔出的石块随机击中一位勇士，对其造成相当于其最大生命值 25% 的伤害并使其眩晕 3 秒。每个区域的前 5 秒不会发生此事件。
在每个首领区域开始时，会刷新一个蔓生怪作为额外首领。必须将它一并击败，游戏才能继续。
了解卡兹琳：卡兹琳的第一个专精选择决定了她最适合与哪些勇士配合，第二个专精选择则决定了当乌吉被配备给她时，她会增强的是支援能力还是伤害输出能力。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Bandit's Harvest (Cazrin)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“强盗的收割（卡兹琳）”

restrictions.original: No restrictions
restrictions.display: 无限制

restrictions.original: Must have completed "Death House"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“死亡之屋”

restrictions.original:
You may only use Champions with all ability scores at 11 or higher.
1-2 Vampires sent by Strahd spawn with each wave. They don't drop gold, nor count towards quest progress.
restrictions.display:
只能使用所有属性值大于等于 11 的勇士。
每波会刷新 1-2 个斯特拉德派来的吸血鬼。它们不会掉落金币，也不计入任务进度。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "Death House"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“死亡之屋”

restrictions.original:
You may only use Champions in seats 2, 3, 5, 7, and 11.
There is a 50% chance that Vecna spawns in the first wave of every area. They don't drop gold, nor count towards quest progress.
restrictions.display:
你只能使用 2、3、5、7、11 号出战栏位的勇士。
在每个区域的第一个波次，有 50% 的几率刷新维克那。他们不会掉落金币，也不计入任务进度。

restrictions.original: Must have completed
restrictions.display: 必须已完成

restrictions.original: No restrictions
restrictions.display: 无限制

restrictions.original: Must have completed "Sacrifice"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“祭品”

restrictions.original:
You may only use Human Champions.
A random Champion takes damage equal to a percentage of their max health every second (in real time). The percentage starts at 10% and increases by 10% (additively) every 100 areas. Damage does not trigger for the first 5 (real time) seconds in every area.
1-2 Vampires sent by Strahd spawn with each wave. They don't drop gold, nor count towards quest progress.
restrictions.display:
只能使用人类勇士。
每秒（现实时间）一名随机勇士会受到最大生命值一定比例的伤害。初始比例为 10%，每 100 个区域增加 10%（以加算方式堆叠）。在每个区域的前 5 秒（现实时间），伤害不会触发。
每波会刷新 1-2 个斯特拉德派来的吸血鬼。它们不会掉落金币，也不计入任务进度。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "Sacrifice"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“祭品”

restrictions.original:
You may only use Elf and Half-Elf Champions.
A random Champion takes damage equal to a percentage of their max health every second (in real time). The percentage starts at 10% and increases by 10% (additively) every 100 areas. Damage does not trigger for the first 5 (real time) seconds in every area.
1-2 Vampires sent by Strahd spawn with each wave. They don't drop gold, nor count towards quest progress.
restrictions.display:
你只能使用精灵和半精灵勇士。
每秒（现实时间）一名随机勇士会受到最大生命值一定比例的伤害。初始比例为 10%，每 100 个区域增加 10%（以加算方式堆叠）。在每个区域的前 5 秒（现实时间），伤害不会触发。
每波会刷新 1-2 个斯特拉德派来的吸血鬼。他们不会掉落金币，也不计入任务进度。

restrictions.original: Must have completed
restrictions.display: 必须已完成

restrictions.original: No restrictions
restrictions.display: 无限制

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Lost Modron"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“失落魔冢”

restrictions.original:
You may only use Rogue and Bard Champions.
Champions with a Charisma of 18 or higher have their positional formation abilities increased by 100%.
restrictions.display:
只能使用游荡者型和吟游诗人型勇士。
魅力达到 18 或以上的勇士的位置阵型技能效果提高 100%。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Lost Modron"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“失落魔冢”

restrictions.original:
You may only use Wizard and Sorcerer Champions.
Champions with an Intelligence of 18 or higher have their positional formation abilities increased by 100%.
There is a 50% chance that Vecna spawns in the first wave of every area. They don't drop gold, nor count towards quest progress. Other monsters have their speed and damage increased by 300% while this Vecna is present.
restrictions.display:
你只能使用身为法师和术士的勇士。
智力大于等于 18 的勇士的位置阵型技能效果提高 100%。
在每个区域的第一个波次，有 50% 的几率刷新维克那。他们不会掉落金币，也不计入任务进度。当这个维克那存在时，其他怪物的速度和伤害提高 300%。

restrictions.original: Must have completed
restrictions.display: 必须已完成

restrictions.original: No restrictions
restrictions.display: 无限制

restrictions.original: Must have completed "Realm of Enchanted Mysteries"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“魔法秘境”

restrictions.original:
You may not use Good Champions.
R04M joins the formation. Champions next to R04M attack 0.5 seconds slower for every 100 areas completed.
restrictions.display:
不能使用善良勇士。
R04M 加入阵型。每完成 100 个区域，紧邻 R04M 的勇士的攻击速度会降低 0.5 秒。

name.display: 无论我和 R04M 流浪到何处

restrictions.original: Must have completed "Realm of Enchanted Mysteries"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“魔法秘境”

restrictions.original:
You may only use Good and/or Evil Champions.
Whenever a Good Champion is adjacent to an Evil Champion, neither Champion deals any damage.
R04M joins the formation.
1-2 Shadar-kai Warriors spawn with each wave. They don't drop gold nor count towards quest progress.
Somnus, Nightmare Warrior joins every boss area as an additional boss that must be defeated to progress.
restrictions.display:
只能使用善良和/或邪恶的勇士。
每当一名善良勇士和一名邪恶勇士相邻时，这两名勇士都不会造成伤害。
R04M 加入阵型。
每波会刷新 1-2 个影灵战士。它们不会掉落金币，也不计入任务进度。
梦魇战士眠努斯会在每个首领区域中作为额外首领加入战局，必须打败他才能继续前进。

restrictions.original: Must have completed
restrictions.display: 必须已完成

restrictions.original: No restrictions
restrictions.display: 无限制

restrictions.original: Must have completed "Full Circle"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“完全闭环”

restrictions.original:
R04M joins the formation. He doesn't do much other than get in the way.
You may not have two Champions in the formation with the exact same base alignment.
restrictions.display:
R04M 加入阵型。他只会拖后腿。
你的阵型中不能有两名基础阵营完全相同的勇士。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "Full Circle"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“完全闭环”

restrictions.original:
You may only use Champions that are completely or partially Neutral.
Enemy Damage is multiplicatively increased by 10% every second, and resets upon changing areas.
restrictions.display:
只能使用完全或部分中立的勇士。
敌人的伤害每秒提高 10%，以乘算方式堆叠，在变更区域后重置。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "Full Circle"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“完全闭环”

restrictions.original: No restrictions
restrictions.display: 无限制

restrictions.original: Must have completed "Return to Fortune's Wheel"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“返回命运之轮”

restrictions.original:
You may only use Lawful Good, Chaotic Good, Lawful Evil, and/or Chaotic Evil Champions.
In each non-boss area, there is a 25% chance 5 Modrons spawn before the first wave. The number of Modrons spawned increases by 5 for every 50 areas completed, capped at 50 Modrons. They drop no gold, nor count towards quest progress.
While any Modron enemy is alive, non-Modron enemies can't take damage.
restrictions.display:
只能使用阵营为守序善良、混乱善良、守序邪恶和/或混乱邪恶的勇士。
在每个非首领区域，有 25% 的几率在第一波前刷新 5 个魔冢。每完成 50 个区域，刷新的魔冢数量增加 5，最多刷新 50 个魔冢。它们不会掉落金币，也不计入任务进度。
当有任何魔冢存活的时候，非魔冢敌人不会受到伤害。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "Return to Fortune's Wheel"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“返回命运之轮”

restrictions.original:
When there are more than 5 Champions in the formation, for each extra Champion above 5:
- Champions attack 2 seconds slower, stacking additively.
- In non-boss areas, an Overambitious City Guard with 20 armor based hits has a 20% chance (stacking additively) of spawning with each wave. Other enemies are immune to damage while any Overambitious City Guards are alive.
- There is a 20% chance (stacking additively) that a Devourer spawns in each boss area that must also be defeated to progress.
restrictions.display:
当阵型中有超过 5 名勇士时，每多出 1 名勇士：
- 勇士们的攻击慢 2 秒，以加算方式堆叠。
- 在非首领区域，每波有 20% 的几率（以加算方式堆叠）刷新一名带 20 点护甲值的雄心勃勃的城市守卫。其他敌人在雄心勃勃的城市守卫存活期间免疫伤害。
- 每个首领区域有 20% 的几率（以加算方式堆叠）刷新一个囚魂魔，必须将其击败才能继续前进。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "Return to Fortune's Wheel"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“返回命运之轮”

restrictions.original: No restrictions
restrictions.display: 无限制

restrictions.original: Must have completed "Shemeshka's Gambit"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“谢梅斯卡的险招”

restrictions.original:
A random Champion is immediately unlocked, added to the formation, and can't be removed.
You may only use Champions that have the same initial alignment as the chosen Champion's initial alignment.
restrictions.display:
立即解锁一名随机的勇士并添加到阵型中，无法将其移除。
只能使用初始阵营与被选中勇士相同的勇士。

restrictions.original: Must have completed
restrictions.display: 必须已完成

restrictions.original:
The Weather is Windy in each area. Champions with Ranged attacks deal no damage with their normal attacks due to the blustery weather.
You may only use Neutral Good Champions.
1-2 Steam Mephits spawn with each wave. They don't drop gold nor count towards quest progress.
An Air Elemental spawns as an additional boss in each boss area. They must also be defeated to progress.
restrictions.display:
所有区域的天气都为大风。由于大风天气，使用远程攻击的勇士基本攻击无法造成伤害。
只能使用中立善良的勇士。
每波会刷新 1-2 个水汽魔蝠。它们不会掉落金币，也不计入任务进度。
在每个首领区域中会刷新一个气元素作为额外首领。必须将其一并击败才能向前推进。

restrictions.original: Must have completed
restrictions.display: 必须已完成

restrictions.original: No restrictions
restrictions.display: 无限制

restrictions.original: Must have completed "Tyrant's Spiral"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“暴君螺旋”

restrictions.original:
You may not have two Champions in the formation with the same base species.
1-2 Gazers spawn with each wave. They don't drop gold nor count towards quest progress.
In each boss area, an additional Beholder boss with more health than normal spawns with the second wave. All other monsters are immune to damage until this Beholder is defeated.
restrictions.display:
你的阵型中不能有两名基础种族相同的勇士。
每波会刷新 1-2 个眼魔。它们不会掉落金币，也不计入任务进度。
在每个首领区域，第二波会额外刷新一个生命值比正常高的眼魔首领。在这个眼魔被击败之前，所有其他怪物都会免疫伤害。

restrictions.original: Must have completed
restrictions.display: 必须已完成

restrictions.original:
You may only use Fighters, Rogues, and Rangers.
1 Gazer spawns with each wave. They don't drop gold nor count towards quest progress. The number of gazers increases by 1 every 100 areas, to a maximum of 10 Gazers at area 901 and beyond
In each boss area, an additional Beholder boss with more health than normal spawns with the second wave. All other monsters are immune to damage until this Beholder is defeated.
restrictions.display:
只能使用战士、游荡者和巡林客。
每波会刷新 1 个眼魔。它们不会掉落金币，也不计入任务进度。每完成 100 个区域，眼魔的数量增加 1 个，在区域 901 和之后的区域达到上限 10 个
在每个首领区域，第二波会额外刷新一个生命值比正常高的眼魔首领。在这个眼魔被击败之前，所有其他怪物都会免疫伤害。

name.original: Return of the Lone Wolf Party

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Peylon Tree"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“佩隆树”

restrictions.original:
You may only use Champions that don't belong to an affiliation.
Riffel (in werewolf form) joins the formation as an escort.
Champions next to Riffel take damage equal to 5% of their total health every second due to his werewolf-y nature.
restrictions.display:
你只能使用不属于任何从属组织的勇士。
里费尔（狼人形态）作为护卫加入阵型。
由于里费尔的狼人本性，与他相邻的勇士每秒受到相当于他们总生命值 5% 的伤害。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Peylon Tree"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“佩隆树”

restrictions.original:
Areas with no weather are instead dark and foggy due to the Shadowfell's influence.
You may only use Champions with a Melee base attack.
1-2 Shadar-kai Warriors spawn with each wave. They don't drop gold nor count towards quest progress.
Champions don't recover health when moving to a new area. 
Champions resurrect at half health when changing areas instead of full health.
restrictions.display:
没有天气效果的区域会由于堕影冥界的影响而变得昏暗多雾。
只能使用可进行近战基本攻击的勇士。
每波会刷新 1-2 个影灵战士。它们不会掉落金币，也不计入任务进度。
勇士在移动到新区域时不会恢复生命值。
改变区域时，复活的勇士只会恢复一半生命值而非全部。

restrictions.display: 必须已完成

restrictions.original: No restrictions
restrictions.display: 无限制

restrictions.display: 必须已完成“三月地窖”

restrictions.original:
You may only use Champions that are 100 years old or older.
In each Boss Area, Lord Soth spawns as an additional boss that must be defeated to progress.
restrictions.display:
你只能使用年龄在 100 岁及以上的勇士。
索斯领主会在每个首领区域中作为额外首领出现，玩家必须打败他才能继续前进。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "Three Moons Vault"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“三月地窖”

restrictions.original:
You may only use Champions with a total ability score of 85 or higher.
Enemies attack twice as often.
Enemy Speed is multiplicatively increased by 10% every second. This speed increase is capped after 40 seconds and resets upon changing areas.
restrictions.display:
只能使用总属性值大于等于 85 的勇士。
敌人的攻击频率翻倍。
敌人的速度每秒提高 10%，以乘算方式堆叠。敌人的速度提升在 40 秒后达到上限，并且会在变更区域后重置。

restrictions.original: Must have completed
restrictions.display: 必须已完成

restrictions.original: No restrictions
restrictions.display: 无限制

restrictions.original: Must have completed "Isle of Serpents"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“毒蛇岛”

restrictions.original:
Due to the debilitating snake venom, you may only use Champions with a CON of 14 or higher.
Whenever a Champion deals Melee damage to a flying snake enemy, or is damaged by a flying snake enemy, they are transformed into a flying snake for 5 seconds, stunning them for the duration. 
1-2 flying snakes spawn with each wave and move 200% faster.
restrictions.display:
由于蛇毒的毒性，你只能使用体质大于等于 14 的勇士。
每当一名勇士对一个飞蛇敌人造成近战伤害，或者被一个飞蛇敌人伤害时，他们就会变形成一条飞蛇，持续 5 秒，并在持续期间使其眩晕。
每波会刷新 1-2 个移速提高 200% 的飞蛇。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "Isle of Serpents"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“毒蛇岛”

restrictions.original:
The weather is snowing in all areas.
You may only use Champions with a Dexterity of 15 or higher.
1-2 Frosty Giant Rats spawn with each wave. They don't drop gold nor count towards quest progress.
A Frost Giant joins the formation.
restrictions.display:
所有区域的天气都为降雪。
只能使用敏捷大于等于 15 的勇士。
每波会刷新 1-2 个巨型老鼠。它们不会掉落金币，也不计入任务进度。
一个霜巨人加入阵型。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "Isle of Serpents"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“毒蛇岛”

restrictions.original: No restrictions
restrictions.display: 无限制

restrictions.original: Must have completed "Tomb of Wayward Souls"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“游荡灵魂之墓”

restrictions.original:
You may only use Champions with a Magic base attack.
Champions don't recover health when moving to a new area. 
Whenever a champion dies, Rerak the False Lich disrupts their soul and they are unavailable for the next 5 minutes of real time.
restrictions.display:
只能使用拥有魔法基本攻击的勇士。
勇士在移动到新区域时不会恢复生命值。
勇士死亡时，假巫妖瑞拉克会再次扰乱他们的灵魂，并且他们在接下来的 5 分钟现实时间内无法使用。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "Tomb of Wayward Souls"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“游荡灵魂之墓”

restrictions.original:
You may not use Lawful Champions unless they are Undead.
A Specter joins the formation. Every second, the Specter drains the life of adjacent Champions equal to 10% of their maximum health. Undead Champions are immune to this damage.
restrictions.display:
不能使用守序勇士，除非他们是亡灵。
一个幽灵加入阵型。每秒钟，幽灵会汲取相邻勇士等同于他们最大生命值 10% 的生命。亡灵勇士对此伤害免疫。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "Tomb of Wayward Souls"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“游荡灵魂之墓”

restrictions.original: No restrictions
restrictions.display: 无限制

restrictions.original: Must have completed "Hellbound"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“地狱之途”

restrictions.original: Every 5 minutes of real time, all enemies' health and damage is increased by 100%, stacking multiplicatively. Better go fast!
restrictions.display: 现实时间每过 5 分钟，所有敌人的生命值和伤害增加 100%，以乘算方式堆叠。你最好走快一点！

restrictions.original: Must have completed
restrictions.display: 必须已完成

restrictions.original:
You may not use Good Champions unless they are Tieflings.
A Fire Elemental joins the formation.Every second, the Fire Elemental deals damage to adjacent Champions equal to 10% of their maximum health. Tiefling Champions are immune to this damage.
restrictions.display:
不能使用善良勇士，除非他们是提夫林。
一个火焰元素生物加入阵型。每秒钟，火焰元素生物会对相邻勇士造成等同于他们最大生命值 10% 的伤害。提夫林勇士对此伤害免疫。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "Hellbound"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“地狱之途”

restrictions.original: No restrictions
restrictions.display: 无限制

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Red Belvedere"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“绯红望台”

restrictions.original:
You may only use Champions with the Gold Find role.
Windfall joins the formation. 
2-3 Red Dragon Wyrmlings spawn with each wave. They drop no gold nor count towards quest progress.
The house always wins. Monsters drop 10% less gold (stacking multiplicatively) for every second you spend in an area.
restrictions.display:
你只能使用拥有金币寻获角色的勇士。
温德福尔加入阵型。
每波会刷新 2-3 条红龙雏龙。它们不会掉落金币，也不计入任务进度。
庄家总是赢家。你每在一个区域逗留一秒，怪物掉落的金币就减少 10%（以乘算方式堆叠）。

restrictions.original: Must have completed
restrictions.display: 必须已完成

restrictions.original:
Every time an enemy spawns, a copy also spawns.
Each non-static boss spawns with a copy that must also be defeated to progress.
Static bosses spawn with double the health.
You may only use Champions with a base attack cooldown of 5 seconds or less, but all Champion base attack cooldowns are doubled.
restrictions.display:
每次刷新一名敌人，同时刷新一个其复制体。
每个非静态首领刷新时会伴随一个复制体，必须将其一并击败才能向前推进。
静态首领刷新时生命值翻倍。
只能使用基本攻击冷却时间小于等于 5 秒的勇士，但所有勇士的基本攻击冷却时间翻倍。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Red Belvedere"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“绯红望台”

restrictions.original: No restrictions
restrictions.display: 无限制

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Rod of Seven Parts"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“七节权杖”

restrictions.original:
The formation slots are colored Red, Black and two glowing Green slots.
A giant roulette ball joins the formation as an escort.
Starting upon entering area 101, and every 100 areas thereafter, the giant roulette ball jumps up and spins around in a circle above the formation before landing on a random formation slot, removing that Champion and all other Champions that are in a formation slot of the same color. Removed Champions can't be used for the rest of the adventure, and the ball stays in that slot until it moves again.
Champions can't otherwise be removed from the formation once they've been added.
restrictions.display:
阵型栏位将分为红色、黑色以及两个发光的绿色栏位。
一个巨型轮盘球加入阵型作为护卫。
从区域 101 开始，之后每推进 100 个区域，巨型轮盘球就会跳起，在区域上方旋转一圈，然后落在一个随机阵型栏位上，并移除该阵型栏位上以及所有处于相同颜色栏位上的勇士。被移除的勇士在本次冒险内不能再使用，并且球会停留在该栏位上，直到它再次移动。
除这种情况外，加入阵型的勇士不能被移除。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The House Always Wins"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“庄家总是赢家”

restrictions.original:
The formation slots are colored Red, Black and two glowing Green slots.
A giant roulette ball joins the formation as an escort
Starting upon entering area 76, and every 75 areas thereafter, the giant roulette ball jumps up and spins around in a circle above the formation before landing on a random formation slot, removing that Champion and all other Champions that are in a formation slot of the same color. Removed Champions can't be used for the rest of the adventure, and the ball stays in that slot until it moves again.
Champions can't otherwise be removed from the formation once they've been added.
Click damage only deals damage (including fire breath effects) for the first 25 areas.
Fire breath potions can't be used during the adventure.
restrictions.display:
阵型栏位将分为红色、黑色以及两个发光的绿色栏位。
一个巨型轮盘球加入阵型作为护卫。
从区域 76 开始，之后每推进 75 个区域，巨型轮盘球就会跳起，在区域上方旋转一圈，然后落在一个随机阵型栏位上，并移除该阵型栏位上以及所有处于相同颜色栏位上的勇士。被移除的勇士在本次冒险内不能再使用，并且球会停留在该栏位上，直到它再次移动。
除这种情况外，加入阵型的勇士不能被移除。
点击伤害只会在前 25 个区域造成伤害（包括火焰吐息效果）。
冒险过程中不能使用火息药剂。

restrictions.original: Must have completed
restrictions.display: 必须已完成

restrictions.original: No restrictions
restrictions.display: 无限制

restrictions.original: Must have completed "Pandemonium"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“万魔殿”

restrictions.original:
Every wave spawns 1-2 Illusory Fancy Red Pandas. They don't drop gold, nor count towards quest progress.
Every time a Red Panda is defeated, enemy damage and movement speed is increased by 50%, stacking multiplicatively and resetting when changing areas. You may only use Evil Champions, as only Evil Champions have the heart to attack these adorable Red Pandas. You should be ashamed of yourself for encouraging this behavior.
restrictions.display:
每个波次都会刷新 1-2 只酷炫小熊猫的幻象。它们不会掉落金币，也不计入任务进度。
每击败一只小熊猫，敌人的伤害和移动速度就会增加 50%，效果以乘算方式堆叠，并且在区域切换时重置。只能使用邪恶阵营的勇士，因为只有邪恶阵营的勇士才有胆量攻击这些可爱的小熊猫。你应该为纵容这种行为而感到羞愧。

restrictions.original: Must have completed
restrictions.display: 必须已完成

restrictions.original:
You may only use Chaotic Champions.
Each time a Champion attacks, their next base attack cooldown is randomly set to a time between 1 and 20 seconds.
Each enemy spawns with a random buff: Speed is increased by 500%, Damage is increased by 500%, or Health is increased by 500%. This includes boss enemies.
restrictions.display:
只能使用混乱阵营的勇士。
每次一名勇士攻击后，其下次基本攻击的冷却时间会被随机设定为 1 至 20 秒之间的任意时间。
每名敌人刷新时带有一项随机增益：速度增加 500%、伤害增加 500% 或者生命值增加 500%。这包括首领敌人。

restrictions.original: Must have completed
restrictions.display: 必须已完成

restrictions.original: No restrictions
restrictions.display: 无限制

restrictions.original: Must have completed
restrictions.display: 必须已完成

restrictions.original:
You may only use Champions that are a Standard species. Standard species are Aasimar, Dragonborn, Dwarf, Elf, Gnome, Goliath, Halfling, Human, Orc, Tiefling, Half-Orc, and Half-Elf.
A Drow Priestess joins the formation. 
Each wave, 1-2 Giant Spiders attack. When defeated, they respawn in the same location after 5 seconds unless defeated by a Champion next to the Drow Priestess.
restrictions.display:
你只能使用属于标准种族的勇士。标准种族是指神裔、龙裔、矮人、精灵、侏儒、巨人、半身人、人类、兽人、提夫林、半兽人和半精灵。
一名卓尔精灵女祭司加入阵型。
每一波会有 1-2 只巨型蜘蛛攻击。除非被与卓尔精灵女祭司相邻的勇士击败，否则巨型蜘蛛死亡 5 秒后会在相同位置重生。

restrictions.original: Must have completed
restrictions.display: 必须已完成

restrictions.original:
You may only use Champions that are NOT a Standard Species. Standard species are Aasimar, Dragonborn, Dwarf, Elf, Gnome, Goliath, Halfling, Human, Orc, Tiefling, Half-Orc, and Half-Elf.
1-2 fiery foes spawn with each wave. These enemies have 300% speed, and they don't drop gold nor count towards quest progress.
restrictions.display:
只能使用属于非标准种族的勇士。标准种族是指神裔、龙裔、矮人、精灵、侏儒、巨人、半身人、人类、兽人、提夫林、半兽人和半精灵。
每波会刷新 1-2 个充满火焰的敌人。这些敌人的速度提升为 300%，并且不会掉落金币，也不计入任务进度。

restrictions.original: Must have completed
restrictions.display: 必须已完成

restrictions.original: No restrictions
restrictions.display: 无限制

restrictions.original: Must have completed
restrictions.display: 必须已完成

restrictions.original:
You may only use Champions that are not a Standard species. Standard species are Aasimar, Dragonborn, Dwarf, Elf, Gnome, Goliath, Halfling, Human, Orc, Tiefling, Half-Orc, and Half-Elf.
Aarakocra Champions break 3 times the amount of armored or segmented health when they deal damage.
Bosses cannot be moved, rooted, or stunned, except in extraordinary circumstances, and they immediately start to enrage upon spawning.
All boss monsters have at least 25 armored health.
restrictions.display:
你只能使用属于非标准种族的勇士。标准种族是指神裔、龙裔、矮人、精灵、侏儒、巨人、半身人、人类、兽人、提夫林、半兽人和半精灵。
翼爪鸟人种族的勇士在造成伤害时，能破坏 3 倍重甲生命值或分段生命值的数值。
首领不能被移动、定身或眩晕（特殊情况除外），并且一出现就会立即开始狂暴。
所有首领怪物拥有至少 25 点重甲生命值。

restrictions.display: 无限制

restrictions.original: Must have completed "Vecna's Grasp"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“维克那的魔爪”

restrictions.original:
You may only use Champions with a total ability score of 80 or higher.
Every 50 areas, the Champion with the lowest base DPS betrays the party and leaves the formation for the rest of the adventure. This does not affect Kas if he is in the formation. If Kas has the lowest DPS, the Champion with the second lowest DPS leaves instead.
After area 25, you can't otherwise remove Champions from the formation.
restrictions.display:
只能使用总属性值大于等于 80 的勇士。
每完成 50 个区域，基础伤害输出最低的勇士会背叛探险队并离开阵型，在本次冒险的剩余时间都不会回来。如果凯斯在阵型中，他不会受影响。如果凯斯的伤害输出最低，那么离开的将是伤害输出倒数第二低的勇士。
完成区域 25 之后，你无法将勇士从阵型中移除。

restrictions.original: Must have completed
restrictions.display: 必须已完成

restrictions.original: No restrictions
restrictions.display: 无限制

restrictions.original: Must have completed "Shattered Reflection"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“破碎的倒影”

restrictions.original:
Undead enemies speed and damage are increased by 300%.
The Eye and Hand of Vecna join the formation. You may only place Wizard Champions next to the Eye, and you may only place Champions with a Strength of 18 or higher next to the Hand.
restrictions.display:
亡灵敌人的速度和伤害提高 300%。
维克那之手和维克那法眼加入阵型。你只能把身为法师的勇士放置在维克那法眼旁边，同时你只能把力量大于等于 18 的勇士放置在维克那之手旁边。

restrictions.original: Must have completed
