restrictions.original: No restrictions
restrictions.display: 无限制

restrictions.original: Must have completed "An Acquired Taste"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“习得的品味”

restrictions.original: Ezmerelda starts in the formation. She can be moved, but not removed. Only Champions with the Hunter role (like Ezmerelda or Minsc) can deal damage. You can still use other Champions to tank, support, or heal, they just won't deal damage. 1-2 Zombies loyal to Strahd spawn with each wave. They don't drop gold nor count towards quest progress. Enemies have 1000% more health, but enemies that are a Favored Foe for any Champion take 400% additional damage. Getting to know Idle Champions: Champions with the Hunter role usually have Favored Foes, granting your Champions an advantage against enemies of specific types.
restrictions.display: 艾丝美拉达初始位于阵型中。她可以被移动，但不能被移除。 只有担任猎人角色定位（如艾丝美拉达或明斯克）的勇士可以造成伤害。你仍然可以使用其他勇士来承担坦克、支援或治疗角色，只是他们将无法造成伤害。 每波会刷新 1-2 个忠于斯特拉德的僵尸。它们不会掉落金币，也不计入任务进度。 敌人拥有 1000% 额外生命值，但只要是任何一位勇士的偏好对手，敌人就将额外受到 400% 伤害。 了解《Idle Champions》：拥有猎人角色定位的勇士通常会有偏好对手，这能让你的勇士在对抗特定类型敌人时占据优势。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "An Acquired Taste"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“习得的品味”

restrictions.original:
Ezmerelda starts in the formation. She can be moved, but not removed.
You may only use Champions with the Debuff role.
Enemies without a debuff applied to them only take 1 damage from all attacks, move 400% faster, and deal 800% more damage.
restrictions.display:
艾丝美拉达初始位于阵型中。她可以被移动，但不能被移除。
你只能使用担任减益角色定位的勇士。
没有被施加任何减益的敌人只会受到 1 点攻击伤害，移动速度增加 400%，且造成 800% 额外伤害。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "An Acquired Taste"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“习得的品味”

restrictions.original:
Ezmerelda starts in the formation. She can be moved, but not removed.
Champions without the Breaker role have their base damage permanently set to 1.
An ogre carrying a battering ram takes up 3 slots in the formation.
All boss enemies have 25 armored health if they don't have segmented or armored health already.
Strahd spawns as an extra boss in every boss area. He must also be defeated to progress.
restrictions.display:
艾丝美拉达初始位于阵型中。她可以被移动，但不能被移除。
未拥有突破者角色定位的勇士，其基础伤害永久设为 1。
一名扛着攻城锤的食人魔会在阵型中占据 3 格。
所有首领敌人若无分段生命值或重甲生命值，则拥有 25 点重甲生命值。
斯特拉德会作为额外首领刷新在每一个首领区域中。必须将他一并击败，游戏才能继续。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "An Acquired Taste"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“习得的品味”

restrictions.original: No restrictions
restrictions.display: 无限制

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Ties That Bind"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“羁绊之力”

restrictions.original: Catti-brie starts in the formation. She can be moved, but not removed. Enemies take significantly less damage the closer they get to the formation. Use Champions that knock back enemies to get around this problem! Enemies have 1000% more health, but this buff is decreased by 100% for each Control Champion you have in your formation, stacking additively. Getting to know Idle Champions: Some Champions with the Control role can push enemies away from the formation, protecting your front line.
restrictions.display: 凯蒂布莉儿初始位于阵型中。她可以被移动，但不能被移除。 敌人越靠近阵型，所受伤害就大幅减少。使用能击退敌人的勇士来应对这个问题吧！ 敌人拥有 1000% 额外生命值，但你阵型中每有一名控制型勇士，该增益就会减少 100%，以加算方式堆叠。 了解《Idle Champions》：部分控制型勇士可以将敌人推离阵型，从而保护前线。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Ties That Bind"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“羁绊之力”

restrictions.original:
Catti-brie starts in the formation. She can be moved, but not removed.
Champions have an additional 20% critical hit chance.
Champions' normal attacks only deal damage when they are Critical Hits.
Two local residents join the formation to experience life as  adventurers. They're a little battle-shy and don't attack or assist in any way.
Fire breath potions can't be used during the adventure, and click damage has no effect after area 50.
restrictions.display:
凯蒂布莉儿初始位于阵型中。她可以被移动，但不能被移除。
勇士们拥有额外 20% 暴击率。
勇士的普通攻击仅在造成暴击时才会造成伤害。
两位本地居民加入阵型，体验冒险者的生活。他们有些畏战，不会进行攻击或提供任何协助。
冒险过程中不能使用火息药剂，并且点击伤害在区域 50 之后无效。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Ties That Bind"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“羁绊之力”

restrictions.original:
Catti-brie starts in the formation. She can be moved, but not removed.
You may only use unaffiliated Champions and/or Companions of the Hall Champions.
Each unaffiliated Champion in the formation adds 1 Mithral Hall stack.
Every 75 areas, up to two random Champions are removed from the formation. They can't be used for the rest of the adventure. Champions from the Companions of the Hall affiliation are unaffected by this.
Fire breath potions can't be used during the adventure, and click damage has no effect after area 75.
restrictions.display:
凯蒂布莉儿初始位于阵型中。她可以被移动，但不能被移除。
你只能使用无从属组织勇士和/或秘银五侠勇士。
阵型中的每位无从属组织勇士均增加 1 层秘银厅增益。
每完成 75 个区域，将有最多两位随机勇士被移出阵型。他们在接下来的冒险中将无法使用。来自秘银五侠从属组织的勇士不会受到此影响。
冒险过程中不能使用火息药剂，并且点击伤害在区域 75 之后无效。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Ties That Bind"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“羁绊之力”

restrictions.original: No restrictions
restrictions.display: 无限制

restrictions.original: Must have completed "A Royal Welcome"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“盛大的欢迎”

restrictions.original: Melf starts in the formation. He can't be moved or removed. You may only use Champions that have positional formation abilities. You may not place Champions with the DPS role next to Melf. Getting to know Idle Champions: A positional formation ability is an ability that applies to only some Champions in specific slots in a formation.
restrictions.display: 马友夫初始位于阵型中。他无法被移动或移除。 只能使用拥有位置阵型技能的勇士。 不能在马友夫的旁边放置拥有伤害输出角色定位的勇士。 了解《Idle Champions》：位置阵型技能是指只对阵型中特定格子上的勇士生效的技能。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "A Royal Welcome"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“盛大的欢迎”

restrictions.original:
Melf starts in the formation. He can be moved, but not removed.
Only one Champion of each species can be in the formation at any time. Multispecies Champions count for all of their species. You may use a second elf in addition to Melf.
Quest requirements are doubled on all non-boss areas.
restrictions.display:
马友夫初始位于阵型中。他可以被移动，但不能被移除。
在任何时候，每个种族只有一名勇士可以在阵型中。如果是多种族勇士，则其所属的所有种族都将计算在内。除了马友夫，你还可以使用另一名精灵。
所有非首领区域的任务要求翻倍。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "A Royal Welcome"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“盛大的欢迎”

restrictions.original:
Melf starts in the formation. He can be moved, but not removed.
You may only use one Champion with the DPS role.
If you add a male DPS Champion to the formation, you may not use any other male Champions (other than Melf.)
If you add a female DPS to the formation, you may not use any other female Champions.
A nonbinary DPS allows anyone to be used, and a nonbinary support Champion may always be used.
Acid Bubbles spawn in all non-boss areas. Some bubbles contain additional enemies that must be defeated afterwards. When a bubble is popped (killed), all Champions in the formation take 5% of their maximum health as acid damage. They don't drop gold nor count towards quest progress.
restrictions.display:
马友夫初始位于阵型中。他可以被移动，但不能被移除。
只能使用一名拥有伤害输出角色定位的勇士。
如果你把一名男性伤害输出勇士添加到阵型中，那么你将不可以再使用任何其他男性勇士（马友夫除外）。
如果你把一名女性伤害输出勇士添加到阵型中，那么你将不可以再使用任何其他女性勇士。
把非二元性别的伤害输出勇士添加到阵型中不会限制你使用任何角色，非二元性别的支援勇士任何时候都能使用。
所有非首领区域会刷新酸性泡泡。有些泡泡里有额外的敌人，必须在之后将其击败。当一个泡泡被打破（击杀），阵型中的所有勇士会受到酸性伤害，最大生命值减少 5%。它们不会掉落金币，也不计入任务进度。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "A Royal Welcome"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“盛大的欢迎”

restrictions.original: No restrictions
restrictions.display: 无限制

restrictions.original: Must have completed "Two Skies"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“两片天空”

restrictions.original: Lae'zel starts in the formation. She can be moved, but not removed. After area 50, Champions only deal 1 point of damage with normal attacks that aren't Critical Hits. A lesser Gibbering Mouther spawns with each wave. They don't drop gold nor count towards quest progress. Getting to Know Idle Champions: Some Champions, like Lae'zel, Strongheart, and Catti-brie, have an increased chance to deal high-damage Critical Hits with their attacks.
restrictions.display: 莱埃泽尔初始位于阵型中。她可以被移动，但不能被移除。 在区域 50 之后，勇士们没有打出暴击的普通攻击只会造成 1 点伤害。 每波会刷新一个次级惧噬体。它们不会掉落金币，也不计入任务进度。 了解《Idle Champions》：部分勇士（如莱埃泽尔、强心和凯蒂布莉儿）的攻击有较高几率打出高伤害的暴击。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "Two Skies"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“两片天空”

restrictions.original:
Lae'zel starts in the formation. She can be moved, but not removed.
You may only use Champions with a Wisdom of 14 or higher, and/or Dexterity of 16 or higher. You may also use Commodore Krux.
A Githyanki and Githzerai join the formation. Champions between them deal no damage due to their bickering.
An Intellect Devourer spawns with each wave. They don't drop gold nor count towards quest progress.
restrictions.display:
莱埃泽尔初始位于阵型中。她可以被移动，但不能被移除。
只能使用感知大于等于 14 和/或敏捷大于等于 16 的勇士。还可以使用克鲁克斯准将。
一名吉斯洋基人和吉斯泽莱人加入阵型。由于他们会吵个没完，所以在他们之间的勇士无法造成伤害。
每波刷新 1 个噬脑怪。它们不会掉落金币，也不计入任务进度。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "Two Skies"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“两片天空”

restrictions.original:
Lae'zel starts in the formation. She can be moved, but not removed.
You may only use Evil and/or Neutral Champions. You may also use Commodore Krux. 
After area 50, Champions only deal 1 point of damage with normal attacks that aren't Critical Hits.
Enemy speed and damage is increased by 300%.
An armored Mind Flayer Guard spawns with each wave. They don't drop gold nor count towards quest progress.
restrictions.display:
莱埃泽尔初始位于阵型中。她可以被移动，但不能被移除。
只能使用邪恶和/或中立的勇士。还可以使用克鲁克斯准将。
在区域 50 之后，勇士们没有打出暴击的普通攻击只会造成 1 点伤害。
敌人的速度和伤害提高 300%。
每波刷新一名重甲夺心魔守卫。它们不会掉落金币，也不计入任务进度。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "Two Skies"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“两片天空”

restrictions.original: No restrictions
restrictions.display: 无限制

name.original: A Good Tank Is Hard To Find

restrictions.original: Must have completed "Returning Day"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“归来之日”

restrictions.original: Dynaheir starts in the formation. She can be moved, but not removed. Other than Krydle, you may not use Tanking Champions. Getting to Know Idle Champions: Tanking Champions keep your formation safe when things get dangerous. Use Dynaheir's specialization choice wisely if you need help finding tanks!
restrictions.display: 戴娜黑初始位于阵型中。她可以被移动，但不能被移除。 不能使用除克莱达以外的坦克型勇士。 了解《Idle Champions》：当情况危急时，坦克型勇士可保证你阵型的安全。如果你在寻找坦克型勇士方面需要帮助，那就要谨慎决定戴娜黑的专精选择！

restrictions.original: Must have completed "Returning Day"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“归来之日”

restrictions.original:
Dynaheir starts in the formation. She can be moved, but not removed.
You may only use Champions with a Constitution of exactly 14, not counting any Circle Magic shenanigans.
restrictions.display:
戴娜黑初始位于阵型中。她可以被移动，但不能被移除。
只能使用体质刚好为 14 的勇士，“圆环魔法”耍的小伎俩不计入其中。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "Returning Day"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“归来之日”

restrictions.original: Dynaheir starts in the formation. She can be moved, but not removed. The Devourer joins the formation. After area 50, the Devourer eats the first quest item dropped by each defeated enemy. Getting to Know Idle Champions: The Devourer is consuming the first Quest Item that each enemy drops. If only there were ways to increase that number?
restrictions.display: 戴娜黑初始位于阵型中。她可以被移动，但不能被移除。 囚魂魔加入阵型。 在区域 50 之后，囚魂魔会吃掉每个被击败敌人掉落的第一件任务物品。 了解《Idle Champions》：囚魂魔会吃掉每个敌人掉落的第一件任务物品。要是有办法增加这个数量呢？

restrictions.original: Must have completed "Returning Day"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“归来之日”

restrictions.original: No restrictions
restrictions.display: 无限制

restrictions.original: Must have completed "Friends of a Feather"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“友以类聚”

restrictions.original: Strongheart starts in the formation with his Justice Needs Champions ability unlocked. He can't be moved or removed. You may only use Event Champions. You can get more Event Champions in events, from time gates, or in this campaign! Only Strongheart and Champions affected by his Justice Needs Champions ability can deal damage. Getting to Know Idle Champions: Events are the easiest way to collect and power up your Champions, and Strongheart's scavenger ability gets you additional Event tokens for use in these events!
restrictions.display: 强心初始位于阵型中，并已解锁他的“正义需要勇士”技能。他无法被移动或移除。 只能使用活动勇士。你可以在活动、时空门或者此战役中获得更多活动勇士！ 只有强心和受他的“正义需要勇士”技能影响的勇士可以造成伤害。 了解《Idle Champions》：活动是收集和强化勇士的最简单方式，而且强心的回收者技能能让你获得更多可在这些活动里使用的活动代币！

restrictions.original: Must have completed "Friends of a Feather"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“友以类聚”

restrictions.original:
Strongheart starts in the formation. He can be moved, but not removed.
You may only use Good Champions.
After area 50, Champions deal 1 damage with normal attacks until any Champion lands a Critical Hit in the current area.
When a Champion deals a Critical Hit, that Champion takes damage equal to 20% of their maximum health.
Fire breath potions can't be used during the adventure, and click damage has no effect after area 50.
restrictions.display:
强心初始位于阵型中。他可以被移动，但不能被移除。
只能使用善良勇士。
在区域 50 之后，勇士们的普通攻击只会造成 1 点伤害，直到有任意勇士在当前区域内打出暴击为止。
当某一名勇士打出暴击时，该勇士会受到等同于其最大生命值 20% 的伤害。
冒险过程中不能使用火息药剂，并且点击伤害在区域 50 之后无效。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "Friends of a Feather"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“友以类聚”

restrictions.original:
Strongheart starts in the formation. He can be moved, but not removed.
Only Strongheart and Champions from the affiliation(s) with the most members in the formation can deal damage.
Once the formation has 3 Champions from the same affiliation, you can't add any more Champions from that affiliation.
restrictions.display:
强心初始位于阵型中。他可以被移动，但不能被移除。
只有强心以及与阵型大多数成员来自相同从属组织的勇士才能造成伤害。
一旦阵型中有 3 名勇士来自相同的从属组织，你将无法再添加任何来自该从属组织的勇士。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "Friends of a Feather"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“友以类聚”

restrictions.original: No restrictions
restrictions.display: 无限制

restrictions.original: Havilar joins the formation. She can be moved, but not removed. You may only use Champions that are a Standard Species. Standard Species are Aasimar, Dragonborn, Dwarf, Elf, Gnome, Goliath, Halfling, Human, Orc, Tiefling, Half-Orc, and Half-Elf Quest requirements are doubled. Getting to Know Idle Champions: Some Speed Champions, like Havilar, increase the rate at which you progress in area quests. Use her and other Speed Champions to get through these increased requirements.
restrictions.display: 哈维拉加入阵型。她可以被移动，但不能被移除。 只能使用属于标准种族的勇士。标准种族是指神裔、龙裔、矮人、精灵、侏儒、巨人、半身人、人类、兽人、提夫林、半兽人和半精灵。 任务要求翻倍。 了解《Idle Champions》：一些速度型勇士（例如哈维拉）可加快你完成区域任务要求的速度。用她和其他速度型勇士来完成这些增加的要求吧。

restrictions.original:
Havilar joins the formation. She can be moved, but not removed.
You may only use Champions with an ability score total of 81 or more.
All enemies have 4 armored health if they don't already have segmented health.
Enemy speed and damage are increased by 100%.
All Champions' base attack cooldowns are increased by 3 seconds.
restrictions.display:
哈维拉加入阵型。她可以被移动，但不能被移除。
只能使用总属性值大于等于 81 的勇士。
所有敌人若无分段式生命值，则拥有 4 点重甲生命值。
敌人的速度和伤害提高 100%。
所有勇士的基本攻击冷却时间增加 3 秒。

restrictions.original:
Havilar joins the formation. She can be moved, but not removed.
You may only use Neutral Good, Chaotic Good, and/or Chaotic Neutral Champs.
Each enemy's damage increases by 100% for each second they are active before they attack, stacking multiplicatively.
restrictions.display:
哈维拉加入阵型。她可以被移动，但不能被移除。
只能使用中立善良、混乱善良和/或混乱中立勇士。
所有敌人在发动攻击前每在场上活跃 1 秒，伤害提高 100%，以乘算方式堆叠。

restrictions.original: No restrictions
restrictions.display: 无限制

restrictions.original: Hank joins the formation. He can be moved, but not removed. You may only use Champions with an ability score total of 78 or less. Once you have two Champions in the formation with a particular ability score total, you may not add any more Champions with that particular ability score total. Getting to Know Idle Champions: Many variants restrict Champions based on their ability scores. By collecting a bunch of Champions, you'll have more choices in these restrictive variants.
restrictions.display: 汉克加入阵型。他可以被移动，但不能被移除。 只能使用总属性值小于等于 78 的勇士。 一旦你的阵型中有两位勇士的总属性值为某一数值，那么你就不能再添加总属性值为该数值的勇士了。 了解《Idle Champions》：很多支线任务会根据勇士的属性值对他们进行限制。如果你收集的勇士数量足够多，你在面对这些有限制条件的支线任务时就会有更多选择。

restrictions.original:
Hank joins the formation. He can be moved, but not removed.
You may only use Champions that are 30 years old or younger. Additionally, you may use Rosie and/or Gromma.
All enemies in a wave spawn at the same time.
Enemies with melee attacks automatically defeat Champions they deal damage to.
restrictions.display:
汉克加入阵型。他可以被移动，但不能被移除。
只能使用年龄在 30 岁或以下的勇士。此外，可以使用罗茜和/或格罗玛。
同一波的所有敌人会同时刷新。
近战攻击的敌人会自动击败被他们造成伤害的勇士。

restrictions.original:
Hank joins the formation. He can be moved, but not removed.
You may only use Good Champions.
Assorted friends join the formation.
At the start of each Boss area, Venger arrives on his nightmare as an additional boss that must be defeated.
restrictions.display:
汉克加入阵型。他可以被移动，但不能被移除。
只能使用善良勇士。
各种各样的朋友加入阵型。
在每个首领区域开始时，复仇者骑着他的梦魇出现，玩家必须打败他才能继续前进。

restrictions.original: No restrictions
restrictions.display: 无限制

restrictions.original: Kas joins the formation. He can be moved, but not removed. You may not use any other Champions that have the DPS role. One of Kas's soldiers joins the formation. Only Evil Champions next to the soldier can deal damage with their base attacks. Getting to Know Idle Champions: Champions with the DPS role are your main damage dealers. Choose and position your Champions well to make the most out of your party's main damage dealer!
restrictions.display: 凯斯加入阵型。他可以被移动，但不能被移除。 不能使用任何其他拥有伤害输出角色定位的勇士。 一名凯斯的士兵加入阵型。只有与该士兵相邻的邪恶勇士可以用基本攻击造成伤害。 了解《Idle Champions》：拥有伤害输出角色定位的勇士是你的主要伤害输出者。合理选择并放置你的勇士来最大限度发挥你探险队中主要伤害输出者的作用！

restrictions.original:
Kas joins the formation. He can be moved, but not removed.
Boss health, damage, and speed are increased by 100%.
A boss enemy spawns at the start of the first wave of each non-boss area. These extra bosses do not drop gold or loot bags, or count toward quest progress
Two of Kas's soldiers join the formation. Only Evil Champions next to either soldier can deal damage with their base attacks.
restrictions.display:
凯斯加入阵型。他可以被移动，但不能被移除。
首领的生命值、伤害和速度提高 100%。
每个非首领区域的第一个波次开始时，刷新 1 个首领敌人。这些额外的首领不会掉落金币或战利品袋，也不计入任务进度。
两名凯斯的士兵加入阵型。只有与任意一名士兵相邻的邪恶勇士可以用基本攻击造成伤害。

restrictions.original:
Kas joins the formation. He can be moved, but not removed.
Champions don't recover health when moving to a new area. 
Champions resurrect at half health when changing areas instead of full health.
At the start of each area, Champions take damage equal to 30% of their max health.
Three of Kas's soldiers join the formation. Only Evil Champions next to either soldier can deal damage with their base attacks.
restrictions.display:
凯斯加入阵型。他可以被移动，但不能被移除。
勇士在移动到新区域时不会恢复生命值。
改变区域时，复活的勇士只会恢复一半生命值而非全部。
在每个区域开始时，勇士们会受到等同于他们最大生命值 30% 的伤害。
三名凯斯的士兵加入阵型。只有与任意一名士兵相邻的邪恶勇士可以用基本攻击造成伤害。

restrictions.original: No restrictions
restrictions.display: 无限制

restrictions.original: Nordom joins the formation. He can be moved, but not removed. Click damage only deals damage for the first 25 areas. Fire breath potions can't be used during the adventure. Once a Champion is placed in the formation they can not be swapped or removed Every 50 areas, 20% of the Champions are removed and locked for the remainder of the adventure. Nordom is immune to this effect. Getting to Know Idle Champions: Once you've unlocked at least two Champions in each bench slot, you can attempt to unlock a second party and run two sets of Champions at the same time! This variant gives you a little practice on how to Split the Party.
restrictions.display: 诺顿加入阵型。他可以被移动，但不能被移除。 点击伤害只会在前 25 个区域造成伤害。 冒险过程中不能使用火息药剂。 在阵型中放置勇士后，不能替换或撤下。 每完成 50 个区域，20% 勇士将被移除，且在剩余冒险中被锁定。诺顿对此效果免疫。 了解《Idle Champions》：在你每个出战栏位都解锁了至少两名勇士后，你可以尝试解锁第二支探险队，并同时部署两套勇士阵容！这个支线任务可让你练习一下如何分散队伍。

restrictions.original:
Nordom joins the formation. He can be moved, but not removed.
Only one Champion of each species can be included in the formation at any time. Champions with multiple species count for all of their species.
Non-boss Construct enemies without segmented health have 4 segmented health instead of their normal health
1-2 Modrons spawn with each wave. They don't drop gold nor count towards quest progress.
restrictions.display:
诺顿加入阵型。他可以被移动，但不能被移除。
在任何时候，每个种族只有一名勇士可以加入阵型。如选择的是多种族勇士，则其拥有的所有种族都将计算在内。
无分段式生命值的非首领构装生物敌人拥有 4 点分段式生命值，而非其正常生命值
每波会刷新 1-2 个魔冢。它们不会掉落金币，也不计入任务进度。

restrictions.original:
Nordom joins the formation. He can be moved, but not removed.
You may only use Champions with a total ability score of 82 or higher.
R04M starts in the formation. Champions next to R04M have a +2 bonus to all ability scores, but it's too late to help with the variant restriction.
restrictions.display:
诺顿加入阵型。他可以被移动，但不能被移除。
只能使用总属性值大于等于 82 的勇士。
R04M 初始位于阵型中。与 R04M 相邻的勇士会获得所有属性值 +2 的加成，但这来不及帮助勇士满足支线任务的限制条件了。

restrictions.original: No restrictions
restrictions.display: 无限制

restrictions.original: Duke Ravengard starts in the formation. He can be moved, but not removed. You may only use Champions with a Melee base attack. After you complete area 50 for the first time, you can't remove Champions from the formation. When you complete this variant, any Champions in the formation will be unavailable in the Burden of Legacy or End of a Legacy variants. Each Patron variant has its own list of unavailable Champions. Fire breath potions can't be used during the adventure, and click damage has no effect after area 100. Getting to Know Idle Champions: A Champion's attack is categorized as a Melee, Ranged, and/or a Magic attack. Some Variants and Champion abilities require a Champion to have a specific type of attack!
restrictions.display: 瑞文嘉德公爵初始位于阵型中。他可以被移动，但不能被移除。 只能使用可进行近战基本攻击的勇士。 在你第一次完成区域 50 后，你无法将勇士从阵型中移除。 当你完成此支线任务后，阵型中的所有勇士将不可用于“传承的负担”或“传承的终结”支线任务。每项赞助者支线任务都有各自的不可用勇士名单。 冒险过程中不能使用火息药剂，并且点击伤害在区域 100 之后无效。 了解《Idle Champions》：勇士的攻击分为近战、远程和/或魔法攻击。部分支线任务和勇士技能需要勇士拥有特定类型的攻击方式！

restrictions.original: Duke Ravengard starts in the formation. He can be moved, but not removed. You may only use Champions with a Melee base attack. You also can't use any Champions that you used to finish variant 1 other than Duke Ravengard. After area 10, all enemies spawn with an extra 10 armored hit points which must be destroyed before their regular hit points appear. When an enemy is knocked back, these armored hit points are immediately removed, revealing its normal health bar. After you complete area 50 for the first time, you can't remove Champions from the formation. When you complete this variant, any Champions in the formation will be unavailable in the End of a Legacy variant. Each Patron variant has its own list of unavailable Champions. Fire breath potions can't be used during the adventure, and click damage has no effect after area 100.
restrictions.display: 瑞文嘉德公爵初始位于阵型中。他可以被移动，但不能被移除。 只能使用可进行近战基本攻击的勇士。同时不能使用所有你用来完成支线任务 1 的勇士（瑞文嘉德公爵除外）。 在完成区域 10 后，所有刷新的敌人会有 10 点额外的重甲生命值，必须先消灭他们的重甲生命值，他们的一般生命值才会显示。当敌人被击退时，这些重甲生命值会立即被消除，从而暴露出其普通生命值条。 在你第一次完成区域 50 后，你无法将勇士从阵型中移除。 当你完成此支线任务后，阵型中的所有勇士将不可用于“传承的终结”支线任务。每项赞助者支线任务都有各自的不可用勇士名单。 冒险过程中不能使用火息药剂，并且点击伤害在区域 100 之后无效。

restrictions.original:
Duke Ravengard starts in the formation. He can be moved, but not removed.
You may only use Champions with a Melee base attack. You also can't use any Champions that you used to finish variant 1 and 2 other than Duke Ravengard.
After area 10, enemies spawn with a special shield which must be destroyed before their regular hit points appear. To destroy a special shield, an enemy must be hit with a critical hit.
Fire breath potions can't be used during the adventure, and click damage has no effect after area 100.
restrictions.display:
瑞文嘉德公爵初始位于阵型中。他可以被移动，但不能被移除。
只能使用可进行近战基本攻击的勇士。同时不能使用所有你用来完成支线任务 1 和 2 的勇士（瑞文嘉德公爵除外）。
在完成区域 10 后，刷新的敌人会有一面特殊的护盾，必须先摧毁该护盾，他们的一般生命值才会显示。要摧毁特殊护盾，必须对敌人造成一次暴击命中。
冒险过程中不能使用火息药剂，并且点击伤害在区域 100 之后无效。

restrictions.original: No restrictions
restrictions.display: 无限制

restrictions.original: Spurt starts in the formation. He can be moved, but not removed. Only Champions that aren't part of an affiliation can be used. Getting to Know Idle Champions: An Affiliation is a small group of Champions that often have mechanics that encourage using them together. Unaffiliated Champions often have flexible abilities that can be used in many different formations.
restrictions.display: 斯普特初始位于阵型中。他可以被移动，但不能被移除。 只能使用没有从属组织的勇士。 了解《Idle Champions》：从属组织由一小组勇士组成，他们常常拥有某些机制，鼓励玩家把他们放在一起使用。无从属组织的勇士则往往拥有灵活的技能，可用于多种不同的阵型。

restrictions.original:
Spurt starts in the formation. He can be moved, but not removed.
You may only use Champions that have a base attack cooldown of 4 seconds or less.
All Enemies move 100% faster and their base attack cooldowns are reduced by 50%.
restrictions.display:
斯普特初始位于阵型中。他可以被移动，但不能被移除。
只能使用基本攻击冷却时间小于等于 4 秒的勇士。
所有敌人的移动速度提高 100%，基本攻击冷却时间缩短 50%。

name.original: Wasps and the Kobold that Loves Them
name.display: 黄蜂和喜爱黄蜂的狗头人

restrictions.original:
Spurt starts in the formation. He can be moved, but not removed.
You may only use Champions with both a Dexterity and Charisma of 13 or higher.
Two Hellwasps join the formation. They just get in the way.
restrictions.display:
斯普特初始位于阵型中。他可以被移动，但不能被移除。
只能使用敏捷和魅力都大于等于 13 的勇士。
两只地狱蜂加入阵型。它们只会挡道。

restrictions.original: No restrictions
restrictions.display: 无限制

restrictions.original: Baeloth joins the formation. He can't be moved or removed. Only Baeloth and the Champions in the columns ahead and behind him can deal damage with their base attacks. Each time a Champion other than Baeloth deals damage with their base attack, they take damage equal to 5% of their max health. Each time a Champion other than Baeloth uses their ultimate, they take damage equal to 50% of their max health. Champions don't recover health when moving to a new area. Champions resurrect at half health when changing areas instead of full health. Getting to Know Idle Champions: Some Champions like Baeloth can prevent a Champion from dying. This often provides your formation with the final push you need to succeed!
restrictions.display: 贝洛斯加入阵型。他无法被移动或移除。 只有贝洛斯和身处他身前身后各列中的勇士才能以基本攻击造成伤害。 每当除贝洛斯以外的勇士以基础攻击造成伤害，该勇士会受到相当于其最大生命值 5% 的伤害。 每当除贝洛斯以外的勇士使用杀招，该勇士会受到相当于其最大生命值 50% 的伤害。 勇士们在移动到新区域时不会恢复生命值。 切换区域时，复活的勇士只会恢复一半生命值而非全部。 了解《Idle Champions》：部分勇士（如贝洛斯）可防止勇士死亡。这往往可在最后关头为你的阵型带来关键助力，帮助你成功取胜！

restrictions.original:
Baeloth joins the formation. He can be moved, but not removed.
You may only use Champions with the Gold Find, Hunter, or DPS role.
After area 50, one Champion is stunned in each area. The Champion in seat 1 is stunned first, advancing by bench order in each area. Baeloth's seat is skipped, and this resets after seat 12.
Champions in stunned seats cannot be moved or removed from the formation.
restrictions.display:
贝洛斯加入阵型。他可以被移动，但不能被移除。
只能使用拥有金币寻获、猎人或伤害输出角色定位的勇士。
完成区域 50 后，在每个区域中会有一位勇士被眩晕。第 1 栏位内的勇士会首先被眩晕，然后每推进一个区域，按出战栏位的顺序轮到下一位勇士。贝洛斯所在的栏位会被跳过，在轮到第 12 栏位后重头开始循环。
被眩晕栏位中的勇士无法被移动或移出阵型。

restrictions.original:
Baeloth joins the formation. He can be moved, but not removed.
After area 50, a random Champion other than Baeloth takes damage equal to 100% of their max health every 10 seconds.
restrictions.display:
贝洛斯加入阵型。他可以被移动，但不能被移除。
完成区域 50 后，每隔 10 秒，除贝洛斯以外一位随机勇士会受到相当于其最大生命值 100% 的伤害。

restrictions.original: No restrictions
restrictions.display: 无限制

restrictions.original: Shadowheart joins the formation. She can be moved, but not removed. In non-boss areas, 3 Wolves spawn with each wave. They don't drop gold nor count towards quest progress. These Wolves are armored enemies that move 200% faster and deal 400% more damage. Champions don't recover health when moving to a new area. Champions resurrect at half health when changing areas instead of full health. Getting to Know Idle Champions: Champions with the Healing role let other heroes recover health or gain temporary health that can go above normal maximums.
restrictions.display: 影心加入阵型。她可以被移动，但不能被移除。 在非首领区域，每波会刷新 3 头狼。它们不会掉落金币，也不计入任务进度。这些狼为重甲敌人，移动速度增加 200%，且会造成 400% 额外伤害。 勇士们在移动到新区域时不会恢复生命值。 切换区域时，复活的勇士只会恢复一半生命值而非全部。 了解《Idle Champions》：有治疗角色定位的勇士可使英雄恢复生命值，或获得能超过正常最大值的临时生命值。

restrictions.original:
Shadowheart joins the formation. She can be moved, but not removed.
You may only use Champions with a Dexterity of 14 or higher.
If the formation includes an Evil Champion, you may not add Good Champions.
If the formation includes a Good Champion, you may not add Evil Champions.
Champions don't recover health when moving to a new area.
Champions resurrect at half health when changing areas instead of full health.
restrictions.display:
影心加入阵型。她可以被移动，但不能被移除。
只能使用敏捷大于等于 14 的勇士。
如果阵型中包含邪恶勇士，则不可添加善良勇士。
如果阵型中包含善良勇士，则不可添加邪恶勇士。
勇士们在移动到新区域时不会恢复生命值。
切换区域时，复活的勇士只会恢复一半生命值而非全部。

name.original: Can't Cast a Shadow Without Some Light

restrictions.original:
Shadowheart joins the formation. She can be moved, but not removed.
Other than Shadowheart, you may only use Champions with a Dexterity of 13 or lower.
A Torch joins the formation and bathes all adjacent formation slots in bright Light. Formation slots not adjacent to the torch are cast into Shadow.
Champions in the Light take 5% of their max health as damage every second and can not deal damage with their base attacks.
Champions in the Shadow have their damage boosted by 1000% for each Champion that is in the Light, stacking multiplicatively.
Whenever Shadowheart changes her position in the formation, the torch occupies her previous position (and if she took the spot of another Champion, they are moved to where the torch was).
Champions don't recover health when moving to a new area. 
Champions resurrect at half health when changing areas instead of full health.
restrictions.display:
影心加入阵型。她可以被移动，但不能被移除。
只能使用敏捷小于等于 13 的勇士（影心除外）。
一根火把加入阵型，以明亮的光芒照亮所有相邻的阵型格子。不与火把相邻的阵型格子会被暗影笼罩。
被照亮的勇士每秒会受到相当于其最大生命值 5% 的伤害，且无法以基本攻击造成伤害。
每有一位勇士被照亮，被暗影笼罩的勇士伤害提升 1000%，以乘算方式堆叠。
每当影心变换她在阵型中的位置，火把会占据她之前所在的位置（如果她占据了另一位勇士的位置，该勇士会移动到火把之前所在的位置）。
勇士在移动到新区域时不会恢复生命值。
切换区域时，复活的勇士只会恢复一半生命值而非全部。

restrictions.original: No restrictions
restrictions.display: 无限制

name.original: There's a New Boss in Town

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Trickster's Delight (King of Shadows)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“骗子的欢欣（暗影之王）”

restrictions.original:
The King of Shadows starts in the formation. He can't be moved or removed.
Only the King of Shadows and Champions in the two columns behind him can deal damage.
All boss enemies deal 100% additional damage.
A Mad Wizard has a 50% chance to spawn in the second wave of each non-boss area. No other enemies can be damaged while the Mad Wizard is alive.
Getting to Know The King of Shadows: The King of Shadows main support ability increases his damage and the damage of Champions in the two columns behind him.
restrictions.display:
暗影之王初始位于阵型中。他无法被移动或移除。
只有暗影之王和处于他后方两列的勇士可造成伤害。
所有首领敌人造成 100% 额外伤害。
在每个非首领区域的第二波敌人中，有 50% 的几率刷新一名发疯的法师。在这名发疯的法师被击败之前，无法对其他敌人造成伤害。
了解暗影之王：暗影之王的主要支援技能会使他自身以及他后方两列中勇士的伤害提高。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Trickster's Delight (King of Shadows)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“骗子的欢欣（暗影之王）”

restrictions.original:
The King of Shadows starts in the formation. He can't be moved or removed.
Two Shadow escorts join the formation. 
Healing effects on Champions adjacent to one or more Shadows are reduced by 50%. 
Getting to Know The King of Shadows: The King of Shadows gains Tanking and DPS abilities that get stronger the longer it takes for him to be defeated. Use healers and tanking Champions with Taunt to have him last longer!
restrictions.display:
暗影之王初始位于阵型中。他无法被移动或移除。
两个暗影护卫加入阵型。
毗邻一个或以上暗影的勇士，其受到的治疗效果减少 50%。
了解暗影之王：暗影之王会获得坦克和伤害输出技能，他存活的时间越久，这些技能就越强。使用治疗师和带嘲讽的坦克型勇士来让他存活得更久！

name.original: A Path Through the Astral Plane

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Trickster's Delight (King of Shadows)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“骗子的欢欣（暗影之王）”

restrictions.original:
The King of Shadows starts in the formation. He can't be moved or removed.
You may only use Elf, Dwarf, Half-Elf, Human, Evil, and/or Healing Champions.
1-2 Githyanki Warriors spawn with each wave. They deal 500% additional damage to the King of Shadows due to their silver swords, and they don't drop gold nor count towards quest progress.
Getting to Know The King of Shadows: The King of Shadows' second specialization choice determines which Champions he synergizes with best. Which set will you choose?
restrictions.display:
暗影之王初始位于阵型中。他无法被移动或移除。
只能使用精灵、矮人、半精灵、人类、邪恶阵营和/或治疗型勇士。
每波会刷新 1-2 个吉斯洋基人战士。他们使用的银剑会对暗影之王造成 500% 的额外伤害，并且他们不会掉落金币，也不计入任务进度。
了解暗影之王：暗影之王的第二个专精选择决定了他最适合与哪些勇士配合。你会怎么选择？

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Trickster's Delight (King of Shadows)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“骗子的欢欣（暗影之王）”

restrictions.original: No restrictions
restrictions.display: 无限制

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Crypt of Legends (Skylla)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“传说的墓穴（斯凯拉）”

restrictions.original: Skylla starts in the formation with her Whispers of Baba Yaga ability unlocked. She can be moved, but not removed. Only Skylla and Champions affected by her Whispers of Baba Yaga ability can deal damage. Getting to Know Skylla: Skylla increases the damage of Champions in the column in front of her, and her buff grows stronger the more Champions it affects. Put her behind the longest column buffing your best damage dealer!
restrictions.display: 斯凯拉初始位于阵型中，并已解锁她的“雅加婆婆的低语”技能。她可以被移动，但不能被移除。 只有斯凯拉和受她的“雅加婆婆的低语”技能影响的勇士可以造成伤害。 了解斯凯拉：斯凯拉会提高位于她前列的勇士的伤害，而且有越多的勇士受她的增益影响，其效果就越强。把她放置在最长的纵列后方来为你最优秀的伤害输出勇士提供增益吧！

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Crypt of Legends (Skylla)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“传说的墓穴（斯凯拉）”

restrictions.original: Skylla starts in the formation. She can be moved, but not removed. After area 50, enemies without a Debuff on them take only 1 damage from normal attacks and click damage. Two animated constructs join the formation. Champions next to these constructs attack 1 second faster. Getting to Know Skylla: When Skylla attacks and fails to defeat her enemy, she casts Faerie Fire on it, making it easier to damage with subsequent attacks. Use her and other debuff Champions to get through these resistant foes!
restrictions.display: 斯凯拉初始位于阵型中。她可以被移动，但不能被移除。 在区域 50 之后，身上没有减益效果的敌人遭到普通攻击和点击伤害只会受到 1 点伤害。 两个活化的构装生物加入阵型。与这些构装生物相邻的勇士攻击会快 1 秒。 了解斯凯拉：当斯凯拉进行攻击但没能击败敌人时，她会对其施放精灵之火，使其更容易受到后续攻击的伤害。用她和其他减益勇士来突破这些抗打击性强的敌人吧！

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Crypt of Legends (Skylla)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“传说的墓穴（斯凯拉）”

restrictions.original: Skylla starts in the formation. She can be moved, but not removed. You may only use Debuff Champions, Evil Champions, or Champions with large differences in the ability scores that Skylla switches. Getting to Know Skylla: One of Skylla's specialization choices swaps the ability scores of Champions in the formation, and increases her buff when the ability scores differ by a large number. You might find some interesting interactions with Champions that care about ability score thresholds!
restrictions.display: 斯凯拉初始位于阵型中。她可以被移动，但不能被移除。 只能使用增益勇士、邪恶勇士或者在斯凯拉调换的属性值上存在巨大差异的勇士。 了解斯凯拉：斯凯拉的其中一个专精选择会调换阵型中勇士的属性值，并且在属性值相差很大时增加她的增益效果。你也许会发现一些与看重属性值门槛的勇士之间的有趣互动。

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Crypt of Legends (Skylla)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“传说的墓穴（斯凯拉）”

restrictions.original: No restrictions
restrictions.display: 无限制

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Simril Spoilsport (Lark)" Getting to Know Lark: When Lark attacks an enemy and does not defeat it, he applies a debuff making it more susceptible to damage in the future. Use him and other debuff Champions to get through these resistant foes!
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“观星节扫兴者（拉克）” 了解拉克：当拉克攻击一名敌人但没有将其击败时，他会施加一项减益，使其在未来更容易受到伤害。用他和其他减益勇士来突破这些抗打击性强的敌人吧！

restrictions.original: Lark starts in the formation with his Devil May Care ability unlocked. He can be moved, but not removed. Only Lark and Champions buffed by both him and Uggie can deal damage. 1-2 Unruly fans spawn with each wave. They don't drop gold nor count towards quest progress. Getting to Know Lark and Uggie: Lark increases the damage of Champions in the middle columns, while Uggie increases the damage of Champions not next to her. Position your damage dealers to take advantage of both buffs!
restrictions.display: 拉克初始位于阵型中，并解锁他的“无所顾忌”技能。他可以被移动，但不能被移除。 只有拉克和受到他和乌吉的技能增益的勇士能造成伤害。 每波会刷新 1-2 个不守规矩的粉丝。他们不会掉落金币，也不计入任务进度。 了解拉克和乌吉：拉克会使处于中间各列的勇士伤害提高，而乌吉会使不与她相邻的勇士伤害提高。合理放置你的输出勇士来利用这两项增益！

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Simril Spoilsport (Lark)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“观星节扫兴者（拉克）”

restrictions.original: Lark starts in the formation. He can be moved, but not removed. Starting in area 51, enemies that don't have an active debuff reduce all normal attack damage to just 1 point of damage. Getting to Know Lark: When Lark attacks an enemy and does not defeat it, he applies a debuff making it more susceptible to damage in the future. Use him and other debuff Champions to get through these resistant foes!
restrictions.display: 拉克初始位于阵型中。他可以被移动，但不能被移除。 从区域 51 开始，身上没有已激活负面效果的敌人可以将所有普通攻击伤害减少到 1 点。 了解拉克：当拉克攻击一名敌人但没有将其击败时，他会施加一项减益，使其在未来更容易受到伤害。用他和其他减益勇士来突破这些抗打击性强的敌人吧！

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Simril Spoilsport (Lark)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“观星节扫兴者（拉克）”

restrictions.original:
Lark starts in the formation. He can be moved, but not removed.
You may only use Champions who are Fallbacks, Tieflings, Evil, multi-classed, or have a Charisma of 13 or lower.
Two backup musicians join the formation. They just get in the way.
Getting to Know Lark: Lark's specialization choice determines which sort of Champions he works best with. Build a formation that makes the most of his buffs!
restrictions.display:
拉克初始位于阵型中。他可以被移动，但不能被移除。
只能使用属于“后备队”、提夫林、邪恶、多职业或魅力小于等于 13 的勇士。
两名后备音乐家加入阵型。他们只会挡道。
了解拉克：拉克的专精选择决定了他将适合与哪类勇士配合。组建一个能最大程度发挥他增益效果的阵型吧！

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Simril Spoilsport (Lark)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“观星节扫兴者（拉克）”

restrictions.original: No restrictions
restrictions.display: 无限制

name.display: 任何时候都要算上乌吉

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Merry Map Misadventure (Anson)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“快乐地图灾祸（安森）”

restrictions.original: Anson starts in the formation with his Unshakable Ability unlocked. He can be moved but not removed. Only Anson and Champions buffed by both him and Uggie can deal damage. 1-2 Mimics spawn with each wave. They don't drop gold nor count towards quest progress. Getting to Know Anson: Anson increases the damage of Champions behind him, while Uggie increases the damage of Champions not next to Uggie. Position your damage dealer to take advantage of both buffs!
restrictions.display: 安森初始位于阵型中并解锁他的“坚定不移”技能。他可以被移动，但不能被移除。 只有安森和受到他和乌吉的技能增益的勇士能造成伤害。 每波会刷新 1-2 个拟形怪。它们不会掉落金币，也不计入任务进度。 了解安森：安森会使在他身后的勇士伤害提高，同时乌吉会使不与乌吉相邻的勇士伤害提高。合理放置你的输出勇士来利用这两项增益！

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Merry Map Misadventure (Anson)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“快乐地图灾祸（安森）”

restrictions.original: Anson starts in the formation. He can be moved but not removed. Champions don't recover health when moving to a new area. Champions resurrect at half health when changing areas instead of full health. Every 100 areas, enemy speed and damage is increased by 100%, stacking additively up to 10 times. Starting in area 50, a thrown rock hits a random Champion every second, dealing 1% of their max health in damage Getting to Know Anson: Anson's unstable weapon sometimes shocks him, but he powers through it. You may need to include some healing abilities to get him through!
restrictions.display: 安森初始位于阵型中。他可以被移动，但不能被移除。 勇士在移动到新区域时不会恢复生命值。 改变区域时，复活的勇士只会恢复一半生命值而非全部。 每完成 100 个区域，敌人的速度和伤害提高 100%，以加算方式堆叠，最多堆叠 10 次。 从区域 50 开始，每秒会有一块被扔出的石头随机击中一位勇士，对其造成相当于其最大生命值 1% 的伤害 了解安森：安森那不稳定的武器有时候会电到他自己，但他仍咬牙坚持。你可能需要在阵型中加入一些治疗技能来帮助他撑过去！

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Merry Map Misadventure (Anson)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“快乐地图灾祸（安森）”

restrictions.original: Anson starts in the formation. He can be moved but not removed. Anson's brother Valen and a scared villager join the formation. 1-2 Zhentarim Thugs spawn with each wave. They don't drop gold nor count towards quest progress. You may only use Good, Unaffiliated, or Fallbacks champions. Getting to Know Anson: Anson's specialization choices determine which heroes he works best with. Who will you include in the formation?
restrictions.display: 安森初始位于阵型中。他可以被移动，但不能被移除。 安森的兄弟瓦伦和一名受惊的村民加入阵型。 每波会刷新 1-2 名散塔林会暴徒。它们不会掉落金币，也不计入任务进度。 只能使用善良、无从属组织或“后备队”勇士。 了解安森：安森的专精选择决定了他最适合与哪些英雄配合。你会把谁加入阵型中？

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Merry Map Misadventure (Anson)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“快乐地图灾祸（安森）”

restrictions.original: No restrictions
restrictions.display: 无限制

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Missing Merchants (Kyre)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“失踪的商人（凯尔）”

restrictions.original: Kyre starts in the formation. They can't be moved or removed. Only Kyre and Champions next to them can deal damage. 1-2 Shadowy Rats spawn with each wave. They don't drop gold nor count towards quest progress. Getting to Know Kyre: Kyre increases the damage of Champions next to them. Place your damage dealer to take the best advantage of these buffs!
restrictions.display: 凯尔初始位于阵型中，无法被移动或移除。 只有凯尔和与其相邻的勇士可以造成伤害。 每波会刷新 1-2 只幽暗老鼠。它们不会掉落金币，也不计入任务进度。 了解凯尔：凯尔会提升与其相邻的勇士的伤害。合理放置你的伤害输出者来充分利用这些增益吧！

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Missing Merchants (Kyre)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“失踪的商人（凯尔）”

restrictions.original: Kyre starts in the formation. They can't be moved or removed. Champions deal 1% damage to enemies that are not stunned. A Monk joins the formation. Champions adjacent to the Monk have a 10% chance to stun enemies they attack for 5 seconds. 1-2 Shadow Goblins spawn with each wave. They don't drop gold nor count towards quest progress. Getting to Know Kyre: Kyre can stun enemies and increase damage against them. Use them and other Champions that stun to get through these foes!
restrictions.display: 凯尔初始位于阵型中，无法被移动或移除。 勇士们对没有被眩晕的敌人只会造成 1% 的伤害。 一名武僧加入阵型。与该武僧相邻的勇士有 10% 的几率使他们攻击的敌人眩晕 5 秒。 每波会刷新 1-2 个幽暗地精。它们不会掉落金币，也不计入任务进度。 了解凯尔：凯尔可以眩晕敌人，并增加对他们的伤害。利用凯尔和其他会眩晕敌人的勇士来突破这些敌人吧！

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Missing Merchants (Kyre)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“失踪的商人（凯尔）”

restrictions.original: Kyre starts in the formation. They can be moved, but not removed. You may only use Good Champions, Control Champions, or Champions with a Dexterity of 16 or higher. After area 50, bosses spawn with a segmented special shield with 5 hits which must be destroyed before their regular hit points appear. To destroy a special shield segment, an enemy must be hit with a critical hit. 1-2 Shadows spawn with each wave. They don't drop gold nor count towards quest progress. Getting to Know Kyre: Kyre's specialization choice determines which Champions they work best with. Who will you add to the formation?
restrictions.display: 凯尔初始位于阵型中，可以被移动，但不能被移除。 只能使用善良勇士、控制勇士或敏捷大于等于 16 的勇士。 在完成区域 50 后，刷新的首领会有一面分段式特殊护盾，可抵挡 5 次命中，必须先摧毁该护盾，他们的一般生命值才会显示。要摧毁其中一段特殊护盾，必须对敌人造成一次暴击命中。 每波会刷新 1-2 个暗影。它们不会掉落金币，也不计入任务进度。 了解凯尔：凯尔的专精选择决定了哪些勇士最适合与其配合。你会把谁加入阵型中？

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Missing Merchants (Kyre)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“失踪的商人（凯尔）”

restrictions.original: No restrictions
restrictions.display: 无限制

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Unfair Sea (Raistlin)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“不公平的海（雷斯林）”

restrictions.original: Raistlin starts in the formation. He can be moved, but not removed. Only Raistlin and Champions not next to him can deal damage. After area 100, attacks against undamaged enemies have a 90% chance to completely miss. 1-2 Baaz Draconians spawn with each wave. They don't drop gold nor count towards quest progress. Getting to Know Raistlin: Raistlin's role is dealing damage, and he deals more damage when he is next to fewer Champions. Place him in an isolated spot of a formation to increase his damage!
restrictions.display: 雷斯林初始位于阵型中。他可以被移动，但不能被移除。 只有雷斯林和不与他相邻的勇士可以造成伤害。 完成区域 100 后，对未受伤害的敌人进行的攻击有 90% 的几率完全落空。 每波会刷新 1-2 个巴兹龙人。它们不会掉落金币，也不计入任务进度。 了解雷斯林：雷斯林的角色定位是输出伤害，而且与他相邻的勇士越少，他造成的伤害就越高。把他放置在阵型中的一个孤立位置来提高他的伤害吧！

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Unfair Sea (Raistlin)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“不公平的海（雷斯林）”

restrictions.original: Raistlin starts in the formation. He can be moved, but not removed. Fizban joins the formation. Champions in Fizban's column deal 1000% additional damage. This bonus counts as a positional formation ability. You may only use Champions that have positional formation abilities. In each boss area, a Sivak Draconian boss spawns as part of the first wave. It must also be defeated to progress. Getting to Know Raistlin: Raistlin's damage is increased dramatically when he is buffed by positional formation abilities that target 4 or fewer Champions in the formation. This buff further increases as the number of Champions buffed by the ability is reduced!
restrictions.display: 雷斯林初始位于阵型中。他可以被移动，但不能被移除。 费资本加入阵型。与费资本同一列的勇士会造成 1000% 的额外伤害。这项加成算作一项位置阵型技能。 只能使用拥有位置阵型技能的勇士。 在每个首领区域，首个波次中会刷新一个西瓦克龙人首领。必须将它一并击败，游戏才能继续。 了解雷斯林：当雷斯林受到以阵型中的 4 个或更少勇士为目标的位置阵型技能增益时，他的伤害会大幅提高。随着受技能增益的勇士数量减少，此增益的效果还会进一步提高！

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Unfair Sea (Raistlin)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“不公平的海（雷斯林）”

restrictions.original: Raistlin starts in the formation. He can be moved, but not removed. You may only use Good Champions, Tanking Champions, or Champions with a ranged or melee attack. Champions do not regain health when changing areas. Every 3 seconds, a random Champion is struck by a falling rock, dealing 5% of their maximum health in damage. 1-2 Kapak Draconians spawn with each wave. They don't drop gold nor count towards quest progress. In each boss area, an Aurak Draconian boss spawns as part of the first wave. It must also be defeated to progress. Getting to Know Raistlin: Raistlin's specialization choice determines which Champions he works best with. Which Champions will you add to the formation?
restrictions.display: 雷斯林初始位于阵型中。他可以被移动，但不能被移除。 只能使用善良勇士、坦克型勇士或者远程或近战攻击的勇士。 切换区域时，勇士不会恢复生命值。 每隔 3 秒，一位随机勇士会被落石困住，受到相当于其最大生命值 5% 的伤害。 每波会刷新 1-2 个卡帕克龙人。它们不会掉落金币，也不计入任务进度。 在每个首领区域，首个波次中会刷新一个奥瑞克龙人首领。必须将它一并击败，游戏才能继续。 了解雷斯林：雷斯林的第一套专精选择会决定他适合与哪些勇士配合。你会把哪位勇士加入阵型中？

restrictions.original: Must have completed "The Unfair Sea (Raistlin)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“不公平的海（雷斯林）”

restrictions.original: No restrictions
restrictions.display: 无限制

name.original: Did I Ever Tell You About...?

restrictions.original: Must have completed "A Fool's Errand (Tasslehoff)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“愚人的差事（泰索何夫）”

restrictions.original: Tasslehoff starts in the formation. He can be moved, but not removed. Only Tasslehoff and Champions in the 3 rear-most columns can deal damage. Champions next to Tasslehoff attack slower due to his stories. Their base attack cooldowns are increased by 2 seconds. 1-2 Bozak Draconians spawn with each wave. They don't drop gold nor count towards quest progress. Getting to Know Tasslehoff: Tasslehoff's buff can be set to one of the three columns in the back of the formation. Place your damage dealers to take advantage of this!
restrictions.display: 泰索何夫初始位于阵型中。他可以被移动，但不能被移除。 只有泰索何夫和处于最后三列中的勇士能造成伤害。 由于分心听泰索何夫讲故事，与他相邻的勇士攻击速度会变慢。他们的基本攻击冷却时间增加 2 秒。 每波会刷新 1-2 个波扎克龙人。它们不会掉落金币，也不计入任务进度。 了解泰索何夫：你可将泰索何夫的增益设置为影响阵型后方三列中的一列。合理放置你的输出勇士来利用这一点！

restrictions.original: Must have completed "A Fool's Errand (Tasslehoff)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“愚人的差事（泰索何夫）”

restrictions.original: Tasslehoff starts in the formation. He can be moved, but not removed. Fizban joins the formation. Champions in Fizban's column deal 1000% additional damage. This bonus counts as a positional formation ability. You may only use Champions that have positional formation abilities. Only Tasslehoff and Champions not next to him can deal damage. 1-2 Baaz Draconians spawn with each wave. They don't drop gold nor count towards quest progress. In each boss area, a Sivak Draconian boss spawns as part of the first wave. It must also be defeated to progress. Getting to Know Tasslehoff: Tasslehoff's Diversion ability turns off positional formation buffs affecting his slot and neighboring slots, but his buff increases in power each time that happens. Place your damage dealer away from Tasslehoff to get the most of this!
restrictions.display: 泰索何夫初始位于阵型中。他可以被移动，但不能被移除。 费资本加入阵型。与费资本同一列的勇士会造成 1000% 的额外伤害。这项加成算作一项位置阵型技能。 只能使用拥有位置阵型技能的勇士。 只有泰索何夫和不与他相邻的勇士可以造成伤害。 每波会刷新 1-2 个巴兹龙人。它们不会掉落金币，也不计入任务进度。 在每个首领区域，首个波次中会刷新一个西瓦克龙人首领。必须将它一并击败，游戏才能继续。 了解泰索何夫：泰索何夫的“声东击西”技能会使影响他所在格子与相邻格子的位置阵型增益失效，但每触发一次，他的增益效果会变强。将你的伤害输出者放置在远离泰索何夫的位置来充分利用这一点！

restrictions.original: Must have completed "A Fool's Errand (Tasslehoff)"
restrictions.display: 必须已完成“愚人的差事（泰索何夫）”

restrictions.original: Tasslehoff starts in the formation. He can be moved, but not removed. You may only use Champions that count for any of Tasslehoff's second specialization choices. Only Tasslehoff and Champions not next to him can deal damage. The enemy/boss enrage bar starts out on the screen and begins to fill immediately. When one or more Monstrosity enemies are alive, the bar fills four times faster. 1-2 Kapak Draconians spawn with each wave. They don't drop gold nor count towards quest progress. In each boss area, an Aurak Draconian boss spawns as part of the first wave. It must also be defeated to progress. Getting to Know Tasslehoff: Tasslehoff's second specialization choice determines which Champions he works best with. Who will you choose?
restrictions.display: 泰索何夫初始位于阵型中。他可以被移动，但不能被移除。 你只能使用符合泰索何夫第二个专精选择条件的勇士。 只有泰索何夫和不与他相邻的勇士可以造成伤害。 敌人/首领的暴怒条一开始便显示在屏幕上，并立即开始填充。当有一名或更多怪兽敌人存活时，该计量条的填充速度快四倍。 每波会刷新 1-2 个卡帕克龙人。它们不会掉落金币，也不计入任务进度。 在每个首领区域，首个波次中会刷新一个奥瑞克龙人首领。必须将它一并击败，游戏才能继续。 了解泰索何夫：泰索何夫的第二个专精选择会决定他适合与哪些勇士配合。你会选择谁呢？

restrictions.original: Laurana starts in the formation. She can be moved, but not removed. Getting to Know Laurana: Laurana's first specialization choice selects one column behind her for her primary buff. Put your main damage dealer in that column!

restrictions.original: Laurana starts in the formation. She can't be moved or removed. Laurana gains 2 bonus Campaign stacks while on this adventure. Fizban joins the formation. Champions in Fizban's column deal 1000% additional damage. This bonus counts as a positional formation ability. 1-2 Chromatic Wyrmlings spawn with each wave. They don't drop gold, nor count towards quest progress. All enemies move 100% faster and deal 100% more damage. Getting to Know Laurana: Laurana has 15 bonus achievements, and her abilities improve as you complete these achievements. These achievements are listed in the Great Modron March section of the achievement dialog.

restrictions.original: Laurana starts in the formation. She can be moved, but not removed. You may only use Heroes of the Lance Champions, DPS Champions, Hunter Champions, or Champions with a Constitution of 12 or lower. After area 50, bosses spawn with a special shield which must be destroyed before their regular hit points appear. To destroy a special shield, an enemy must be hit with a critical hit. After area 500, this special shield takes 5 critical hits to destroy. 1-2 Bozak Draconians spawn with each wave. They don't drop gold nor count towards quest progress. In each boss area, an Aurak Draconian boss spawns as part of the first wave. It must also be defeated to progress. Getting to Know Laurana: Laurana's Soldiers further increase the power of her buff. Use her second specialization choice to add more Champions to her list of potential Soldiers!

restrictions.original: Trixie the Pixie starts in the formation. She can be moved, but not removed. After area 50, you may only use Small Champions and all Champions that aren't Small are removed from the formation. Small Champions are fairy, gnome, goblin, halfling, kender, kobold, and plasmoid Champions. Non-boss enemies deal 100% additional damage and are increased in size by 50%. Getting to Know Trixie the Pixie: Trixie can reduce the size of two Champions in the slots directly behind her so they count as small. All Champions that share a species with one of those Champions are also reduced in size!

restrictions.original: Trixie the Pixie starts in the formation. She can be moved, but not removed. After area 50, enemies that aren't slowed, stunned, or rooted only take 1 damage from normal attacks. Click damage only deals damage (including fire breath effects) for the first 25 areas. Fire breath potions can't be used during the adventure. Getting to Know Trixie the Pixie: Some variants turn off click damage, so familiars don't deal damage. You can still use familiars with Trixie's specialization choices to increase the attack rate of your other Champions!
